More detailed descriptions of the alternatives for the various unit operations required for production of pharmaceutical grade water are discussed in the following chapters. Rationale is provided for decisions that will surface regarding quality, cost, performance, maintenance, and reliability as the system is developed in detail.

教學解析 Commentary

系統設計的核心決策

進入系統設計階段後，主要需要做出以下決策：

  1. 配送架構：Central Storage（集中儲存）vs. Multiple Loops（多迴路）
  2. 溫度策略：Hot Distribution（熱配送 ≥70°C）vs. Ambient/Cold（常溫/冷配送）
  3. 備援策略：Lead-Lag Operation（主備切換）vs. N+1 Redundancy（冗餘設備）
  4. 規模策略：One Large System vs. Multiple Small Systems

成本比較：集中式 vs. 分散式

比較項目 Central System（集中式） Multiple Systems（分散式）
初始資本 較高 單套較低，總計可能更高
運營維護 較低（規模效益） 較高（多套設備維護）
單位成本 可能更低 可能更高
彈性 較低（一旦建成難調整） 較高（可逐步擴展）
故障影響 全廠受影響（除非有備援） 僅部分區域受影響

重點提示：Hot vs. Cold Distribution

溫度策略的選擇直接影響微生物控制方案：

  • Hot Distribution（≥70°C）：持續抑菌，不需要定期消毒，但能耗高、管材要求高
  • Cold/Ambient Distribution：能耗低，但需要定期 Heat Sanitization（熱消毒）
  • 關鍵限制：如果工廠是 24/7 運作，冷系統可能沒有時間窗口進行熱消毒 → 被迫選擇熱配送

重點提示：Lead-Lag 備援運行

Lead-Lag Operation（主備切換）是常見的備援策略：

  • Lead（主設備）：正常運行
  • Lag（備用設備）：待命狀態，主設備故障時自動接手
  • 也可以輪替使用，確保兩台設備都保持在良好狀態
  • 特別適用於蒸餾器、RO 膜組等關鍵設備

CDMO 實務：系統設計的特殊考量

對無菌充填 CDMO 而言，系統設計還需額外考量：

  • 客戶審計期望：大型藥廠客戶通常偏好 Hot WFI Loop（熱 WFI 迴路），因為這是業界「黃金標準」
  • 未來擴展：CDMO 業務增長快速，預留 30-50% 擴充能力是常見做法
  • 多棟建築：如果有多條充填線分布在不同潔淨區，需要考慮是集中供水還是分區供水
  • 備援要求：無菌充填一旦停產損失巨大，建議關鍵設備都有 Lead-Lag 備援

綜合練習

你正在規劃一座新的 CDMO 無菌充填工廠，有以下條件：

  • 兩條充填線，分布在同一棟建築的不同樓層
  • 需要 WFI 供應充填、配液、CIP、膠塞清洗
  • 工廠 24/7 運作，每週有 8 小時維護窗口
  • 預計三年內增加第三條充填線

請根據本章所學，回答以下問題：

  1. 你會選擇 Central System 還是 Multiple Systems？為什麼？
  2. 你會選擇 Hot Distribution 還是 Cold + Periodic Sanitization？為什麼？
  3. 你的備援策略是什麼？

本節重點摘要 Section Summary

  • 水質階層：Drinking Water → Non-Compendial → PW (Compendial) → WFI，選擇依據是產品特性、製程需求和預期用途。非藥典水不等於低品質水。
  • Decision Tree：Figure 3-1 提供水質選擇的系統化流程，但藥品申請文件中的承諾優先於 Decision Tree。
  • 成本分析：使用 NPV（五年期）比較不同方案。膜系統（RO/EDI）NPV 最低；不同水處理系統的 NPV 差異其實不大，除了外送再生 DI。
  • 四步驟規劃法：(1) 確定水質 → (2) 特徵化使用點 → (3) 建立系統標準 → (4) 重新檢視水質。這是一個迭代過程，通常需要 2-3 輪。
  • Diversity Factor：用來估算同時使用率，瞬時流量決定管線尺寸，每日用量決定儲存和產水能力。
  • 系統設計：Central vs. Multiple Systems、Hot vs. Cold Distribution、Lead-Lag Backup 是三大核心決策。所有妥協都必須在邊界限制之內。

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems

Chapter 3: Water Options and System Planning | Pages 31–41

SterileGMP Knowledge Hub — Bilingual Educational Edition

4

Chapter 4: Pretreatment Options

前處理選項 | p43-p55

ISPE Baseline® Guide Vol.4 — Water and Steam Systems

Chapter 4: Pretreatment Options
第四章：前處理選項
ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems | p43-p55

本節學習目標 Learning Objectives

  1. 說明 Pretreatment（前處理）在製藥水系統中的定位，理解其與 Final Treatment（最終處理）的關係。
  2. 掌握 Feedwater（進水）品質測試與文件記錄的要求，以及季節性變異的監控策略。
  3. 區分四大類雜質控制策略：Fouling（結垢）、Scaling（水垢）、Organics（有機物）、Microbial Growth（微生物生長）。
  4. 理解 Microbial Control Agent（微生物控制劑）的添加與移除時機，特別是 Chlorine（氯）與 Chloramine（氯胺）的差異。
  5. 說明 pH 在前處理中的重要性，以及 Carbon Dioxide / Ammonia 的移除策略。
  6. 掌握前處理系統的 Materials of Construction（建造材質）選擇原則與成本優化考量。

章節導覽 Section Navigator

4.1 Introduction 4.2 Process Design 4.3 Feedwater Testing 4.4 Output Water Quality 4.5 Control of Fouling 4.6 Control of Scaling 4.7 Removal of Organics 4.8 Microbial Growth Control 4.9 Removal of Microbial Control Agents 4.10 Anion Changes 4.11 Importance of pH 4.12 Materials of Construction 4.13 Pretreatment Summary
4.1

4.1 Introduction

前處理概論  |  p45

4.1 Introduction

Pretreatment is all process steps or unit operations prior to the last (final) water treatment step. Pretreatment is a series of unit operations to modify the feed water quality so that it will be of adequate quality to be fed to a final treatment step. This final step may be Reverse Osmosis, Ultrafiltration, Multi or Mixed Bed Deionization or Distillation. These final steps are discussed in Chapters 5 and 6.

Reverse Osmosis is unique since it can be a pretreatment step, in addition to being a final treatment step. Reverse Osmosis applications in pretreatment are discussed in this chapter and Chapter 11, but Reverse Osmosis as a technology is discussed in Chapters 5 and 6.

The initial sections of this chapter discuss the process design (programming issues) for pretreatment design including feed water quality and output water quality from pretreatment. The chapter then discusses the selection of treatment options (i.e. unit operations) for four groups of impurities:

  • Control of fouling — removal of turbidity and particulates
  • Control of scaling — removal of hardness and metals
  • Removal of organics and microbiological impurities
  • Removal of microbial control agents

Pre-treatment options are summarized in Figure 4-1 at the end of the chapter.

The final sections of the chapter discuss the importance of anion composition/concentration, pH, materials of construction, and pretreatment system control.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：Pretreatment（前處理）的定位

Pretreatment（前處理）是指在最終處理步驟「之前」的所有製程步驟。其目的是將進水（Feedwater）品質調整到足以餵入最終處理設備的水準。

最終處理步驟可能是：

  • Reverse Osmosis, RO（逆滲透）
  • Ultrafiltration, UF（超濾）
  • Deionization, DI（去離子）— 多床或混床式
  • Distillation（蒸餾）

前處理做得好，最終處理設備才能穩定運作；前處理做不好，最終處理就會頻繁故障、維護成本飆高。

日常比喻：前處理就像料理前的食材備料

做菜前要洗菜、去皮、切塊——這就是「前處理」。如果食材沒洗乾淨（水中雜質未去除），不管後面的烹調技術多好（最終處理設備多先進），成品都會出問題。前處理是決定水系統長期穩定性的關鍵環節。

重點提示：RO 的雙重角色

Reverse Osmosis（逆滲透）很特殊——它既可以是前處理步驟（例如在蒸餾前先用 RO 去除大部分離子），也可以是最終處理步驟（直接產出 Purified Water）。這種雙重角色在系統設計時需要特別注意其定位。

4.2

4.2 Process Design of Pretreatment

前處理製程設計  |  pp. 45–47

4.2 Process Design of Pretreatment

Process design of the pretreatment system is the specification of the unit operations or process steps to treat the feed water. Typical information includes flow rates, temperatures, pressure, and composition of all streams. Detailed mechanical design of the equipment for a given unit operation or process step is beyond the scope of this Guide.

The process design (programming issues) for a pretreatment system may include:

  1. Required quantity and quality of the water from the final treatment process.
  2. Temperature constraints on the water used in a pharmaceutical process and the approach to microbial control.
  3. The final treatment option that has been chosen, as this defines the required water quality leaving pretreatment.
  4. Quality of the feed water that is the input to the pretreatment system (water quality to be validated over a one year period).
  5. Difference between input water quality and desired output water quality. The difference determines impurities that must be removed by the pretreatment system. The difference is determined by performing a material balance. Attention should be paid to impurities and minor components.
  6. Pretreatment options to provide the desired removal of impurities considering other factors such as capabilities of the labor force, economics, waste disposal, environmental considerations, validation, and the available space and utilities.

In addition to defining the options for removal of impurities, the approach taken to microbial control is an integral part of the process design of the pretreatment system. Considerations include:

  1. If the drinking quality water to the pretreatment system comes from a municipality in the United States, it will typically contain chlorine, or chloramines, as a microbial control agent. In Europe, ozone is the more common microbial control agent.
  2. If the quantity of microbial control agent is insufficient, additional agent may be added or provision made to periodically sanitize the initial equipment in the pretreatment system.
  3. At some point in the pretreatment process, the microbial control agent must be removed before going to the final treatment. At this point, a means of either continuous or periodic sanitization needs to be selected.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：前處理製程設計的六大考量

前處理的設計不是隨便挑幾個設備串起來，而是一個系統性的工程決策過程。六大考量依序為：

  1. 最終產水的量與質 — 終點決定起點
  2. 溫度限制與微生物控制策略 — 冷系統 vs 熱系統
  3. 最終處理方式 — RO、蒸餾、DI 各有不同的進水要求
  4. 進水品質 — 需要經過一年驗證週期，掌握季節性變化
  5. Material Balance（物料平衡） — 進水品質與目標品質的差異，決定要移除哪些雜質
  6. 綜合考量 — 人力能力、經濟性、廢水處理、空間、公用設施等

重點提示：微生物控制劑的地區差異

  • 美國：市政水通常含 Chlorine（氯）或 Chloramine（氯胺）
  • 歐洲：較常使用 Ozone（臭氧）

這個差異直接影響前處理系統的設計——氯與氯胺的去除方法不同，對下游設備（特別是 RO 膜）的影響也不同。

日常比喻：微生物控制劑的角色

微生物控制劑就像游泳池裡的消毒氯——它能抑制細菌生長，保護前段設備不被微生物污染。但游泳池的水不能直接喝，同樣地，含氯的水不能直接進入最終處理設備。所以在某個時間點，必須把「消毒劑」移除，之後靠定期消毒來維持潔淨。

Added Substances in Pretreatment

The USP requirement that compendial waters should contain "no added substances" eliminates addition of chemicals to "Purified Water" or Water For Injection. However, addition of chemical agents is not prohibited in pretreatment. Substances are frequently added in pretreatment and subsequently removed in the pretreatment or final treatment. Some examples are:

  • Chlorine (to control microbial growth, removed in later stages of pretreatment)
  • Sodium ions (in softener with exchange for multivalent ions, removed in ion removal process)
  • Acid (for degasification to remove carbon dioxide, counter ions removed in a subsequent ion removal process)
  • Sulfite (to reduce chlorine to chloride, or chloramines to ammonium and chloride while forming sulfate, removal by softening or ion removal process)
  • Sequestrants (to prevent scaling in final treatment, removed by RO in final treatment)
  • pH control agents (removed in ion removal process)

Added substances are an issue if they result in an increase in microbial growth or endotoxins.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：「前處理可以加藥，最終產水不行」

USP 規定製藥用水（Purified Water 或 WFI）不得含有「外加物質」。但這不代表前處理過程中不能添加化學品——關鍵在於，所有添加的物質必須在前處理或最終處理中被完全移除。

常見的前處理添加物質及其移除路徑：

  • Chlorine（氯）→ 活性碳吸附或亞硫酸鈉還原
  • Sodium（鈉）→ 離子交換移除
  • Acid（酸）→ 脫氣後由離子交換移除殘餘離子
  • Sequestrants（螯合劑）→ RO 膜攔截

重點提示：添加物質的風險

前處理中的添加物質若導致微生物生長增加或 Endotoxin（內毒素）升高，就會成為問題。例如，亞硫酸鈉（Sodium Bisulfite）用來去除氯，但它同時移除了水中的微生物控制能力，可能導致管路內微生物快速繁殖。

Investment and Operating Cost Relationship

A final consideration is the relationship between investment and operating dollars in pretreatment, and the performance and cost of the final treatment process. The following are generally true:

  • A final treatment system will not operate reliably over the long term, without reliable operation of the pretreatment system.
  • Inadequate operation in pretreatment (breakthrough of particulates, hardness, or chlorine) may not immediately affect water quality from final treatment, but it will be reflected in long term maintenance and operating reliability, and possibly in water quality.
  • Investment in pretreatment capability and reliability can return many times the investment in final treatment maintenance costs.
  • Pharmaceutical water systems are expected to generate water meeting final pharmaceutical product water standards. The system should be designed to control impurity spikes in the incoming water quality, or seasonal impurity profile changes.

There is no single "right" answer to the process design of the pretreatment system. Pretreatment system process design is a series of choices and options, each with advantages and disadvantages.

中文解析 Commentary

重點提示：前處理投資的「槓桿效應」

ISPE 在這裡傳達了一個非常重要的經營概念：在前處理多投資一元，可以在最終處理省下數倍的維護費用。

  • 前處理失敗（如 Hardness Breakthrough 硬度穿透）不會立即影響產水品質，但會縮短 RO 膜壽命或加速蒸餾器結垢
  • 前處理設計必須能應對進水品質的尖峰波動（Impurity Spikes）和季節性變化
  • 沒有唯一正確答案——每個前處理設計都是一系列選擇的組合，各有優缺點

實務應用：前處理設計的經濟思維

在 CDMO 環境中，多條產品線共用同一套水系統。前處理若設計不夠 Robust（穩健），任何一次 Breakthrough 都可能導致：

  • RO 膜提前更換（每支膜成本數千美元）
  • 蒸餾器結垢停機（影響所有下游生產線）
  • 微生物超標導致批次放行延遲

因此，前處理系統的投資回報率（ROI）往往遠高於最終處理設備的升級。

4.3

4.3 Feedwater to Pretreatment Quality: Testing and Documentation

進水品質：測試與文件  |  pp. 47–48

4.3 Feedwater Quality: Testing and Documentation

Compendial pharmaceutical water systems are required to use feed water complying with "Drinking Water" standards.

Most pharmaceutical manufacturers utilize municipal water supplies. This water generally meets "Drinking Water" quality standards and is treated with a microbial control agent. Historically in the US, the microbial control agent is chlorine, but chloramine is now used with increasing frequency. Either feed water composition or microbial control agent concentration may be subject to occasional and seasonal variations. These variations may negatively impact water quality, and can be detected only by extensive sampling.

Typical contaminants in feed water include:

  • Particulates — Silt, dust, pollen, pipe scale, iron and silica, undissolved minerals and organics
  • Inorganics — Calcium and magnesium salts, heavy metals (iron, aluminum, and silica) with their corresponding anions
  • Organics — Naturally occurring byproducts of vegetative decay (humic and fulvic acids), man-made organics (pesticides, automotive pollution)
  • Bacteria — Bacterial contamination and its byproducts, endotoxins, and pyrogens

Testing recommendations include:

  • Documentation that feed water meets drinking water quality, based on municipality testing possibly supplemented by local or in-process testing.
  • Monitoring for microbial control agent levels at the start of the pretreatment system. A chlorine level of 0.2–1.0 ppm is generally considered adequate to control microbial growth.
  • Specific testing for contaminants known or suspected of being present in the feed water (e.g., pesticides in agricultural areas).

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：進水品質的四大污染物類型

類型常見污染物影響
Particulates（顆粒物）泥沙、花粉、鐵鏽、矽Fouling（堵塞）膜與設備
Inorganics（無機物）鈣鎂鹽、重金屬Scaling（結垢）
Organics（有機物）腐植酸、農藥TOC 超標、微生物營養源
Bacteria（微生物）細菌、Endotoxin（內毒素）微生物超標、Pyrogen（熱原）

重點提示：Chloramine 的趨勢轉變

美國市政水處理正從 Chlorine（氯）逐漸轉向 Chloramine（氯胺）。這對製藥水系統有重大影響，因為氯胺：

  • 在活性碳上的吸附速率遠低於氯，需要更長接觸時間
  • 分解後產生 Ammonia（氨），氨會穿透 RO 和蒸餾系統
  • 需要不同的碳床設計和更嚴格的監控

進水若含氯胺，系統設計的複雜度會顯著增加。

思考練習

Q1：為什麼 ISPE 建議進水品質需要「經過一年的驗證週期」？只測試一兩次不行嗎？

Q2：你的工廠位於農業區，夏季雨後自來水常出現渾濁。這屬於四大污染物中的哪一類？你會增加哪些測試項目？

4.4

4.4 Output Water from Pretreatment: Quality of Feedwater to Final Treatment

前處理產水品質  |  pp. 48–49

4.4 Output Water Quality to Final Treatment

The goals for pretreatment are to provide water quality that minimizes the operating and maintenance problems in the final treatment equipment and to permit the final treatment step to produce water meeting the desired specifications for final treatment.

If pretreatment is inadequate, resulting problems can become very large in magnitude, as seen in Table 4-1:

Final Treatment Fouling
(Particulates)		 Scaling
(Hardness)		 Degradation
(Chlorine)		 Corrosion
(Chlorides)
Reverse Osmosis Large Large Large* None
Other Membrane Processes Large-moderate Large-moderate Large* None
Single Effect Distillation Moderate Moderate Large Moderate-large
Multi-effect Distillation Large-moderate Large-moderate Large Moderate-large
Vapor Compression Distillation Moderate Moderate Large Small

*Membrane dependent  |  Table 4-1 from ISPE Vol.4

For Membranes: The concerns are fouling by suspended solids (particulates) and scaling (precipitating solids) as water is removed. A typical goal for control in pretreatment might be a silt density index (SDI) of 3–5 and hardness of <1 grain/gallon. Membranes tolerate chlorides but only some membranes tolerate chlorine.

For Distillation: The concerns are scale formation due to hardness and corrosion due to chlorides. Distillation has no tolerance for chlorine due to corrosion and carryover to the product. Distillation has some tolerance for particulates.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：Table 4-1 的決策意涵

這張表是整個前處理設計的風險矩陣——它告訴你：如果前處理沒有妥善處理某類雜質，最終處理設備會受到多大影響。

  • RO 系統最怕：顆粒物（Fouling）、硬度（Scaling）、氯（膜降解），但不怕氯化物
  • 蒸餾系統最怕：氯（腐蝕+帶入產品）、氯化物（腐蝕），對顆粒物耐受度較高

設計前處理時，先確定你的最終處理方式，然後對照這張表，找出最需要優先控制的雜質。

關鍵指標：SDI（Silt Density Index）

SDI（淤泥密度指數）是衡量水中微粒堵塞 RO 膜能力的標準測試方法。

  • 測試方法：在固定壓力下（30 psi），量測 0.45 μm 濾膜在特定時間內的通量衰減
  • 前處理目標值：SDI 3~5（RO 膜供應商通常要求 SDI < 5）
  • Hardness（硬度）目標：< 1 grain/gallon（約 17 ppm as CaCO3）

日常比喻：不同廚具怕不同東西

RO 膜像精密的濾布——最怕被硬物刺穿（顆粒堵塞）和化學腐蝕（氯）。蒸餾器像不鏽鋼鍋——最怕水垢結在加熱面（硬度）和鹽分腐蝕金屬（氯化物）。了解你的「廚具」怕什麼，就知道「備料」（前處理）要注意什麼。

4.5

4.5 Control of Fouling: Removal of Turbidity and Particulates

結垢控制：去除濁度與顆粒物  |  p49

4.5 Control of Fouling

The principal methods for removing particulates and reducing turbidity are:

  • Clarification and the accompanying operations of flocculation, coagulation, and sedimentation
  • Depth or Media filtration including single and multimedia filtration (particles retained by the media)

Clarification is not applicable, as feed water sources are potable quality or better.

Depth or media filtration is used in pharmaceutical water systems and is often the first step in a pretreatment system. Multi-sized sand is the most common media, but other media may provide better performance with some feed waters. Removal of particulates down to 10 microns is possible and depends on selection of media.

Microbial growth is a key concern in a media filter, unless the feed water contains a microbial control agent. Otherwise, microbial control in the depth filter is required (e.g., periodic sanitization using either heat or a chemical sanitizing agent).

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：Fouling Control（防堵控制）

Fouling（堵塞/結垢）是指顆粒物沉積在膜面或設備表面，導致效能下降。控制方法：

  • Clarification（澄清）：包括 Flocculation（絮凝）、Coagulation（混凝）、Sedimentation（沉降）——但因為製藥用的進水已經是飲用水等級，通常不需要這一步
  • Depth/Media Filtration（深層/介質過濾）：最常用的第一步，多層砂過濾器可去除 10 微米以上的顆粒

重點提示：介質過濾器的微生物風險

介質過濾器（Media Filter）是微生物滋生的溫床——濾料表面積大、水流緩慢、營養物質被截留。如果進水不含微生物控制劑（如氯），必須定期消毒（熱消毒或化學消毒），否則過濾器反而會成為微生物的「培養皿」。

這是一個非常重要的設計考量：防止顆粒物堵塞的同時，不能忽略微生物控制。

思考練習

Q：你的前處理系統中，介質過濾器位於活性碳床之後（氯已被去除）。這種配置可能帶來什麼風險？你會如何處理？

4.6

4.6 Control of Scaling: Removal of Hardness and Metals

水垢控制：去除硬度與金屬  |  pp. 49–51

4.6 Control of Scaling

When water is separated from its impurities in the final treatment process, those compounds with low solubility are concentrated to the point where they precipitate. This precipitation, or scaling, is the result of exceeding the solubility of the divalent and trivalent cations, usually as a sparingly soluble salt such as carbonate or sulfate. The methods of control are:

  • Removal by ion exchange — principally calcium and magnesium, may include divalent and trivalent ions such as iron, aluminum and silica. Pretreatment is usually water softening (exchanging the ions causing hardness for sodium ions).
  • Removal of carbonate by acidification — converts carbonate to carbon dioxide, which is removed by subsequent degasification.
  • Removal by nanofiltration — water passes through the membrane and compounds are retained by the membrane and removed as a purge stream.

Water softening ion exchange is a very common process used in pretreatment. It is applicable for all flow rates and hardness levels, well understood and easy to operate. It involves the handling of salt only, and produces a non-hazardous waste stream. However, the high total dissolved solids (TDS) in the waste stream may limit disposal options.

For large flow rates (>50 gpm or 0.18 m3/min) and high hardness (>50 ppm), degasification (after acidification) may be the process of choice.

Nanofiltration is a membrane process that may be applicable with certain feed waters. Removal of divalent ions can be greater than 98%.

Chemical injection (sequestrants) is an alternate method to control scaling. These compounds "tie up and complex" the offending ions to form a more soluble compound that will not precipitate in the final treatment process.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：四種去除 Scaling 的方法

方法原理適用場景
Water Softening（軟化）離子交換：Ca/Mg → Na所有流量與硬度，最常用
Acidification + Degasification（酸化+脫氣）碳酸鹽→CO2→排氣大流量(>50 gpm)、高硬度(>50 ppm)
Nanofiltration（奈米過濾）膜分離，去除>98%二價離子特殊水質
Chemical Injection（加藥）Sequestrant 螯合劑複合離子無法用上述方法時的替代方案

日常比喻：水垢就像水壺裡的白色沉澱

家裡燒開水常看到壺底白色結垢——那就是 Calcium Carbonate（碳酸鈣）。在工業水系統中，這些沉澱物會堵塞 RO 膜或覆蓋蒸餾器加熱面，嚴重影響效能。軟化器的作用就像「水質柔順劑」，把導致結垢的鈣鎂離子換成不會結垢的鈉離子。

Softener Location: A Key Design Choice

A key choice in the process design of the pretreatment system is location of the softener. The two options are either before or after removal of the microbial control agent (often chlorine).

Softener located prior to removal of microbial control agent: The principal advantage is protection of the softener from microbial growth by the microbial control agent present in the feed water. If the microbial control agent is chlorine, it will have only a minor effect on resin life and efficiency at levels typically encountered (<1 ppm).

Softener located after removal of microbial control agent: The advantage is better resin life and capacity (due to absence of chlorine). However, this must be balanced by the need to protect the softener from microbial growth and endotoxin load (i.e., by periodic sanitization with the associated cost of heat or chemicals, labor, down time, and waste stream disposal).

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：軟化器位置的兩難選擇

位置優點缺點
氯去除前（推薦） 氯保護樹脂免於微生物生長 氯對樹脂有輕微影響（通常可接受）
氯去除後 樹脂壽命更長、交換容量更高 必須定期消毒防止微生物生長（成本增加）

大多數情況下，將軟化器放在「氯去除前」是較佳選擇——犧牲一點點樹脂壽命，換來持續的微生物保護，整體成本更低。

重點提示：設備位置決定微生物風險

前處理系統中，每個設備的相對位置都會影響微生物控制策略。在微生物控制劑（如氯）被移除之後的所有設備，都需要額外的微生物控制措施（定期消毒、UV 處理等）。這是前處理設計中最需要系統性思考的部分。

4.7

4.7 Removal of Organics

有機物去除  |  pp. 50–51

4.7 Removal of Organics

The methods for removal of organics are:

  • Ozone
  • Strong Base Ion Exchange
  • Barrier filtration (microfiltration, ultrafiltration or Reverse Osmosis)
  • Polymer Flocculant
  • Carbon

Ozone is a powerful oxidant that controls microbial growth and reduces the concentration of organics due to oxidation, but requires compatible materials of construction.

Strong base ion exchange removes organics but results in a purge stream containing high concentrations of brine and organics.

Barrier filtration, when appropriately sized, captures organics and microbial growth on the barrier and can be aided by addition of a polymer flocculant. A potential problem is microbial growth "growing through the barrier" which results in contamination on the downstream side.

Carbon is probably the most common method of reducing organics. It provides multiple functions, including removal of organics as well as removal or reduction of chlorine and chloramines. The advantages are that it is a frequently practiced technology, it performs multiple functions, and effectively "cleans up the feed water". The disadvantage is that it is a source of microbial growth, as well as a source of nutrients.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：五種有機物去除方法比較

方法機制優點缺點
Ozone（臭氧）氧化分解同時控制微生物需相容材質
Strong Base IX離子交換有效去除高鹽度廢水
Barrier Filtration物理攔截同時去除微生物微生物可能穿透
Polymer Flocculant絮凝沉降輔助過濾添加化學品
Carbon（活性碳）吸附多功能、常用微生物溫床

重點提示：活性碳的雙面刃

Activated Carbon（活性碳）是前處理中最常用的「多功能選手」：去除有機物 + 去除氯/氯胺。但它最大的問題是自身就是微生物的理想培養基——巨大的表面積、被吸附的有機物成為營養源。

因此，活性碳床必須配合：

  • 定期熱消毒或化學消毒
  • 嚴格的微生物監控
  • 合理的更換/再生週期

日常比喻：活性碳像冰箱的除臭劑

活性碳就像冰箱裡的竹炭除臭包——它能吸附異味（有機物），但用久了之後，除臭包本身也會發霉（微生物生長）。定期更換或消毒是必要的。

4.8

4.8 System Design for Control of Microbial Growth

微生物生長控制  |  pp. 51–52

4.8 Control of Microbial Growth

The methods used in pretreatment to control microbial growth are:

  • Microbial control agent such as chlorine or chloramine
  • Periodic sanitization (heat or chemical)
  • Ultraviolet light
  • Avoiding dead legs and avoiding water stagnation

A common strategy in the design of the pretreatment system is to leave the microbial control agent provided by the municipality in the water through as many pretreatment steps as possible, in order to protect these steps from microbial growth.

However, at some point the microbial control agent (chlorine or chloramine) must be removed since it is not compatible with the final treatment processes. At this point, the only option is periodic sanitization, either with heat or a chemical disinfectant. This must be included in the design of the pretreatment system, along with the provisions for validation and monitoring its effectiveness via sampling and testing.

Ultraviolet light (UV) is effective in inhibiting microbial growth but is only effective when the light is present. UV light is often used before a unit operation to minimize the microbial growth in the unit operation by controlling the microbial counts in the feed water. The most common places for use of UV light are before Reverse Osmosis units and some filters.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：微生物控制的四層防線

  1. Microbial Control Agent（微生物控制劑）：氯或氯胺，來自市政水處理，盡量保留到前處理後段
  2. Periodic Sanitization（定期消毒）：控制劑移除後的主要手段，可用熱水（>80°C）或化學消毒劑
  3. UV Light（紫外線）：即時抑制微生物，常設在 RO 進水前
  4. Design Practices（設計實務）：避免 Dead Legs（死水區）和水滯留

重點提示：氯的「保護傘」策略

ISPE 的建議非常明確：盡量讓市政水中的氯保留到前處理的最後階段。這意味著：

  • 活性碳床（去除氯的位置）應盡量放在前處理的後段
  • 活性碳床之前的設備（如軟化器、介質過濾器）都受到氯的保護
  • 活性碳床之後的設備必須有獨立的微生物控制措施

這個「保護傘」概念是前處理系統設計的核心哲學之一。

實務應用：UV 的正確使用位置

UV 只在光照存在時有效——它不像氯有「殘餘保護力」。因此 UV 的最佳使用位置是：

  • RO 進水前：降低微生物計數，保護 RO 膜
  • 儲存槽前：防止微生物進入儲存階段
  • 關鍵過濾器前：保護過濾器不成為微生物培養基

UV 是「點防禦」而非「區域防禦」——不能取代系統性的消毒策略。

4.9

4.9 Removal of Microbial Control Agents

微生物控制劑的去除  |  pp. 52–53

4.9 Removal of Microbial Control Agents

At some point in pretreatment, microbial control agents must be removed because of their detrimental effect on final treatment equipment and performance. Chlorine causes deterioration of most Reverse Osmosis membranes and is corrosive in distillation. Chloramines can pass through pretreatment and decompose in the distillation process with an adverse effect on water quality.

For chlorine removal, activated carbon is a straightforward process for the absorption of chlorine. The carbon will reduce some of the chlorine to chloride ion, which is then removed in the final treatment ion removal process. Sulfite reduction is also straightforward, with sulfite being oxidized to sulfate and chlorine being reduced to chloride ion.

For chloramine removal, this is more complex. Chloramine adsorption on carbon occurs at a much slower rate than chlorine, necessitating longer contact times and lower hydraulic flow rates. The potential for dissociation of the absorbed chloramines into ammonium ion and ammonia is a problem.

  • Ammonium is removed by Reverse Osmosis but decomposes to ammonia in a distillation process.
  • Ammonia passes through both Reverse Osmosis and distillation processes in final treatment.

Sulfite reduction for chloramines results in ammonium and chloride ions. These can be removed by Reverse Osmosis. The ammonium ion partially decomposes to ammonia in higher temperature distillation, resulting in carryover and affect on water quality.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：Chlorine vs Chloramine 去除的差異

特性Chlorine（氯）Chloramine（氯胺）
碳吸附速率快速緩慢（需更長接觸時間）
碳床設計標準 EBCT需加大碳床、降低流速
副產物Chloride（氯離子）Ammonium + Chloride
Ammonia 問題無氨會穿透 RO 和蒸餾
亞硫酸鈉還原簡單有效產生 Ammonium，需後續處理

重點提示：Ammonia 是氯胺系統的最大挑戰

Ammonia（氨）是氯胺分解後的產物，也是製藥水系統中最難處理的物質之一：

  • 氨在鹼性條件下為分子態（NH3），可穿透 RO 膜和蒸餾系統
  • 氨在酸性條件下為離子態（NH4+），可被 RO 去除
  • 但在蒸餾的高溫環境中，Ammonium 會部分轉化為 Ammonia，導致 Carryover（帶出）

如果你的進水含氯胺，系統設計必須額外考慮氨的控制策略。

思考練習

Q1：你的工廠所在城市剛從 Chlorine 消毒改為 Chloramine 消毒。你的前處理系統需要做哪些調整？

Q2：為什麼含氯胺的進水搭配蒸餾（Distillation）作為最終處理時，比搭配 RO 更具挑戰性？

4.10

4.10 Changes in Anion Composition / Concentration

陰離子組成變化  |  pp. 52–53

4.10 Changes in Anion Composition

Pretreatment systems typically remove non-ionic impurities and cations. Thus, any change in anionic composition or concentration is usually secondary. However, some distillation processes in final treatment are affected by chlorides, which can be removed by an RO prior to the final treatment step.

The pretreatment processes that affect anionic composition are:

  • Deionization
  • Degasification
  • Carbon bed filtration for removal of chlorine and chloramine
  • Reduction to remove chlorine and chloramine
  • Barrier filtration (nanofiltration, ultrafiltration and Reverse Osmosis)

Degasification and the accompanying process of acidification changes anionic composition. The water is acidified with a non-volatile acid (usually sulfuric) to convert carbonate and bicarbonate to dissolved CO2, which is removed by degasification. The net effect is replacement of bicarbonate and carbonate with sulfate.

Carbon bed filtration adsorbs chlorine and chloramines from feed water. However, some of the chlorine is reduced to chloride and is removed in a subsequent ion removal process.

The removal of chlorine and chloramines by reduction, often with bisulfite, changes ionic composition as the bisulfite is oxidized to sulfate and the chlorine or chloramines are reduced to chloride and ammonium.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：前處理如何改變陰離子組成

前處理主要針對非離子性雜質和陽離子（如 Ca2+、Mg2+），但某些前處理步驟會間接改變陰離子組成：

  • 酸化 + 脫氣：碳酸鹽/碳酸氫鹽 → 硫酸鹽（因為加的是硫酸）
  • 碳床去氯：氯 → 氯離子（Cl-）
  • 亞硫酸鈉還原：亞硫酸鈉 → 硫酸鹽（SO42-），氯 → 氯離子

這些陰離子的變化通常在最終處理（RO 或離子交換）中被去除，但設計師需要了解這些變化以進行正確的物料平衡計算。

重點提示：氯離子對蒸餾系統的威脅

如果最終處理使用蒸餾，前處理中產生的氯離子（Chloride）是一個重要考量。氯離子在蒸餾的高溫環境下會造成不鏽鋼的點蝕（Pitting Corrosion）和應力腐蝕裂紋（Stress Corrosion Cracking）。這時候可能需要在蒸餾前加一道 RO 來降低氯離子濃度。

4.11

4.11 The Importance of pH in Pretreatment

pH 在前處理中的重要性  |  pp. 53–54

4.11 The Importance of pH

EPA drinking water standards require a pH range of 6.5–8.5. In reality, the pH range of most drinking feed water is narrower, due to the corrosive nature of acidic water and the scaling potential of alkaline waters.

The pH of the feed water and its seasonal variations need to be known because of its impact on pretreatment and final treatment process design. The pH determines the form of the carbon dioxide, its scaling potential and where carbon dioxide (carbonate) is removed.

A complicating factor in pretreatment design is the potential presence of ammonia as a result of chloramine presence in the feed water. Ammonia is a dissolved gas at the pH values where carbon dioxide is an ion (carbonate), and exists as an ion (ammonium) at pH values where carbon dioxide exists as a dissolved gas.

Thus it is not possible to remove both carbon dioxide and ammonia at one pH. If both are present, two pH adjustment steps are required:

  • pH adjustment followed by removal of either carbon dioxide or ammonia
  • A change in pH to remove the other compound

These operations may be part of pretreatment or final treatment.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：pH 如何影響 CO2 和 NH3 的存在形態

pH 決定了水中 Carbon Dioxide（二氧化碳）和 Ammonia（氨）的化學形態：

pH 範圍CO2 形態NH3 形態去除方式
酸性（<6）溶解氣體（CO2）→ 可脫氣離子態（NH4+）→ 可被 RO 去除脫氣去 CO2
鹼性（>9）離子態（CO32-）→ 可被 RO 去除溶解氣體（NH3）→ 穿透 RORO 去碳酸鹽

問題在於：沒有一個 pH 值能同時讓 CO2 和 NH3 都變成可被輕鬆去除的形態。如果兩者同時存在，必須分兩步進行 pH 調整和去除。

化學平衡：CO2 / NH3 的 pH 依賴性

Carbon Dioxide System:
CO2 (gas) ↔ H2CO3 ↔ HCO3⁻ ↔ CO3²⁻
  pH < 4.3    pH 4.3-8.3    pH > 8.3

Ammonia System:
NH4⁺ (ion) ↔ NH3 (gas)
  pH < 9.3      pH > 9.3

Key conflict: CO2 removal needs LOW pH
              NH3 removal needs LOW pH (as NH4⁺ for RO)
              BUT CO2 is ionic at HIGH pH
              → Cannot remove both at same pH!

日常比喻：pH 就像溫度調節

想像你需要同時保存巧克力（需冷藏）和麵包（需室溫）——不能用同一個溫度滿足兩者。CO2 和 NH3 就是這樣：它們在 pH「溫度」上的最佳去除條件互相矛盾，所以需要分兩步處理。

4.12

4.12 Materials of Construction and Construction Practices

建造材質與施工實務  |  pp. 53–54

4.12 Materials of Construction

Piping to the pretreatment system may be copper, galvanized steel, or a suitable thermoplastic. Piping in the pretreatment system, where high temperatures are not encountered, is usually plastic (PVC, CPVC, polypropylene, or other material) based upon cost and corrosion resistance. Leaching from some plastics such as PVC and CPVC may make these materials undesirable to the user. Vessels may be fiberglass, lined carbon steel, or stainless steel.

The piping and equipment in a portion of the pretreatment system may encounter high temperature (periodic heat sanitization) or high pressure (RO plus degasification). In these portions, piping is typically stainless steel or a plastic that can be heat sanitized, such as PVDF. Equipment designed for high pressure may be carbon steel, lined carbon steel, or stainless steel. Mill finish is satisfactory; electropolishing is unnecessary.

The cost of sanitary construction practices such as orbital welding and sanitary fittings may not be warranted in the pretreatment system. Use of plastic pipe that is solvent cemented or heat fused, stainless steel pipe that is welded or flanged with mill finish, or tubing with compression fittings is common.

Ball or diaphragm valves predominate for flow diversion, with globe and needle valves for flow control. Selecting the minimum cost piping components that will not degrade water quality is an area for major cost savings.

Sample points should be provided upstream and downstream of each piece of equipment for monitoring and troubleshooting. Points for field measurement of pressure and temperature are also useful.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：前處理材質選擇原則

區域建議材質考量因素
常溫區域PVC、CPVC、PP成本低、耐腐蝕
需熱消毒區域Stainless Steel、PVDF耐高溫
高壓區域（RO）Carbon Steel、SS耐壓
容器FRP、Lined CS、SS化學相容性

重點提示：前處理不需要「過度設計」

ISPE 在這裡明確指出：前處理系統不需要分配系統等級的施工規格：

  • 不需要 Electropolishing（電拋光）——Mill Finish（研磨面）即可
  • 不需要 Orbital Welding（自動軌道焊接）——一般焊接或法蘭連接即可
  • 不需要 Sanitary Fittings（衛生級接頭）——壓縮接頭或溶劑接合即可

這是重要的成本優化機會。許多工廠錯誤地在前處理系統使用與分配系統相同的高規格材質和施工方式，造成不必要的成本增加。

實務應用：Good Engineering Practice 的具體體現

正確的做法是根據每個區段的實際需求選擇材質：

  • 進水管路到軟化器：PVC 管路 + 溶劑接合（成本最低）
  • 活性碳床到 RO 之間：如果需要熱消毒，改用 PVDF 或 SS
  • 每個設備上下游：設置取樣點和壓力/溫度量測點（用於監控與故障排除）

原則：選擇不會劣化水質的最低成本材質。

4.13

4.13 Pretreatment Summary

前處理總結  |  pp. 54–55

4.13 Pretreatment Summary

The philosophy of control selected for pretreatment can have a major impact on both investment and continuing operating cost. Reliable operation and control of pretreatment can significantly reduce operating and maintenance costs in final treatment. The important process steps in pretreatment are:

  • Removal of turbidity and particulates to minimize membrane and equipment fouling
  • Removal of hardness and metals to prevent scale formation in final treatment
  • Removal of organics and microbiological impurities
  • Control of microbial growth and removal of microbial control agents to prevent degradation of final treatment

These process steps are important because of their immediate effect on water quality from final treatment or their long-term effect on final treatment equipment performance and hence, their indirect effect on water quality from final treatment.

Pretreatment, like other parts of the water treatment system, should be subject to Good Engineering Practices. Validation of pretreatment, as a component of the water treatment system, is required as part of the entire water treatment system validation and should include microbiological monitoring.

中文解析 Commentary

核心概念：前處理的四大任務總結

  1. 去除 Turbidity / Particulates（濁度/顆粒物）→ 防止 Fouling（堵塞）
  2. 去除 Hardness / Metals（硬度/金屬）→ 防止 Scaling（結垢）
  3. 去除 Organics / Microbiological Impurities（有機物/微生物）→ 維護水質
  4. 控制 Microbial Growth + 去除 Microbial Control Agents（微生物控制）→ 保護最終處理設備

前處理的效果分為兩類：

  • 直接效果：即時影響最終產水品質
  • 間接效果：長期影響最終處理設備的效能和壽命

重點提示：GEP 與驗證要求

前處理系統需遵循 Good Engineering Practices（良好工程實務），而非 GMP 等級的嚴格要求。但前處理的驗證（Validation）是整個水系統驗證的一部分，必須包含微生物監控。

這代表：前處理設計可以用較低成本的材質和施工方式，但其效能驗證和持續監控不能馬虎。

本章摘要 Chapter 4 Summary

  • 前處理定位：Pretreatment 是最終處理前的所有製程步驟，目的是將進水品質調整到最終處理設備可接受的水準。前處理的穩定性直接決定最終處理的運作可靠度和維護成本。
  • 進水品質：製藥水系統必須使用符合 Drinking Water 標準的進水。進水品質需經過至少一年的監控，掌握季節性變異。四大污染物類型：Particulates、Inorganics、Organics、Bacteria。
  • 四大前處理任務：(1) Fouling 控制——介質過濾去除顆粒物；(2) Scaling 控制——軟化器去除硬度；(3) Organics 去除——活性碳吸附；(4) 微生物控制——保留氯的「保護傘」+ 定期消毒 + UV。
  • Chlorine vs Chloramine：氯胺的去除比氯更複雜，副產物 Ammonia 會穿透 RO 和蒸餾系統。進水含氯胺時，系統設計複雜度顯著增加。
  • pH 的關鍵角色：pH 決定 CO2 和 NH3 的化學形態，影響去除策略。兩者無法在同一 pH 下同時被最佳去除，需分步處理。
  • 材質與成本：前處理不需要分配系統等級的材質和施工規格。Electropolishing、Orbital Welding、Sanitary Fittings 在前處理中通常不必要。選擇「不劣化水質的最低成本材質」是重要的成本優化策略。
  • 驗證要求：前處理遵循 GEP（非 GMP），但作為水系統一部分，其驗證（含微生物監控）是必要的。

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems

Chapter 4: Pretreatment Options | Pages 43–55

SterileGMP Knowledge Hub — Bilingual Educational Reference

5

Chapter 5: Final Treatment: Purified Water

終端處理：純化水 | p57-p73

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems | p57-p73

Learning Objectives / 學習目標

  1. 瞭解離子交換（IX）、連續電去離子（CEDI）、逆滲透（RO）三大最終處理技術的原理與差異
  2. 掌握超濾（UF）、微濾（MF）、紫外線（UV）等拋光技術在純化水系統中的角色
  3. 理解各技術的優缺點、消毒方式、前處理需求，以及成本考量
  4. 能根據水質需求，選擇合適的最終處理系統組態（IX vs. 膜系統 vs. 蒸餾）
  5. 認識從離子交換主導到膜基系統主導的產業趨勢及其驅動因素

Section Navigation / 章節導覽

5.1 Introduction 5.2 Ion Exchange (IX) 5.3 CEDI 5.4 Reverse Osmosis 5.5.1 Ultrafiltration 5.5.2 Microfiltration 5.5.3 UV Light Table 5-4 Comparison
Original Text

5.1 Introduction

This chapter discusses the final treatment technologies and basic system configurations related to the manufacturing process of USP Purified Water and non-compendial water.

Various system configurations are presented, and reflect a significant shift from ion exchange based systems to membrane based systems. Equipment and system materials, surface finish and other design factors are discussed to promote the use of Good Engineering Practice for proper selection of components, piping, instrumentation, and controls.

USP Purified Water and non-compendial water can be produced by an almost unlimited combination of unit processes in various configurations. The most common pretreatment and final treatment technologies used in purified water production are shown in Figure 5-1, Figure 5-2, and Table 5-4 at the end of the chapter.

Ion exchange based systems were the dominant systems for decades in purified water production and are still successfully utilized in facilities today. The last decade has seen the growth of reverse osmosis membrane based systems increase to the point where over 90% of new systems employ primary reverse osmosis, with final polishing by continuous electrodeionization, ion exchange, or a second reverse osmosis stage.

Membrane based systems usage has increased due to chemical consumption reduction, contaminant rejection (ionized solids, organics, colloids, microbes, endotoxins, and suspended solids), reduced maintenance, consistent operation, and effective lifecycle cost.

Many material selections are made erroneously to conform to cGMP requirements that do not actually dictate the details of construction for most final treatment components. Good Engineering Practice should be employed to optimize the system for consistent operation to specifications and lifecycle cost optimization.

Commentary / 教學解析

導論重點

產業趨勢轉變

這一章最重要的資訊之一：超過 90% 的新系統已採用逆滲透（RO）為主要處理技術，搭配 CEDI、IX 或第二段 RO 進行拋光。離子交換不再是主流首選。

膜基系統為何崛起？

  • 減少化學品使用 — 不需酸鹼再生
  • 多元汙染物去除 — 離子、有機物、膠體、微生物、內毒素
  • 維護成本降低 — 操作更穩定
  • 生命週期成本更佳

比喻：GEP vs. 過度設計

就像買車不需要每個零件都用賽車規格一樣，水系統也不是每個元件都要用到最高等級的表面處理（如電拋光）。ISPE 強調 Good Engineering Practice：根據每個元件的功能、位置、微生物控制需求來選擇「足夠好」的規格，而不是盲目追求最高標準。

Compendial vs. Non-Compendial

本章不刻意區分藥典水（如 USP PW）與非藥典水（製程用水等）。實務上，非藥典水的製造與驗證方式通常與藥典水一致。

Original Text

5.2 Ion Exchange (IX)

5.2.1 Description

Cation and anion exchange resins are regenerated with acid and caustic solutions, respectively. As water passes through the ion exchange bed, the exchange of ions in the water stream for the hydrogen and hydroxide ions, held by the resin, occurs readily and is driven by concentration. Thus, the regeneration process is driven by excess chemical concentrations.

A two-bed ion exchange system includes both cation and anion resin tanks. Two-bed ion exchange systems often function as the workhorse of a strictly deionization (DI) water system in terms of salt removal. Mixed-bed ion exchange systems are typically used as a secondary or "polishing" system.

Ion exchange resins are available in on-site and off-site regenerable systems. On-site regeneration requires chemical handling and disposal, but allows for internal process control and microbial control. Off-site regeneration can be accomplished through new resin to be used one time, or through repeated regeneration of the existing resin.

5.2.2 Application

The major purpose of ion exchange equipment in USP purified water systems is to satisfy the conductivity requirements of the USP. Deionization (DI) systems are often used alone or in conjunction with reverse osmosis to produce USP Purified Water. Typical ion exchange systems do not effectively remove other contaminants noted in the USP purified water specification.

5.2.3 Pretreatment Requirements

Ion exchange systems require pretreatment to remove undissolved solids from the water stream and to avoid resin fouling or degradation. Although dechlorination is also recommended to avoid resin degradation by oxidation, the low levels of chlorine commonly found in most potable water supplies normally demonstrate only long-term effects on most ion exchange resins.

5.2.5 Advantages and Disadvantages

Advantages:

  • Simple design and maintenance
  • Flexible in water flow production
  • Good upset recovery
  • Low capital cost for single train DI systems
  • Removes ionizable substances (ammonia, carbon dioxide, and some organics)

Disadvantages:

  • High cost of operations on high TDS in-feed-water
  • Requires chemical handling for on-site regenerable DI (safety and environmental issues)
  • Full on-site DI system can take significantly more floor space
  • Off-site DI systems will require outside service and significant costs for regeneration services
  • Off-site regeneration involves loss of control over the use, handling, and care of DI vessels
  • DI vessels are excellent places for microbial growth to occur between regenerations

5.2.6 Sanitization

All ion exchange resins can be sanitized chemically with various agents. Chemical cleaners include peracetic acid, sodium hypochlorite, and others. Some resins are capable of hot water sanitizations at temperatures between 65°C to 85°C. Ion exchange resins suitable for limited thermal sanitizations include: strong acid cation resin, and standard polystyrene cross-linked with divinylbenzene Type 1 strong base resin.

Commentary / 教學解析

離子交換（IX）解析

IX 核心原理

離子交換的基本概念很簡單：

  • 陽離子樹脂：用酸（H+）再生 → 將水中的 Na+、Ca2+ 等替換為 H+
  • 陰離子樹脂：用鹼（OH-）再生 → 將水中的 Cl-、SO42- 等替換為 OH-
  • H+ + OH- = H2O → 產出純水

Two-Bed vs. Mixed-Bed

  • Two-Bed（雙床式）：陽、陰樹脂分別在不同槽中，為系統「主力」
  • Mixed-Bed（混床式）：陽、陰樹脂混合在同一槽中，做為「拋光」步驟，可達到更高純度

On-Site vs. Off-Site 再生

項目廠內再生（On-Site）廠外再生（Off-Site）
化學品需酸鹼儲存與處理不需
微生物控制可自行管控由外部服務商處理
資本成本高（需再生設備）低
操作成本較低較高（服務費）
品質控制完全掌控依賴供應商

IX 最大隱患：微生物滋長

DI 樹脂槽在再生之間是微生物生長的絕佳場所。這是離子交換系統最關鍵的劣勢之一，也是膜系統逐漸取代 IX 的重要原因。

比喻：離子交換像自助洗衣機

樹脂就像洗衣機的濾網，會「吸附」水中的離子雜質。用了一段時間需要「再生」（就像清洗濾網），可以自己洗（on-site）或送外面洗（off-site）。但濾網放太久不清洗，就會長黴菌 — 這就是 IX 的微生物風險。

消毒方式選擇

化學消毒（過氧乙酸、次氯酸鈉）適用所有樹脂；熱水消毒（65-85°C）僅適用於特定類型。選購樹脂時需確認耐熱規格。

Table 5-1: Comparison for Ion Exchange Unit Operations

ParameterOff-Site RegeneratedOn-Site Regenerated
Chemical UseN/AExtensive
Sanitization MethodChange Out or Hot WaterRegenerate
Capital CostMinimalExtensive
Water ConsumptionNoneMedium
Energy ConsumptionMinimalMinimal
Maintenance RequirementsMinimalMedium
Outside Service UsedExtensiveLow
ReliabilityGood*Good
Upset RecoveryGood, ReplaceGood

*Note: Having the DI bottles regenerated by an outside service does not relieve the manufacturer of the responsibility to have quality control of their ion exchange system.

Table 5-2: Limits of Operation and Expected Performance

ParameterSpecification
Total Suspended SolidsFiltration of 10 micron is recommended
Chlorine ToleranceVaries with resin type, generally 0.5 ppm; some up to 1 ppm
TDS< 200 ppm (higher possible but costly)
TemperatureCation up to 121°C; Anion 40-70°C; some up to 100°C
ConductivityBelow 1.0 μS/cm achievable
Feed TOCFouling varies with resin type
Product TOCMay increase or decrease depending on resin and feed water

表格解讀

廠外再生的品質責任

Table 5-1 的註腳非常重要：即使採用廠外再生服務，藥廠仍必須對 DI 系統的品質負責。不能因為外包就放棄品質管控。這是 GMP 的基本精神。

操作參數重點

  • TDS < 200 ppm：超過此值操作成本急遽上升（頻繁再生）
  • 電導度 < 1.0 μS/cm：可達到 USP Stage 1 要求
  • TOC 表現不穩定：IX 可能增加或減少 TOC，取決於樹脂類型與進水水質 — 這是一個常被忽略的風險

決策關鍵：進水 TDS 決定技術選擇

如果原水 TDS 高（> 200 ppm），純 IX 系統的操作成本會非常高。此時在 IX 前加一段 RO 可大幅降低 IX 負荷和再生頻率，或者直接改用 RO + CEDI 組態。

Original Text

5.3 Continuous Electrodeionization (CEDI)

5.3.1 Description

Electrodeionization removes ionized or ionizable species from water using electrically active media and an electrical potential to effect ion transport. It is distinguished from electrodialysis by the use of electrically active media, and from other ion exchange processes by the use of an electrical potential.

The continuous electrodeionization (CEDI) process is continuous rather than batch or intermittent. CEDI devices typically comprise semi-permeable ion exchange membranes, permanently charged media, and a DC electrical field.

A CEDI cell has alternating ion depleting (purifying) and ion concentrating cells. Water is purified through ion transfer: ionized species are drawn from the purifying cells into the concentrate stream.

The water purified in CEDI units passes only through the electrically charged ion exchange media, and not through the ion exchange membranes. The membranes are permeable to ionized species, but not to water.

As the ionic strength of the purified water decreases, high voltage gradient at the water-ion exchange media interfaces causes water decomposition to H+ and OH-. These ions continuously regenerate the ion exchange media — allowing production of 1 to 18 MΩ-cm quality water.

5.3.2 Application

CEDI units may be utilized downstream of RO units for USP Purified Water or non-compendial water production. For USP WFI water, CEDI units are utilized upstream of RO units.

5.3.3 Limitations

CEDI cannot remove all contaminants; the principal mechanism is for ionized or ionizable species. A concentrate stream is always required. Most CEDI units operate between 10-40°C (50-104°F).

5.3.5 Performance

Ionized solids reduction is generally greater than 99%, allowing 1-18 MΩ-cm quality water from RO feed. Organic rejection varies from 50% to 95%. UV light (185 nm) upstream can substantially increase organic rejection. CO2 is converted to bicarbonate and removed. Silica removal: 80-95%.

5.3.7 Advantages and Disadvantages

Advantages:

  • Attainment of Stage 1 conductivity
  • Elimination of chemical handling
  • Elimination of outside service (off-site regenerated resin)
  • Electric field provides some bacterial control
  • Removal of ionizable substances (CO2, ammonia, some organics)

Disadvantages:

  • Does not remove non-ionic contaminants
  • Unique designs for each manufacturer (modules not interchangeable)
  • May require UV, sub-micron filtration, or RO for further bacterial reduction
  • May require RO pretreatment
  • Rinse up after chemical sanitization may take hours to reach peak resistivity and TOC

5.3.8 Sanitization

CEDI units are typically chemically sanitized with agents including: peracetic acid, sodium percarbonate, sodium hydroxide, hydrogen peroxide, and others.

Commentary / 教學解析

連續電去離子（CEDI）解析

CEDI 運作原理（簡化版）

  1. 水通過充填離子交換樹脂的「淨化室」
  2. 直流電場將離子從淨化室拉向「濃縮室」
  3. 離子穿過離子交換膜進入濃縮室，隨廢水排出
  4. 水純度越高，電壓梯度越大，水分解產生 H+ 和 OH-
  5. H+ / OH- 持續再生樹脂 — 所以叫「連續」電去離子

比喻：CEDI 像自動充電的淨水器

傳統 IX 樹脂用完需要「充電」（酸鹼再生），但 CEDI 透過電場讓水自己分解產生 H+/OH-，相當於「自動充電」，永遠不需要停機再生。這是 CEDI 最大的優勢。

關鍵數據

  • 離子去除率 > 99% — 可產出 1-18 MΩ-cm 純水
  • 有機物去除 50-95% — 變異很大，需看有機物種類
  • SiO2 去除 80-95%
  • 操作溫度 10-40°C — 無法熱水消毒

CEDI 的位置取決於水的等級

  • PW 系統：RO → CEDI（CEDI 做拋光）
  • WFI 系統：CEDI → RO（CEDI 做前處理，RO 做最終屏障）

這個位置差異反映了對微生物控制的不同要求。WFI 需要更嚴格的微生物屏障，RO 膜比 CEDI 更能有效阻隔微生物和內毒素。

模組不可互換

各家 CEDI 製造商（如 Ionpure、E-Cell）的模組設計專屬，不像 RO 膜那樣有統一尺寸規格。這意味著一旦選定供應商，就存在一定程度的「綁定」，在採購策略上需要考慮。

思考題

如果你的進水 TOC 偏高（> 2 ppm），CEDI 的有機物去除率只有 50-95%，你會怎麼強化系統設計？

提示：原文提到 185 nm UV 放在 CEDI 上游可大幅提升有機物去除。

Original Text

5.4 Reverse Osmosis (RO)

5.4.1 Description

Reverse osmosis (RO) is a pressure driven process utilizing a semi-permeable membrane capable of removing dissolved organic and inorganic contaminants from water. The membrane is permeable to water while being impermeable to many salts, acids, bases, colloids, bacteria, and endotoxins.

RO membranes are produced commercially in a spiral wound configuration for pharmaceutical water production. Membranes are available in two basic materials: cellulose acetate and thin film composite (polyamide).

Table 5-3: RO Membrane Operating Parameters

ParameterCellulose AcetatePolyamide/TFC
pH Range4-72-11
Chlorine Limit (mg/l)1.00.05*
Resistance to BacteriaPoorGood
Operating Temp. (°C)15-285-50
Rejection (%)90-9897-99
Sanitization Temp. (°C)3050-80
TDS Feed Range (mg/l)30-100030-1000
Silt Density Index, Max55

*Best operation at 0.0

5.4.2 Application

RO can be utilized upstream of regenerable or off-site regenerated deionizers to reduce chemical consumption. Two-pass RO units (product staged) with proper pH control are generally capable of producing water that meets USP requirements for TOC and conductivity.

5.4.3 Limitations

RO cannot remove 100% of contaminants and has very low to no removal capacity for extremely low molecular weight dissolved organics. Carbon dioxide passes directly through the RO membrane and may increase product conductivity beyond USP Stage 1 limit.

A concentrate flow is always necessary. Many users reuse the RO waste stream for cooling tower make-up, compressor cooling water, etc.

5.4.5 Performance

A single stage of RO typically reduces salts, colloids, organics, bacteria, and endotoxin by 90 to 99%. Single stage RO does not normally meet USP without further purification. Some two-pass units produce water meeting USP 24 Stage 1 conductivity requirements.

5.4.6 Advantages and Disadvantages

Advantages:

  • Eliminates or significantly reduces chemical handling relative to IX
  • More effective microbial control than IX
  • Integrity testing by salt challenge and differential conductivity
  • Removes wide variety of contaminants: ionized solids, non-ionic materials (colloids, bacteria, endotoxin, some organics)

Disadvantages:

  • Higher water consumption than IX (unless wastewater is reused)
  • Energy consumption higher than IX, less than distillation
  • No removal of dissolved gases (CO2 and ammonia)

5.4.8 Waste Water Reuse

RO wastewater is frequently used as cooling tower make-up, non-contact cooling, or re-purified in a wastewater RO unit. The wastewater from the second pass of a two-pass RO is normally returned to the feed of the first pass.

5.4.9 Sanitization

All RO membranes can be sanitized with chemical agents that vary by membrane type. Specially constructed membranes are available for hot water sanitization at 60° to 80°C.

Commentary / 教學解析

逆滲透（RO）解析

RO 核心原理

利用高壓將水推過半透膜。膜允許水分子通過，但阻擋鹽類、有機物、膠體、細菌、內毒素等。RO 是最「全面」的單一處理技術，可同時去除多種汙染物。

兩種膜材比較重點

特性醋酸纖維素（CA）聚醯胺/薄膜複合（TFC）
去除率90-98%97-99%（更高）
氯耐受性1.0 mg/L0.05 mg/L（極低）
抗菌性差好
熱消毒最高 30°C50-80°C
pH 範圍4-7（窄）2-11（寬）

實務上 TFC 膜已成為主流選擇。CA 膜唯一優勢是耐氯，但 TFC 在幾乎所有其他性能上都更優。

CO2 是 RO 的盲點

二氧化碳是溶解氣體，RO 膜完全無法阻擋。CO2 會影響產水電導度，可能超過 USP Stage 1 限值。解決方式：

  • 前處理降低 pH → CO2 脫氣
  • RO 後接 CEDI 或 IX（CO2 轉化為碳酸氫根後可被去除）
  • 脫氣膜（membrane degasifier）

比喻：RO 像一面精密篩網

想像一面極細的篩網，大部分雜質都過不去，只有水分子能通過。但像 CO2 這種「氣態小分子」就像空氣一樣能穿過篩網。這就是為什麼 RO 什麼都能擋，唯獨擋不住溶解氣體。

廢水回收策略

RO 廢水（concentrate）仍含有價值：

  • 冷卻塔補水 — 最常見的回收方式
  • 壓縮機冷卻水
  • 濾料反洗水
  • 二次 RO 處理 — 再回收一部分純水
  • 雙通 RO：第二段廢水回到第一段進水 — 標準設計

善用廢水回收可大幅改善 RO 系統最大的劣勢 — 高耗水量。

熱水消毒 RO 膜

特殊的高溫耐受 RO 膜（60-80°C）已經商業化，使 RO 系統也能執行熱水消毒，大幅簡化消毒流程。這是系統設計的重要考量 — 化學消毒後 rinse up 耗時且麻煩。

Original Text

5.5 Polishing Components — Non-Ionic Contaminants Reduction

5.5.1 Ultrafiltration (UF)

5.5.1.1 Description

Ultrafiltration (UF) is a cross-flow process similar to RO. A pressurized feed stream flows parallel to a porous membrane. The membrane rejects particulates, organics, microbes, pyrogens, and other contaminants too large to pass through. UF does not reject low molecular weight ionic contaminants, as does RO.

Membranes are available in both polymeric and ceramic materials. Polymeric elements come in spiral wound and hollow fiber configurations. Ceramic modules are in single/multiple channel configurations.

5.5.1.2 Application

UF is frequently used downstream of ion exchange for organic, colloidal, microbial, and endotoxin reduction. Purified Water with low endotoxin levels (<0.25 EU/ml) is utilized for ophthalmic solutions, topicals, and bulk pharmaceutical chemicals for parenteral manufacturing.

UF is also frequently used in still feed water systems, in combination with IX, to limit endotoxin and colloidal silica feed levels to the still.

5.5.1.5 Performance

Organic molecular weight cutoffs range from 1,000 to 100,000. Endotoxin reduction varies from 2 log10 to 4 log10. UF can consistently meet USP WFI endotoxin limit of 0.25 EU/ml. Microbial reduction: 3 log10 to 4 log10. Some UF membranes operate continuously at temperatures up to 90°C.

5.5.1.6 Advantages and Disadvantages

Advantages:

  • Better endotoxin and organic removal than microfiltration
  • More effective operating costs than MF in high particle loading
  • Some UF elements tolerate steam or ozone sanitization
  • Generally less waste stream than RO
  • Less energy intensive than RO

Disadvantages:

  • Cannot remove ionic contaminants (unlike RO)
  • Generally requires a waste stream (2-10%)
  • Sometimes more difficult to integrity test than MF cartridges

5.5.1.8 Sanitization

Most polymeric membranes tolerate various chemical agents (NaOCl, H2O2, peracetic acid, NaOH). Some polymeric membranes can be hot water or even steam sanitized. Ceramic UF elements can tolerate all common agents, hot water, steam, and ozone.

5.5.1.9 Waste Water Recovery

Most pharmaceutical UF units are fed deionized water. The wastewater is still low conductivity water that can be recycled upstream to RO units or fed to boilers, cooling towers, or other uses.

Commentary / 教學解析

超濾（UF）解析

UF 的角色定位

UF 不是用來去除離子的（那是 RO 和 IX 的工作）。UF 的專長是：

  • 內毒素（Endotoxin） — 2-4 log 去除
  • 微生物 — 3-4 log 去除
  • 有機物 — 依 MWCO 而定
  • 膠體、微粒

UF 是 IX 系統後的理想拋光步驟，彌補 IX 在微生物和內毒素方面的不足。

MWCO（分子量截留值）

UF 膜以分子量截留值（Molecular Weight Cut-Off）分類，範圍 1,000 到 100,000 Dalton。數值越低，能擋住越小的有機分子，但通量也越低。選擇時需在去除效率與系統產量之間取得平衡。

陶瓷 vs. 高分子 UF 膜

特性高分子膜（Polymeric）陶瓷膜（Ceramic）
耐化學性良好極佳
耐溫性部分可達 90°C可蒸汽滅菌
臭氧消毒有限可用
成本較低較高
使用壽命中等較長

陶瓷膜的優勢在於幾乎「百毒不侵」— 可用所有常見消毒方式。對於需要頻繁消毒的關鍵系統，陶瓷膜的長期成本效益可能更好。

UF 在 WFI 蒸餾系統中的角色

許多設施在蒸餾器前加裝 UF，目的是：

  • 降低進入蒸餾器的內毒素負荷
  • 去除膠體二氧化矽（避免結垢）
  • 延長蒸餾器維護週期
Original Text

5.5.2 Microfiltration (MF)

5.5.2.1 Description

Microfiltration is a membrane process for the removal of fine particles and microorganisms. No waste stream is generally employed. Virtually all microfiltration cartridges are disposable and available in a wide range of materials and pore sizes, generally from 0.45 microns down to 0.04 microns.

Microfilters are generally employed for microbial retention downstream of components where some microbial growth may exist. Microfilters are most appropriately employed in central purified water production systems and their use is discouraged in distribution systems. The filters should not be the only microbial control unit operation — they need to be part of a comprehensive microbial control plan.

5.5.2.2 Advantages and Disadvantages

Advantages:

  • Simple design and maintenance
  • Flexible in water flow production
  • No waste stream
  • Cartridges are integrity testable
  • Heat and chemical sanitization possible

Disadvantages:

  • Can only be used as a safety net for microbial production
  • No ion or endotoxin removal
  • Shorter life due to dead head design; replacement required
  • Not recommended for use in distribution piping

5.5.2.3 Performance

Microfiltration can be as effective as UF in microbial reduction and minimizes water consumption (no waste stream). However, MF cannot reduce dissolved organic levels as UF can, and cannot remove particles as small as UF due to pore size differences.

Commentary / 教學解析

微濾（MF）解析

MF 的定位：最後一道安全網

MF 不是系統的「主力」處理，而是「安全網」（safety net）。它的功能很明確：

  • 擋住微生物和微粒
  • 不能去除離子、內毒素、溶解有機物
  • 拋棄式濾芯 — 用完就換

重要限制：不建議用於配送系統

ISPE 明確指出 MF 不應用於配送管路。原因是：

  • MF 容易成為微生物的「溫床」（dead-end 設計）
  • 配送管路應靠循環、溫度、臭氧等方式控制微生物
  • MF 只適合放在製水系統的中央產水端

這一點在實際稽核中經常被提問。

比喻：MF 像門口的紗窗

紗窗可以擋住蚊蟲（微生物），但擋不住灰塵和氣味（離子、有機物、內毒素）。它不是空調系統（主力處理），只是多一層防護。而且如果紗窗放在房子深處（配送管路），反而會變成蟲卵孵化的地方。

完整性測試（Integrity Test）

MF 濾芯的一大優勢是可以做完整性測試（如泡點測試、擴散流測試）。這讓 MF 在 GMP 環境中更容易驗證。相比之下，UF 的完整性測試通常更複雜。

Original Text

5.5.3 Ultraviolet Light Treatment

5.5.3.1 Description

Ultraviolet light rays strike microorganisms (bacteria, virus, yeast, mold, or algae) and break through their outer membrane to modify the DNA, bringing about the destruction of the organism. UV radiation is a point of use application with no residual radiation characteristics. Proper prefiltration should be implemented to keep particulate from shielding organisms from UV light.

5.5.3.2 Advantages and Disadvantages

Advantages:

  • Simple design and maintenance
  • 254 nm design for microbial reduction
  • 185 nm design for TOC reduction
  • No waste stream
  • Heat, ozone, and chemical sanitization are possible

Disadvantages:

  • Can only be used as a safety net for microbial production
  • No ion or endotoxin removal
  • No disinfection residual
  • Particulate can shield organisms from UV light

5.5.3.3 Performance

UV light is used as a final treatment step to address microbial control and TOC reduction (where necessary), after deionization processes.

Commentary / 教學解析

紫外線（UV）處理解析

兩種 UV 波長，兩種功能

波長功能機制
254 nm殺菌破壞微生物 DNA，使其無法繁殖
185 nmTOC 降解產生臭氧和自由基，氧化有機物為 CO2

系統設計時需根據目的選擇正確波長。有些設備同時提供兩種波長。

UV 的致命弱點：無殘留效果

UV 只在照射當下有效，水一離開 UV 燈就不再有消毒保護。這代表：

  • UV 下游的管路仍可能有微生物生長
  • UV 不能替代系統性的微生物控制策略
  • UV 必須搭配其他控制手段（如循環、溫度維持）

顆粒遮蔽效應

水中如果有懸浮微粒，微粒會遮擋 UV 光，使被遮蔽的微生物存活。因此 UV 前必須有適當的前過濾（prefiltration）。這也是為什麼 UV 通常放在系統最末段、其他處理之後。

思考題：UV 的最佳安裝位置

在一個典型的 RO + CEDI + UV 系統中，185 nm UV 和 254 nm UV 各自應該放在什麼位置？為什麼？

提示：回顧 CEDI 段落 — 185 nm UV 放在 CEDI 上游可提升有機物去除；254 nm UV 放在最末端做微生物控制。

Original Text

Table 5-4: Purified Water Systems Comparison Chart

Ratings: N = None, L = Low, M = Medium, H = High

System Configuration Capital Cost Chemical Handling Energy Water Outside Service Maintenance Conductivity (μS/cm) TOC (ppb) Microbial Perf.
Off-Site IX L N L L H L 1.0 - 0.06 (4) L
RO / Off-Site IX M L M H (1) M M 1.0 - 0.06 <500 M
On-Site IX M H L M L M 1.0 - 0.06 (4) L
RO / On-Site IX M M M H (1) L M 1.0 - 0.06 <500 M
RO / CEDI M L M H (1) L M 1.0 - 0.07 <500 M
Two-Pass RO M L M H (1) L M 2.5 - 0.5 <500 H
Distillation H L (2) H M (3) L L 1.0 - 0.1 <500 H

Notes: (1) High water consumption unless wastewater is reused. (2) Total chemical requirement dependent upon pretreatment. (3) Total water consumption dependent upon pretreatment. (4) USP TOC met in most cases but may not if feed TOC >2 ppm.

Commentary / 教學解析

系統比較總覽解讀

如何閱讀這張表

這是選擇純化水系統最重要的決策參考表。關鍵看法：

  • 微生物性能：只有 Two-Pass RO 和蒸餾評為 H（高），其他都是 M 或 L
  • 化學品處理：On-Site IX 最高，膜系統最低
  • 耗水量：所有含 RO 的系統都是 H（除非回收廢水）
  • 資本成本：蒸餾最高，Off-Site IX 最低

主流組態推薦

  • RO + CEDI：現今最主流的 PW 系統組態。化學品需求低、無須外部服務、電導度可達 Stage 1
  • Two-Pass RO：微生物性能最佳（膜系統中），適合對微生物要求更嚴格的場景
  • 蒸餾：微生物性能最好，但資本和能源成本最高，通常用於 WFI

TOC 的隱藏風險

註(4)指出：純 IX 系統（無 RO）的 TOC 不一定能穩定達標，尤其當進水 TOC > 2 ppm 時。這是因為離子交換樹脂可能釋出有機物，反而增加產水 TOC。含 RO 的系統 TOC 表現則穩定在 <500 ppb。

決策演練

場景：你需要為一個新藥廠設計 PW 系統。原水 TDS 350 ppm，TOC 3 ppm。預算有限但希望長期營運成本合理。你會選哪個組態？為什麼？

考慮因素：TDS 太高不適合純 IX；TOC 高需要 RO 前處理；RO + CEDI 或 RO + IX 都是合理選擇，但 RO + CEDI 免化學品、維護更簡單。

Chapter Summary / 章節總結

核心技術比較

技術 主要功能 離子去除 微生物控制 內毒素去除 消毒方式 主要限制
IX（離子交換） 去除離子 極佳 差 無 化學/熱水 微生物滋長、化學品需求
CEDI（電去離子） 去除離子（連續） 極佳（>99%） 部分（電場） 無 化學 不去除非離子物、模組專屬
RO（逆滲透） 全面淨化 佳（90-99%） 佳 佳 化學/熱水 不去除溶解氣體、高耗水
UF（超濾） 去除大分子/微生物 無 極佳（3-4 log） 佳（2-4 log） 化學/熱水/蒸汽 不去除離子、需廢水流
MF（微濾） 微生物攔截 無 佳 無 化學/熱 僅安全網、不建議配送管路
UV（紫外線） 殺菌/TOC 降解 無 佳（即時） 無 N/A 無殘留效果、顆粒遮蔽

關鍵要點

  • 產業趨勢：超過 90% 的新純化水系統以 RO 為核心，搭配 CEDI/IX/第二段 RO 做拋光
  • GEP 原則：材料規格應根據功能需求選擇，不是所有元件都需要最高等級表面處理
  • CO2 問題：RO 無法去除溶解氣體，需要後段處理（CEDI 或 IX）
  • 微生物控制：IX 系統微生物風險最高；膜系統和蒸餾表現較好
  • 廢水回收：善用 RO 廢水可顯著降低系統最大劣勢（高耗水量）
  • 消毒策略：熱水消毒比化學消毒更簡便，但需確認設備耐溫規格
  • MF 定位：僅作為安全網，不應用於配送管路，不能作為唯一微生物控制手段
  • UV 雙波長：254 nm 殺菌、185 nm 降 TOC，各有不同最佳安裝位置

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems

Chapter 5: Final Treatment Options — Non-Compendial and Compendial Purified Water | p57-p73

SterileGMP Knowledge Hub — Bilingual Educational Reference

6

Chapter 6: Final Treatment: WFI

終端處理：注射用水 | p75-p87

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems | p75-p87

Learning Objectives / 學習目標

  1. 瞭解 WFI（注射用水）作為最高等級製藥用水的定義、用途與法規要求
  2. 掌握三種蒸餾技術：Single Effect (SE)、Multi-Effect (ME)、Vapor Compression (VC) 的原理與差異
  3. 理解各蒸餾方式的產能範圍、前處理需求、材質選擇與經濟考量
  4. 認識 Reverse Osmosis (RO) 作為 WFI 生產手段的技術特點、優缺點與法規接受度
  5. 能運用 WFI Systems Comparison 表（Table 6-4）比較不同方案，做出符合 GEP 的選型決策
  6. 理解 USP 與 EP 對 WFI 製程方法的歷史差異及 2017 年 EP 修訂的重要意義

Section Navigation / 章節導覽

6.1 Introduction 6.2 USP Issues 6.3 Distillation 6.4 Applications & Capacities 6.5.1 Single Effect (SE) 6.5.2 Multi-Effect (ME) 6.5.3 Vapor Compression (VC) 6.5.4-5 Pretreatment 6.5.6 Materials & Instruments 6.6 Reverse Osmosis (RO) 6.7 WFI Comparison Table
Original Text

6.1 Introduction

This chapter addresses the USP approved final treatment methods for the production of compendial WFI. WFI is the purest grade of bulk water monographed by the USP and would be expected to be used for the manufacture of parenteral, some ophthalmic and inhalation products, and for finishing steps of parenteral grade active pharmaceutical ingredients (API's).

Recommended systems include either distillation or RO as the final processing step, but may also include ultrafiltration (UF), deionization (DI) and/or ion exchange (IX), to compliment the RO or distillation unit operation.

The technology, operation, maintenance, and relative cost issues for the approved process methods are discussed. This chapter includes USP monograph information, regulatory issues, and subsections that cover the unit operations:

  • Single effect (SE) distillation
  • Multi-effect (ME) distillation
  • Vapor compression (VC) distillation
  • Reverse osmosis (RO)

Feed water pretreatment is covered along with economic factors such as construction materials, surface finishes, and instrumentation and controls. A comparison table on USP-WFI final treatment options and relative attributes is provided.

Commentary / 教學解析

導論重點

WFI 的地位

WFI（Water for Injection，注射用水）是 USP 規範中最高等級的製藥用水。用途包括：

  • 注射劑（Parenteral）製造
  • 部分眼科產品與吸入劑
  • 注射級原料藥（API）的最終步驟

簡言之：任何會直接進入人體血液或繞過人體天然防線的產品，都需要使用 WFI。

比喻：水的等級制度

如果把製藥用水比喻成醫院的空間等級：

  • 飲用水 = 醫院大廳（一般公共區域）
  • Purified Water = 一般病房（有基本管控）
  • WFI = 手術室（最嚴格的無菌管控）

WFI 必須將內毒素（Endotoxin）控制到極低水平，因為內毒素進入血液會引發致命的熱原反應。

本章四大技術

本章涵蓋四種 WFI 最終處理技術，可分為兩大類：

  • 蒸餾類：SE（單效）、ME（多效）、VC（蒸汽壓縮）
  • 膜處理類：RO（逆滲透）

蒸餾是傳統的「金標準」，RO 則是近年逐漸被接受的替代方案。

Original Text

6.2 US Pharmacopoeia Issues

The United States Pharmacopoeia (USP) allows WFI to be "purified by distillation or by RO". This statement does not imply that the regulated process step is the only process step, but the USP advisory section does imply that it is the final step in the process.

  • Only distillation may be used to produce WFI under current European regulations
  • Distillation, RO and UF are allowable methods to produce WFI under the Japanese regulations

There are few regulations, which govern the design and construction of pharmaceutical water purification systems. There are no existing regulations governing materials of construction, type, or level of instrumentation, surface finish, or operating temperatures.

Among U.S. government publications, including the Code of Federal Regulations (CFR) and the FDA Guide to Inspection of High Purity Water Systems, there are few stipulations related to design and construction of WFI processing equipment. Two notable stipulations are:

  • "Heat exchangers, other than the double concentric tube type or double tube sheet type, must employ a pressure differential and a means for monitoring the differential."
  • "All stills and tanks holding liquid requiring microbial control shall have air vents with non-fiber releasing sterilizable filters capable of preventing microbial contamination of the contents."
Commentary / 教學解析

法規要求解析

USP vs. EP vs. JP 法規差異（出版時）

藥典允許的 WFI 製程
USP（美國藥典）蒸餾 或 RO
EP（歐洲藥典）僅蒸餾（至 2017 年修訂前）
JP（日本藥典）蒸餾、RO 或 UF

重要法規更新（2017 年 EP 修訂）

本指引出版於 2001 年，當時 EP 僅允許蒸餾製備 WFI。2017 年 4 月，EP 正式修訂，也接受「蒸餾以外的等效純化方法」（包括 RO）來生產 WFI。

這是製藥水系統領域的里程碑事件，意味著全球三大藥典現在都接受膜技術作為 WFI 生產方式。

「最終步驟」的含義

USP 強調蒸餾或 RO 必須是最終步驟（final step）。這意味著：

  • 你可以在蒸餾前使用 RO 做前處理
  • 你可以在 RO 前使用 DI 做前處理
  • 但蒸餾或 RO 之後，不能再加其他處理步驟（否則該步驟就變成了「最終步驟」）

CFR 兩項硬性規定

雖然法規對設計細節很少規定，但有兩項明確要求必須遵守：

  1. 熱交換器壓差監控 — 防止冷卻水側滲入純水側（除雙管板型外）
  2. 儲罐通氣過濾 — 防止微生物從空氣進入儲水系統

這兩條看似簡單，卻是查廠時的高頻檢查點。

Original Text

6.3 Distillation

The pharmaceutical still chemically and microbiologically purifies water by phase changes and entrainment separation. In this process water is evaporated, producing steam. The steam disengages from the water leaving behind dissolved solids, non-volatiles, and high molecular weight impurities. However, low molecular weight impurities are carried with the water mist/droplets, which are entrained in the steam. A separator removes fine mist and entrained impurities, including endotoxins. The purified steam is condensed into WFI.

Distillation systems are available to provide a minimum of 3 log10 (99.99%) reduction in endotoxin concentration. Specific endotoxin loading limits should be reviewed with the manufacturer.

A variety of different designs are available including single effect (SE), multi-effect (ME), and vapor compression (VC). The distilled water quality expected from an SE still is equivalent to an ME design, by virtue of the fact that water is distilled only once in both systems. The benefit to the user of ME versus SE distillation are the significantly lower operating costs associated with utilities.

In an ME system, purified steam produced by each effect is utilized to heat water and generate more steam in the subsequent effect. Due to this staged evaporation and condensation process, only the first effect requires heat from an external source, and only the purified steam produced by the final effect is condensed, using an external cooling medium.

VC stills can produce similar quality water using a different technique. Energy imparted to the generated steam, by a mechanical compressor, results in compressed steam with increased pressure and temperature. The higher energy steam is then discharged back into the evaporator/condenser vessel to generate more steam in a continuous cycle.

Areas of concern are carry over of impurities, evaporator flooding, stagnant water, and pump and compressor seal design. These concerns may be addressed using mist eliminators, high water level indicators, use of sanitary pumps and compressors, proper drainage, adequate blow down control, and conductivity sensing to divert unacceptable water to drain.

Commentary / 教學解析

蒸餾原理解析

蒸餾純化的三步驟

  1. 蒸發（Evaporation） — 水加熱變成蒸汽，固體雜質與大分子留在液相
  2. 分離（Separation） — 蒸汽通過分離器（Separator），去除被夾帶的水霧與內毒素
  3. 冷凝（Condensation） — 純淨蒸汽冷凝回液態，即為 WFI

關鍵：蒸餾能達到 3 log（99.99%）以上的內毒素去除率，這是蒸餾在 WFI 領域長期被視為金標準的核心原因。

比喻：蒸餾 = 燒開水的升級版

家裡燒開水只是殺菌，但蒸餾更像是「只取蒸汽再冷凝」。想像一個鍋蓋上有收集裝置：

  • 鍋裡的水含有鹽、內毒素等雜質
  • 蒸汽上升時，雜質留在鍋底
  • 但有些微小水滴會被蒸汽「帶走」（entrainment） — 這就需要分離器來攔截

SE vs. ME vs. VC 快速區分

  • SE（單效）：最簡單，一次蒸發＋冷凝，能耗最高
  • ME（多效）：多段串聯，每段的蒸汽為下一段加熱，大幅節省蒸汽
  • VC（蒸汽壓縮）：用壓縮機提升蒸汽能量再循環，只需電力，不需外部蒸汽

三者產出的水質基本相同（都只蒸餾一次），差異在於能效和成本結構。

蒸餾系統的風險點

  • Carry over（夾帶） — 蒸汽帶走雜質水滴 → 需 mist eliminator
  • Flooding（溢流） — 液位過高 → 需高液位警報
  • Stagnant water（死水） — 未排盡的水滋生微生物 → 需良好排水設計
  • Seal failure（密封洩漏） — 泵浦或壓縮機密封 → 需衛生級設計
Original Text

6.4 Distillation Applications and Capacities

The majority of USP WFI currently produced in the United States is produced by distillation. WFI production is shared by both ME and VC stills. SE stills are found in areas where only small quantities of WFI are required. However, where large amounts of WFI are required, economics of operation dictate the use of either ME or VC.

Table 6-1 shows typical capacities and temperatures of WFI produced by each process.

Table 6-1: Capacities and WFI Temperature Options

Distillation TypeCapacity Range (GPH)WFI Temperature Options (°C)
Single-Effect (SE)1 - 10080 - 100
Multi-Effect (ME)25 - 3,00037 - 100
Vapor Compression (VC)100 - 6,000Ambient / 80-100 / Combination
Commentary / 教學解析

產能與應用場景

選型邏輯

  • 小量需求（<100 GPH） — SE 足矣，設備簡單、佔地小
  • 中量需求（25-3,000 GPH） — ME 最常見，能效比 SE 好數倍
  • 大量需求（100-6,000 GPH） — VC 有最大產能範圍，且可產出常溫水

溫度選項的意義

WFI 的出水溫度直接影響下游儲存與分配系統設計：

  • 80-100°C（熱水） — 可直接進入熱循環儲存系統，天然抑菌
  • 常溫（Ambient） — 僅 VC 提供此選項，需額外微生物控制措施
  • 37°C — ME 可做到，但需注意此溫度區間微生物風險較高

GPH 單位換算

GPH = Gallons Per Hour（加侖/小時）

1 GPH ≈ 3.785 L/h

例：ME 最大 3,000 GPH ≈ 11,355 L/h ≈ 11.4 m³/h

VC 最大 6,000 GPH ≈ 22,710 L/h ≈ 22.7 m³/h

Original Text

6.5.1 Single Effect Distillation (SE)

SE systems incorporate a single evaporator heat exchanger, separator mechanism, and a condenser.

SE systems are available in electrically or steam powered versions, although electrical units are limited to very small production rates (<30 gallons per hour).

Steam powered units typically require 30-60 psig plant steam. Cooling fluid is required for both steam and electric powered versions. When water is the coolant, the rate is approximately 8-10 gallons per gallon of WFI produced, based on a supply temperature of 4 - 16°C, and temperature rise of 67°C.

SE systems typically operate at atmospheric pressure and 100°C, and incorporate non-ASME code vessels. WFI is delivered at atmospheric pressure and 80 - 100°C; thus a distillate transfer pump is required, unless the WFI tank is at a lower elevation than the still.

Commentary / 教學解析

單效蒸餾解析

SE 系統特點

  • 結構最簡單：蒸發器 + 分離器 + 冷凝器，三件套
  • 常壓操作（100°C），容器不需 ASME 壓力容器認證
  • 冷卻水消耗大：每產出 1 加侖 WFI 需要 8-10 加侖冷卻水
  • 出水無壓力：需要轉送泵浦或利用位差（蒸餾器高於儲罐）

比喻：SE 像微型蒸餾壺

SE 蒸餾器就像實驗室的蒸餾燒瓶放大版 — 一次蒸發、一次冷凝、產出純水。簡單有效，但能耗高、產量小，適合 R&D 或小型製劑廠。

冷卻水消耗計算

以 SE 產出 50 GPH WFI 為例：

冷卻水需求 = 50 × 8~10 = 400~500 GPH

這意味著冷卻水成本是 SE 運行的主要費用之一。

Original Text

6.5.2 Multi-Effect Distillation (ME)

ME systems incorporate two or more evaporator heat exchangers, separator mechanisms, and a condenser into a staged evaporation and condensation process. Typical systems have 3-8 effects. Each effect includes an evaporator and a separator.

ME systems typically require plant steam at 80 - 120 psig, and cooling fluid at a supply temperature of 4°C - 16°C, based on a temperature rise of 65°C - 70°C. The quantity of steam and cooling fluid required varies significantly based upon the WFI production rate and the number of effects. Capital costs increase while steam and cooling fluid consumption decrease, as the number of effects to produce a given quantity of WFI increases. ME systems operate under pressure, and typically deliver WFI at 80°C - 100°C.

Normally, water used for cooling is not the same as the feed water, and does not require special pretreatment for the purpose of scale prevention. However, corrosion prevention measures, such as chlorine and chloramine removal, are necessary.

Some designs deliver the water at atmospheric pressure and require a transfer pump unless the WFI storage tank is at lower elevation than the still. Other designs which may operate at 5-10 psig condenser pressure, do feature a distillate transfer pump for higher pressure deliveries.

Commentary / 教學解析

多效蒸餾解析

ME 核心原理：能量重複利用

ME 系統的精髓在於「級聯熱回收」：

  1. 第 1 效（Effect）使用外部蒸汽加熱進水
  2. 第 1 效產出的純蒸汽成為第 2 效的加熱源
  3. 第 2 效的蒸汽再為第 3 效加熱…以此類推
  4. 只有最後一效的蒸汽需要外部冷卻水冷凝

效數越多 → 蒸汽消耗越少 → 但設備成本越高。典型選擇 3-8 效。

效數與蒸汽經濟性

近似關係：蒸汽經濟比 ≈ 效數 × 0.8~0.9

例：6 效蒸餾器的蒸汽經濟比約 4.8~5.4，代表每投入 1 kg 蒸汽可產出約 5 kg WFI。

相較之下，SE 的蒸汽經濟比僅約 0.9~1.0。

ME 的權衡取捨

增加效數優點缺點
更多效蒸汽/冷卻水消耗更低設備成本更高
更少效設備成本較低運行成本較高

最佳效數取決於蒸汽成本、產能需求與投資預算的綜合分析。

注意：ME 需要較高壓力蒸汽

ME 需要 80-120 psig 的廠務蒸汽，遠高於 SE 的 30-60 psig。建廠前需確認鍋爐系統能否提供足夠壓力的蒸汽。

Original Text

6.5.3 Vapor Compression Distillation (VC)

VC is a distillation method where water is evaporated inside, or outside, a bank of tubes arranged in a horizontal or vertical configuration. The horizontal design is normally of the forced circulation type with recirculation pump and spray nozzles, while the vertical design is of the natural circulation type.

Major system components are the evaporator, compressor, heat exchangers, deaerator, pumps, motors, valves, instruments, and controls.

The VC process operates on the same principle as the mechanical refrigeration cycle.

In a VC still, feed water is evaporated on one side of the tubes. The generated steam passes through the disengagement space, through the separator, and into the compressor.

The energy imparted by the compressor results in compressed steam with increased pressure and temperature. The higher energy steam is then discharged back into the evaporator/condenser vessel. There, the steam condenses and gives up its latent heat, which is transferred through the tube wall to the water. More water is boiled off, generating more vapor, and the process is repeated. The outgoing distillate and blow down streams preheat the incoming feed water, thus saving energy. Since the latent heat is recycled, there is no need for a stand-alone condenser as in the SE or ME systems.

Commentary / 教學解析

蒸汽壓縮蒸餾解析

VC 原理：潛熱回收循環

VC 的核心概念是壓縮機驅動的能量循環：

  1. 進水在管束上蒸發為蒸汽
  2. 蒸汽通過分離器後進入壓縮機
  3. 壓縮機提升蒸汽的壓力與溫度
  4. 高能蒸汽送回蒸發器/冷凝器，在管壁另一側冷凝
  5. 冷凝時釋放的潛熱，加熱管壁另一側的水，產生更多蒸汽
  6. 循環往復，不需要獨立冷凝器

比喻：VC 像熱泵（冷暖空調）

VC 蒸餾和家用冷暖空調的原理完全相同 — 都是「機械壓縮循環」：

  • 空調壓縮機壓縮冷媒 → VC 壓縮機壓縮水蒸汽
  • 空調的冷凝器放熱 → VC 中高壓蒸汽冷凝放熱來加熱進水
  • 能量不斷循環利用，只需投入壓縮機的電力

因此 VC 的主要能源成本是電力，而非蒸汽。

VC 獨特優勢

  • 不需獨立冷凝器 — 潛熱完全回收
  • 不需外部蒸汽（常溫出水模式）— 只靠電力
  • 可產出常溫 WFI — SE 和 ME 都只能產出熱水
  • 最大產能範圍 — 最高 6,000 GPH

VC 的挑戰

壓縮機是 VC 系統最關鍵也最脆弱的元件。壓縮機密封設計、振動管理、以及與製藥衛生要求的兼容性，是 VC 系統設計的重點關注項。

Original Text

6.5.4 Distillation Pretreatment Requirements — General

All distillation units are susceptible to scaling and corrosion, if the appropriate feed water pretreatment is not provided. VC and some SE stills operate slightly above atmospheric pressure, and the removal of calcium and magnesium, by way of water softening, is normally required as a minimum. ME stills operate at a much higher pressure and temperature, and require higher quality feed water in order to prevent scaling and corrosion. Normally, ion exchange beds are employed as feed water pretreatment to a multiple effect still. RO is also used as feed water pretreatment for either the VC or multiple effect stills.

All distillation units will invariably experience some form of scale build-up and must therefore include routine visual inspections plus cleaning of the still during shutdown periods when appropriate. Both types of stills are susceptible to attack by chlorine. Chlorine removal is essential if damage is to be avoided. Activated carbon filters and sodium bisulfite injection are effective and common methods for chlorine removal.

From a microbiological perspective, the bacterial and endotoxin load should be consistently controlled to a level that does not overload the still.

6.5.5 Pretreatment Requirements — Specific

6.5.5.2 ME Still: The baseline pretreatment for ME must provide very low TDS feed water, preferably less than 10 mg/l, and less than 1 mg/l silica. Some manufacturers offer ME stills to operate on softened water. Others allow higher levels of silica, up to 5 mg/l. The pretreatment must also remove chlorine and objectionable volatiles, such as ammonia.

6.5.5.3 VC Still: The baseline pretreatment for VC stills is softening, the removal of chlorine, and other objectionable volatiles such as ammonia, if present.

6.5.5.4 Economics

a) SE Economics: Commercially available SE systems are inherently simple in design. Operating costs are associated mainly with plant steam and cooling fluid.

b) ME Economics: Opportunities for cost savings exist in the areas of construction materials, surface finishes, and instrumentation. Operating costs are associated mainly with plant steam and cooling fluid. Utilities consumption rates vary among ME manufacturers.

c) VC Economics: Significant opportunities exist to reduce capital cost associated with selection of construction materials, surface finishes, and instrumentation. Operating costs of VC systems are associated mainly with electrical power.

Commentary / 教學解析

前處理與經濟分析

前處理需求對照表

蒸餾類型最低前處理需求進水水質要求
SE軟化 + 除氯軟化水即可
ME離子交換或 RO + 除氯TDS < 10 mg/L，矽 < 1 mg/L
VC軟化 + 除氯軟化水即可

ME 對進水水質要求最高，因為高溫高壓下結垢風險更大。

氯的危害 — 不可忽視

所有蒸餾器的不鏽鋼材質都會被氯腐蝕。進水中的氯必須徹底去除，常用方法：

  • 活性碳過濾器（Activated Carbon）— 最常見
  • 亞硫酸氫鈉注入（Sodium Bisulfite）— 化學還原法

查廠重點：確認除氯設備的維護紀錄與碳床更換週期。

三種蒸餾的成本結構差異

成本項目SEMEVC
主要運行成本蒸汽 + 冷卻水蒸汽 + 冷卻水電力
資本成本最低中等最高
前處理成本低高（需 DI/RO）低
節能空間無增加效數熱回收設計

思考練習

你的工廠有充足的高壓蒸汽（120 psig），但電費昂貴。WFI 需求量約 1,500 GPH，需要 80°C 以上熱水儲存。你會選擇哪種蒸餾器？為什麼？

提示：考慮蒸汽供應、電力成本、出水溫度、以及產能範圍。

Original Text

6.5.6 Construction Materials, Surface Finish, and Instrumentation

Recommended Construction Materials (Table 6-2)

ComponentSingle-EffectMulti-EffectVapor Compression
Evaporator ShellSS / Tin-coated copper316L SS304/L SS
TubesheetsSS / Tin-coated copper316L SS304/L SS
TubesSS316/L SS; Titanium304 SS
SeparatorSS / Tin-coated copper316 SS316 SS
Heat ExchangersSS or Tin-coated copper316/L SS316/L SS
DeaeratorNot usedNot used304L SS
PipingSS / Tin-coated copper316/L SS, Sanitary clamps316/L SS, Sanitary clamps
PumpsSS (when used)316/316L SS, Sanitary clamps316/316L SS, Sanitary clamps
CompressorNot usedNot used316 SS / Inconel
ValvesSS316 SS316 SS
Skid/FrameCarbon SteelCarbon SteelCarbon Steel

6.5.6.1 Surface Finish

Mechanical polishing (MP), electropolishing (EP), and passivation processes are implemented in stainless steel distillation systems in order to improve corrosion resistance. These processes are neither necessary, nor applicable, to other alloys such as tin-coated copper, titanium, and Inconel.

MP and EP/passivation processes affect the microscopic amplitude and chemical composition, respectively, of the stainless surface. These processes are not considered necessary to control microbial growth due to the relatively high operating temperatures. MP is advocated for final finishing of mechanical welds and EP/passivation for all stainless steel surfaces to optimize the formation of the corrosion resistant chromium oxide barrier.

The impact of progressive mechanical polishing on the capital cost of stills and other equipment is considerable, and often can account for 25% to 30% of a ME or VC still cost. MP processes, except when used to smooth out a mechanical weld or misalignment, may be removed from the applicable specification without fear of compromising the water quality.

6.5.6.2 Instrumentation and Controls

For WFI applications, the level of instrumentation should be sufficient to monitor parameters considered critical because they relate to ensuring proper hydraulic/thermodynamic functionality and the production of the appropriate quality of WFI. Instrumentation for critical operating parameters should be calibratable using National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) traceable equipment.

Commentary / 教學解析

材質與表面處理

材質選擇原則

  • SE：可用錫鍍銅（Tin-coated copper），成本最低
  • ME：全面採用 316/316L 不鏽鋼，管材可選鈦合金（耐腐蝕）
  • VC：外殼 304 SS，接液部位 316 SS，壓縮機用 316 SS 或 Inconel（鎳基合金，耐高溫高壓）
  • 骨架/底座：三者均可用碳鋼（不接觸純水）

重大成本啟示：MP 佔成本 25-30%

ISPE 明確指出：在蒸餾系統中，機械拋光（MP）不是微生物控制的必要條件，因為系統在高溫下運行。

過度指定 MP 可能佔設備成本的 25-30%，卻不會提升水質。這是典型的「過度設計」（Over-specification）案例，是 Good Engineering Practice 強調需要避免的。

比喻：鍍金門把手

在一個 100°C 運行的蒸餾系統上做精密拋光，就像在消防站門口裝鍍金門把手 — 看起來高級，但對功能（滅火）毫無幫助。高溫本身就是最好的微生物控制手段。

表面處理的正確用途

  • MP（機械拋光） — 用於平滑焊接接縫，僅此而已
  • EP（電拋光）+ 鈍化 — 用於所有不鏽鋼表面，建立氧化鉻保護層以防腐蝕（不是防微生物）
  • 非不鏽鋼合金（錫鍍銅、鈦、Inconel）— 不需要也不適用 MP/EP

儀表校正要求

關鍵操作參數的儀表必須使用 NIST 可追溯設備進行校正。這確保了量測數據的準確性和法規合規性。在台灣，對應的標準追溯體系為國家度量衡標準實驗室（NML）。

Original Text

Table 6-3: Process and System Comparison (Distillation)

ParameterSEMEVC
EvaporatorYESYESYES
CondenserYESYESNO
Feed/Blowdown HXNO / optionalYESYES
CompressorNONOYES
ASME CodedNormally NOYESNO
Distillate pumpNormally NOOptionalYES
Blowdown pumpNONOYES
Makeup heatSteam or electricSteamSteam or electric (ambient); Steam (hot)
Cooling water requiredYESYESNO
Plant Steam Pressure (psig)30 - 60100 - 12030 - 40
Feed Water Pressure (psig)30 - 5075 - 9030 - 50
Cooling Water Pressure (psig)30 - 5030 - 50Not required
May generate Clean SteamYES (not common)YESNO
Commentary / 教學解析

蒸餾系統比較重點

三大差異化特徵

  • VC 不需冷凝器也不需冷卻水 — 因為潛熱完全內部回收
  • 只有 ME 需要 ASME 壓力容器認證 — 因為在高壓（100-120 psig）下運行
  • ME 可兼產 Clean Steam — 這是 ME 的額外價值（VC 無此功能）

Clean Steam 附加價值

ME 蒸餾器不僅能產出 WFI，還能同時產出純蒸汽（Clean Steam）用於 SIP（在線滅菌）。這使得 ME 在需要同時供應 WFI 和 Clean Steam 的無菌充填工廠中特別有優勢。

閱讀表格的技巧

面對多參數比較表時，建議先問自己：

  1. 我的廠有什麼公用設施條件？（蒸汽壓力、冷卻水、電力）
  2. 我需要什麼附加功能？（Clean Steam、常溫出水）
