d) Dissolved Organic Compounds — Naturally occurring organics include Tannin, Humic acid, and Fulvic acids. Under conditions of free halogen compounds, they form trihalomethanes (THMs), suspected carcinogens.

11.4.4.3 Removal of Organics

Technologies available include:

  • Ozone — Twice as powerful an oxidant as chlorine. Not frequently used in pretreatment due to material compatibility issues.
  • Strong Base Ion Exchange — Organic scavengers that absorb organics with slightly negative charge. Regenerated with NaCl brine.
  • Carbon — Activated carbon adsorbs organics. Periodically replaced when capacity diminishes.
  • Microfiltration — Depth cartridge, pleated, and cross-flow membrane filters; 100 μm down to 0.1 μm. Captures bacteria, giardia cyst, large MW organics.
  • Ultrafiltration — 0.1 to 0.001 μm; removes organics, bacteria, viruses, pyrogens. Cross-flow design is self-cleaning.
  • RO — Also removes organics and microbiological impurities through membrane rejection and purge stream.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：有機物與微生物的雙重來源

ISPE 強調水系統的有機/微生物污染有兩個來源：

  1. 外部進入：隨原水帶入的有機物、細菌、熱原
  2. 內部生長：系統內部滋生的微生物（特別是去除氯之後）

這個「雙重來源」概念是水系統設計的基本思維框架。每個設備都要同時考慮「能去除多少外部污染」和「自身會製造多少內部污染」。

重點提示：四類有機污染物

污染類型量測方式製藥關切
細菌CFU/mLUSP/EP 限值
熱原 / 內毒素EU/mLWFI 關鍵指標
TOCmg/L or μg/LUSP Stage 要求
溶解有機物各類化學分析THMs 形成風險

特別注意：熱原不會被殺死細菌的條件破壞。即使水已經「無菌」，仍可能含有高量內毒素。這就是為什麼 WFI 系統需要多重屏障。

有機物去除技術比較

技術去除對象優點缺點
臭氧微生物 + 有機物強氧化力材質相容性差
強鹼離子交換天然有機物可再生鹽水廢棄物
活性碳有機物 + 氯低成本、操作簡單微生物溫床
微過濾細菌、大分子穩定屏障需更換濾芯
超過濾病毒、熱原自清洗設計資本成本中高
RO全面去除多功能不耐氯（部分膜）
11.4.4.4 Control of Microbiological Growth & Chlorine Management（微生物控制與氯管理）

Original Text

Periodic Sanitization

Methods include heat, chemical sanitization, regeneration or replacement of media, flushing, or drainage. With heat, USP indicator organisms are killed above 60°C; temperatures above 80°C result in complete kill. Sanitization times might be 1-2 hours at temperature, with total cycle time of 4-8 hours.

Chemical sanitization agents include hydrogen peroxide, iodine, ammonium compounds, and per-oxygen compounds. Temperatures below 15°C slow microbial growth.

Pressurized Carbon Dioxide

During shutdown periods, cartridge filters and RO are deadheaded and pressurized with CO2 to 2-4 bar, lowering pH to <5.5 to inhibit microbial growth while also dissolving scaling chemicals. This has the potential to eliminate the need for a softener before the RO.

Ultraviolet Light (UV)

UV light de-activates DNA in microbes preventing duplication. Feed water must be free of suspended solids which can "shadow" bacteria. UV does not leave a residual in treated water. Typically used for controlling feed water to an RO unit that cannot accept chlorine or heat.

Chlorine

Municipalities use chlorine at dosage levels of 0.2 to 2.0 ppm. Chlorine can adversely affect: polyamide membranes (oxidative deterioration), DI resins (degradation), and stainless steel (corrosion at elevated temperatures). Two principal methods of chlorine removal:

  • Activated Carbon — Removes chlorine by adsorption; bed depths of 2-3 feet at 2-4 gpm/ft3. Creates perfect conditions for microbial growth: slow flow in warm media with nutrients. Heat sanitization (190°F hot water) required daily to weekly.
  • Reduction — Sodium bisulfite reduces chlorine to chloride: SO3- + Cl2 + H2O → 2Cl- + 2H+ + SO4=

Chloramines

Chloramines (formed by chlorine + ammonia) are longer-acting disinfectants. Removal by carbon requires hydraulic rates 3-6X less than for chlorine. Removal results in dissociation to ammonium ion and ammonia. It may be desirable to locate the carbon bed before the water softener if chloramines are present.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：微生物控制的多層策略

前處理系統的微生物控制不是靠單一方法，而是多層防禦：

  • 持續性控制：氯/氯胺（進水端）、UV（無氯環境）
  • 週期性控制：定期消毒（熱、化學、再生）
  • 設計控制：避免死角、維持循環、溫度管理（<15°C 或 >80°C）

重點提示：活性碳 -- 最大的矛盾

活性碳是前處理中最矛盾的設備：它去除氯（保護下游膜），但同時也去除了抑制微生物的武器。結果就是：

  • 碳床本身成為微生物的溫床（慢流速 + 暖溫 + 營養物質 = 完美培養基）
  • 必須定期熱消毒：每日到每週 1-2 次，用 190°F（88°C）熱水或蒸汽
  • 消毒後需要沖洗去除碳粉（fines）

這就是為什麼活性碳的位置和消毒計畫是水系統設計的關鍵決策之一。

氯胺 vs. 氯的去除差異

氯胺比氯難去除 3-6 倍！如果你的市政水源使用氯胺消毒：

  • 碳床需要 3-6 倍的接觸時間（床體更大或流速更低）
  • 去除後會產生銨離子（NH4+）和氨（NH3），需要後續離子交換去除
  • 碳床可能需要放在軟化器之前（而非通常的之後），讓軟化器順便去除銨離子

設計時務必先確認水源是使用氯還是氯胺消毒。

CO2 加壓停機法 -- 創新做法

這是一個聰明的節能方案：在停機期間用 CO2 加壓（2-4 bar），同時達成三個目標：

  1. 降低 pH 到 <5.5 -- 抑制微生物生長
  2. 溶解碳酸鈣等結垢物質 -- 清洗 RO 膜
  3. 節省停機期間的水和電力消耗

啟動前只需將酸性水和溶解的鹽類沖掉即可。如果停機頻率與 RO 結垢頻率匹配，甚至可能省掉軟化器。

11.4.5-11.4.6 pH, Carbon Dioxide & Feed Water pH（pH、二氧化碳與進水 pH 管理）

Original Text

11.4.5 pH and Carbon Dioxide

pH, the negative log of the hydrogen ion concentration, affects the chemistry of the water: it can tell us if the water will corrode piping or if contaminants (carbonates) are likely to precipitate and cause scaling.

Free carbon dioxide in water is produced by decay of organic matter, dissolution from underground sources, and solution from the atmosphere. In high purity water, low levels of CO2 from the atmosphere can cause pH to drop from 7.0 to 5.5 and conductivity to increase from 0.1 μS to 1 μS.

The equilibrium between carbonate, bicarbonate, and carbon dioxide is affected by pH. As pH is lowered, equilibrium shifts toward CO2. As pH is increased, equilibrium shifts toward bicarbonate and then carbonate.

11.4.6 Importance of Feed Water pH

EPA drinking water standards require pH within 6.5-8.5. Key considerations:

  • If feed pH < 8.3, analyze for CO2 — the lower the pH from 8.3, the higher the dissolved CO2 potential.
  • CO2 passes directly through pretreatment and RO membrane, depressing conductivity and pH, making it difficult to meet USP requirements.
  • Feed pH 6-10: RO has potential for hardness scaling. Adding acid controls scale but creates CO2; adding base converts bicarbonate to carbonate, removed by RO but may cause scaling.
  • Most pharmaceutical companies use ion exchange softening to prevent scaling in RO.
  • Chloramine in feed water can result in ammonia, which affects conductivity and pH in final product.

Common pH adjustment chemicals: sulfuric acid (readily available, less corrosive) and sodium hydroxide (readily available, sodium removed by final treatment).

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：pH-碳酸鹽平衡系統

這是水化學中最關鍵的平衡之一，直接影響水系統設計：

  • pH < 5.5：幾乎全部是 CO2（中性氣體），可以用脫氣塔去除
  • pH 5.5-8.3：CO2 和 HCO3- 共存
  • pH 8.3-10：幾乎全部是 HCO3-（離子），可以被 RO 或離子交換去除
  • pH > 10：主要是 CO32-

設計前處理系統時，要根據 pH 決定用什麼方法處理碳酸鹽系統。

重點提示：CO2 對製藥用水的致命影響

CO2 是一個「隱形殺手」：

  • 它可以直接穿透 RO 膜（因為是中性分子，不帶電荷）
  • 微量 CO2 就能讓純水 pH 從 7.0 降到 5.5，電導率從 0.1 μS 升到 1 μS
  • 這可能導致水質無法通過 USP 電導率測試
  • 對兩段式 RO 系統，即使微量 CO2 也可能無法產出 <1 μS 的水

因此，了解進水 pH 和 CO2 含量是系統設計的第一步。

比喻說明：pH 調整如同交通疏導

想像碳酸鹽系統中的三種形態（CO2、HCO3-、CO32-）是三條道路上的車流。

加酸 = 把所有車都引導到「CO2 高速公路」上，然後用脫氣塔這個「出口匝道」把車送走。缺點：出口擁擠時（高 CO2），部分車輛會「溜進」RO 系統。

加鹼 = 把車都引導到「碳酸鹽大道」上，RO 膜可以攔截離子態的車輛。缺點：太多車聚集可能「堵車」（結垢）。

因此多數藥廠選擇「軟化器」先去除容易結垢的鈣鎂，再讓 RO 處理剩餘離子。

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 你的進水 pH 為 7.2，總硬度 200 ppm，CO2 測試為 35 ppm。這對下游 RO 系統會造成什麼挑戰？你會建議什麼前處理組合？
  2. 為什麼 ISPE 建議在 RO 進水前將 pH 調到 8.0-8.5？這樣做有什麼潛在風險？
11.5 Final Treatment: Ion Exchange for Purified Water（最終處理：離子交換）

Original Text

11.5.1.1 Ion Exchange Use in USP Systems

The primary purpose of ion exchange equipment in USP high purity water systems is to satisfy the ionic quality portion of the specification. Ion exchange can effectively reduce organics with proper resin selection, but may not meet USP TOC requirements without additional membrane processes where high feed water TOC levels exist.

11.5.1.2 Functionality

Cation Exchange: Exchange of cations (Ca, Mg, Na, etc.) for hydrogen ion (H+). Regenerated with dilute acid (H2SO4 or HCl). All salts converted to corresponding acids.

Anion Exchange: Exchange of anions (SO4=, HCO3-, Cl-, etc.) for hydroxide ions (OH-). Regenerated with NaOH. Following cation exchange, this completely demineralizes water.

Strongly ionized resins: Greater affinity for all ionized constituents, capable of removing weakly ionized species (acetates, silica). Capacities: 18 and 14 kgs as CaCO3 per ft3 for cation and anion respectively.

Weakly ionized resins: Ineffective at removing weakly ionized constituents but have 2-3X the exchange capacity and can be regenerated more efficiently.

Two-bed deionizers: Separate columns for cation and anion resin. Simple regeneration. Types: co-current (regeneration same direction as process water) and counter-current (opposite direction; produces higher quality water with ~50% less chemicals).

Mixed-bed deionizers: One column with both resins intimately mixed. Functions as infinite series of two-bed exchangers. Superior removal of monovalent ions. More complex regeneration requiring resin separation and mixing.

11.5.1.3 Operating Parameters

ParameterTwo-Bed Co-CurrentTwo-Bed Counter-CurrentMixed-Bed
Product Water (μS/cm)2.0-10.00.2-2.00.055-1.0
Acid/Caustic (lbs/ft3)6-846-8
Flow Rate (gpm/ft2)5-105-155-25
Temperature °F (°C)40-140 (4-60)40-140 (4-60)40-140 (4-60)

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：離子交換的完整去離子化

前處理中的「軟化」只用陽離子交換（Na 型），而最終處理中的離子交換是完整的去離子化：

  1. 陽離子交換（H+ 型）：Ca2+, Mg2+, Na+ → H+（水變成含酸的溶液）
  2. 陰離子交換（OH- 型）：SO42-, Cl-, HCO3- → OH-
  3. H+ + OH- → H2O（純水）

這就是「去離子」（Deionization / DI）的基本原理。

重點提示：Two-Bed vs. Mixed-Bed 的選擇

  • Two-bed（雙床）：再生簡單，適合大量處理。逆流再生型可產出 0.2 μS/cm 的水，化學品用量減半。
  • Mixed-bed（混床）：產出水質最好（可達 0.055 μS/cm，接近純水理論值 0.055），但再生複雜（需要分離、混合樹脂）。
  • 常見配置是 RO + Mixed-bed polisher：RO 去除 90-99% 離子，混床做最後把關。

Counter-Current vs. Co-Current 再生

逆流再生（Counter-Current）是現代離子交換的優選：

  • 化學品用量減少約 50%
  • 產出水質更高
  • 原理：再生液從出水端進入，最後接觸最乾淨的樹脂層，確保出水端永遠是最新鮮的樹脂

比喻說明：Mixed-bed 如同咖啡混合豆

Two-bed 像是先喝一杯酸咖啡（陽離子交換後的酸性水），再喝一杯鹼咖啡（陰離子交換後的鹼性水），最後在嘴裡中和。

Mixed-bed 像是把兩種咖啡豆磨在一起沖泡：每一口都同時中和酸鹼，所以每一口的品質都極高。這就是為什麼 Mixed-bed 的產出水質遠優於 Two-bed。

11.5.1.4-11.5.1.10 Ion Exchange Components, Regeneration & Sanitization（離子交換組件、再生與消毒）

Original Text

11.5.1.4 Component Description

An ion exchange system comprises: tank(s), ion exchange resin, piping and valve system, water/chemical distributors internal to tank(s), regeneration system, and conductivity or resistivity meter. Available in on-site regenerable and off-site regenerable (rechargeable) versions.

Tanks may be constructed from fiberglass, stainless steel, or carbon steel with inert interior lining (vulcanized rubber or PVC). Off-site units: fiberglass or light gauge SS, sizes <1 ft3 to 50 ft3 per tank.

11.5.1.5 Tanks

For pharmaceutical applications, tanks rarely need to be more than 3-4 feet (0.91-1.22 m) in diameter with straight shells of 6-8 feet (1.82-2.44 m). Steel tanks welded per ASME Code for operating pressures between 100-150 psig (7-10.5 kgs/cm2).

11.5.1.6 Distributors

Each tank includes distributors at all pipe-to-tank interfaces. Required to prevent resin escape and provide adequate flow distribution. Materials: stainless steel, PVC, CPVC, polypropylene, or PVDF. Structural integrity is a key design element — a ruptured distributor can cause significant resin loss.

11.5.1.7 Piping and Valves

Most systems use Schedule 80 PVC or CPVC. Specialty plastics (polypropylene, PVDF) offer lower organic leachables. Stainless steel offers structural integrity and hot water/steam sanitization capability, but is more vulnerable to corrosion from acid/caustic.

11.5.1.8 Regeneration System

Requires chemical pumps/eductors, chemical tanks, piping, and instrumentation. Positive displacement pumps driven by electric motors or compressed air are ideally suited.

11.5.1.9 Microbiological Concerns

Regeneration of resin beds effectively sanitizes the system; however, as resin exhausts, pH approaches neutral, and organic matter fosters bacteria growth. Regeneration frequency is critical for systems without auxiliary microbiological control (UV lights). Polishing systems positioned with sub-micron filters and UV may operate several weeks without regeneration.

11.5.1.10 Advantages and Disadvantages

Advantages: Flexibility in flow rate; consistent Stage 1 conductivity; regeneration doubles as microbial control; extensive installed base.

Disadvantages: Acid/caustic storage and handling; waste neutralization; reduced ability to reduce dissolved organics vs. membrane systems.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：On-site vs. Off-site 再生

這是離子交換系統設計的第一個決策點：

項目On-site 再生Off-site 再生
適用大流量、連續供水小流量、間歇使用
資本成本高（複雜管閥系統）低（簡易槽體）
化學品處理需要現場酸鹼外包處理
法規風險廢水中和管理較低

重點提示：分配器是隱藏的關鍵

Distributor（分配器）是離子交換槽中最容易被忽略但最關鍵的零件：

  • 功能：防止樹脂洩漏 + 均勻分配水流
  • 材質選擇：SS、PVC、CPVC、PP、PVDF
  • 破裂的分配器 = 災難：大量樹脂洩漏、修復耗時、可能汙染下游系統

設計時要特別注意結構強度，定期檢查是維護重點。

管材選擇的取捨

  • PVC/CPVC：低成本、耐腐蝕，但有機物溶出較多
  • PP/PVDF：有機物溶出低，管路設計可接近衛生級不鏽鋼焊接，但成本更高
  • 不鏽鋼：結構強、可熱消毒，但接觸酸鹼有腐蝕風險

選擇取決於預算、產品水質要求、以及消毒方式。如果需要熱消毒 → 不鏽鋼；如果重視低溶出 → PVDF。

微生物控制與再生頻率

離子交換系統的微生物控制策略是「以再生代替消毒」：酸鹼再生液（極端 pH）本身就能殺菌。

但隨著樹脂耗竭，pH 趨近中性，加上有機物沉積，微生物就會開始增長。因此：

  • 沒有 UV 輔助的系統：再生頻率必須考量微生物因素，不能只看離子耗竭程度
  • 有 UV + 微過濾的系統（polishing）：可以延長再生週期到數週
11.5.2 Reverse Osmosis (RO) for High Purity Water Applications（高純水用逆滲透系統）

Original Text

11.5.2.1 Description

RO is a pressure driven process utilizing a semi-permeable membrane capable of removing dissolved organic and inorganic contaminants. Commercial membranes available in spiral wound and hollow fiber configurations. Two basic materials:

  • Cellulose acetate (CA) — Oldest commercially; lowest initial cost; chlorine tolerant; disadvantages include fastest loss of rejection, requires pH 5-6, and free chlorine in feed stream. Higher pressure (300-500 psig) and temperature (60-80°F).
  • Thin film composite (TFC/polyamide) — Highest rejection; works at low temperatures (40°F+) and low pressure (150 psig+); intolerant of chlorine. Majority of pharmaceutical systems use TFC membranes.

Most spiral wound membranes incorporate a brine seal at the leading end. The seal can cause bacterial problems due to stagnant water conditions. Some membranes are produced without a brine seal ("loose wrap" or "full fit") — superior for pharmaceutical RO units as bacterial contamination is minimized.

11.5.2.2 Application

RO can be utilized upstream of deionizers to reduce chemical consumption, or as product staged (two-pass) RO to produce water meeting USP TOC and conductivity requirements. Some installations produce Stage 1 conductivity (on-line measurement); others pass Stage 2 or 3 (laboratory testing).

11.5.2.3 Instrumentation and Control

Even small changes in feed pH can have dramatic effects on final conductivity. Monitoring parameters: feed/permeate conductivity, permeate flow, waste flow, feed temperature, pressures (feed, concentrate, permeate). Instruments must be calibrated, NIST traceable. Protective devices for pumps (low suction) and membranes (high pressure, high temperature).

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：RO 膜材質的選擇

這是 RO 系統設計的第一個也是最重要的決策：

特性醋酸纖維素 (CA)薄膜複合 (TFC)
去除率中等最高
耐氯性可耐氯不耐氯
操作壓力300-500 psig150+ psig
pH 範圍5-6（受限）較寬
使用壽命較短較長
製藥使用率少多數系統使用

結論：TFC 膜是製藥的主流選擇，但前提是必須先去除氯。

重點提示：Brine Seal 的微生物風險

傳統 RO 膜元件前端的 brine seal（鹽水密封圈）會在膜與壓力容器之間創造滯留水區，成為微生物溫床。

製藥級 RO 系統應優先選用無 brine seal 的膜（loose wrap / full fit），允許少量受控水流通過膜與容器之間，消除滯留區。

兩段式 RO（Product Staged）的架構

單段 RO 通常無法達到 USP 純水標準。兩段式 RO 的水路：

原水 → 前處理 → 第一段 RO（去除 90-99%）→ 第二段 RO（再去除 90-99%）→ 產品水

兩段式 RO 的產出水電阻率通常可達 0.5 MΩ/cm 以上，足以符合 USP Purified Water。部分系統甚至能通過 Stage 1 電導率測試（可線上量測）。

RO 系統的關鍵監測參數

  • 進水/產水電導率 → 計算即時去除率
  • 產水流量 + 廢水流量 → 回收率
  • 進水溫度 → 影響膜通量
  • 壓力（進水/濃水/產水） → 膜狀態指標
  • 膜間壓力 + 電導率 → 結垢和劣化指標
  • ORP / 殘氯 → 保護 TFC 膜

所有儀表必須校正且可追溯至 NIST。

11.5.2.4-11.5.2.8 RO Limitations, Scaling, Cleaning & Performance（RO 限制、結垢、清洗與效能）

Original Text

11.5.2.4 Limitations

RO cannot remove 100% of contaminants and has very low removal capability for some extremely low molecular weight dissolved organics. A concentrate flow is always necessary. Typical recovery: 75%; small units may be lower; large systems up to 85%.

Carbon dioxide passes directly through the RO membrane — for design purposes, CO2 will be in the product at the same level as in the feed. Excess CO2 in product may cause quality problems or increase anion resin loading.

Present RO technology requires ambient operation with occasional sanitization. Operating at ambient temperatures can result in biological growth. The inability to continuously operate at high temperature (80°C) is the most significant factor limiting RO use in WFI applications.

Performance is dependent on numerous O-rings between membrane elements and housings. O-ring slippage may result in poor water quality, detected by high conductivity.

11.5.2.5 Scaling

Scale formation is predicted by calculation using concentrate stream levels of calcium, alkalinity, TDS, and temperature. Proper pH to operate without antiscalant is minimum 0.5 pH units below the scaling pH.

Antiscalant chemicals increase the time necessary for crystal formation of precipitate. Various membranes have different maximum operating temperatures. Many systems utilize feed water preheating to optimize membrane area and minimize pumping energy.

11.5.2.6 Cleaning and Sanitization

Virtually all RO units need periodic cleaning. Acid cleaners for metals/salts; alkaline detergent for silt/organics. Cleaning frequency should not exceed four times per year if pretreatment is working properly. Chlorine tolerant membranes: chlorine solutions. Non-chlorine tolerant: peracetic acid/hydrogen peroxide. Some membranes allow thermal sanitization at 80°C.

11.5.2.7 Purification Capability

Single stage RO reduces raw water salts by 90-99%; colloids, bacteria, endotoxin reduced by 1-3 logs. Single pass may not meet USP Purified Water. Product staged (two-pass) RO can produce water exceeding USP PW or WFI in most applications, typically ≥0.5 MΩ/cm.

11.5.2.8 Performance

Sufficient membrane area is required. SDI reading of 3 or less is recommended. Higher membrane area for fixed flow = lower fouling rate (though recovery is a factor). Design must optimize membrane area vs. maintenance and cleaning requirements.

Advantages: Reduces/eliminates chemical handling; better TOC reduction than IX alone; membrane barrier to bacteria, endotoxin, organics, salts.

Disadvantages: Water consumption (high waste flow); maintenance can be expensive if pretreatment does not properly handle raw water changes.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：RO 的四大限制

  1. CO2 穿透：中性分子直接通過膜，影響產水電導率和 pH
  2. 無法 100% 去除：始終需要濃水排放（通常 25%），且極低分子量有機物難去除
  3. 不能持續高溫運行：常溫運行有微生物生長風險，這是 RO 在 WFI 應用中最大的限制
  4. O-ring 洩漏風險：膜元件之間的密封圈鬆脫會導致水質急劇下降

重點提示：清洗頻率是前處理品質的指標

ISPE 明確指出：如果前處理系統設計和運作正常，RO 清洗頻率不應超過每年 4 次。

如果你的 RO 清洗頻率明顯超過這個標準，問題不在 RO 本身，而在前處理系統。需要回頭檢查：

  • 軟化器是否正常再生？（硬度結垢）
  • 碳床是否有效去除有機物？（有機物汙堵）
  • 微粒過濾是否到位？（SDI > 3？）
  • 進水 pH 是否在正確範圍？

RO 效能關鍵計算

Recovery (回收率) = 產水流量 / 進水流量 x 100%
  典型值：75%（小型可能更低，大型可達 85%）

Salt Rejection (鹽去除率) = (1 - 產水電導率/進水電導率) x 100%
  單段：90-99%
  兩段串聯：99-99.9%

SDI (淤泥密度指數) 目標值：
  理想值 < 3
  最大可接受值 < 5

比喻說明：RO 清洗如同汽車保養

酸洗 = 用除鏽劑清除鈣鎂結垢（如同去除車底盤鏽蝕）

鹼洗 = 用清潔劑去除有機物和淤泥（如同清洗引擎油垢）

通常兩者依序執行確保徹底清洗。如果你的車需要每個月進廠大修，不是車的問題，而是路的問題（前處理不佳）。

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 你的兩段式 RO 系統產水電導率突然從 1.2 μS/cm 升到 8 μS/cm，可能的原因是什麼？你會先檢查什麼？
  2. 為什麼 ISPE 指出 RO 在 WFI 應用中使用有限？如果你的公司想用兩段式 RO 取代蒸餾產 WFI，需要額外解決什麼問題？
  3. 一個 RO 系統在 85% 回收率下運行，與 75% 回收率相比，對膜壽命和清洗頻率會有什麼影響？
Section Summary（本節總結）

Key Takeaways

Pretreatment Process Summary

  • Barrier filtration: Used as "final clean-up" before RO; target SDI < 5
  • Water softening: Ion exchange (Na-form) removes Ca/Mg hardness to prevent scaling
  • Problem ions: Iron (valence change), Silica (multiple forms), Aluminum (pH-dependent solubility)
  • Acidification/degasification: Alternative to softener for high-flow/high-hardness applications
  • Nanofiltration: "Softening membrane" at lower pressure than RO
  • Organics control: Dual concern — incoming contamination AND internal growth
  • Microbial control: Multi-layer approach (chlorine, UV, heat, design)
  • pH/CO2 management: Critical for downstream RO/IX performance

Final Treatment Summary

  • Ion exchange: Two-bed (simple) vs. Mixed-bed (highest quality); co-current vs. counter-current regeneration
  • RO: TFC membranes preferred; two-pass for USP PW; recovery ~75%
  • RO limitations: CO2 pass-through; cannot run continuously at 80°C; O-ring risks
  • Cleaning indicator: >4 cleanings/year = pretreatment problem

學習重點回顧

本節核心心得

  1. 前處理決定最終處理的壽命：前處理做得好，RO 膜用 3-5 年；做不好，每季就要清洗甚至更換。
  2. 水源分析是起點：井水 vs. 地表水、硬度、鐵/矽/鋁含量、氯 vs. 氯胺——這些決定了整個前處理的架構。
  3. 氯的矛盾：要靠氯控制微生物，但氯又會破壞下游膜和樹脂。去除氯的時機和方法是關鍵設計決策。
  4. CO2 不可忽視：它穿透 RO 膜、影響電導率、增加離子交換負擔。pH 管理直接影響 CO2 行為。
  5. IX vs. RO 的選擇：IX 化學品處理複雜但流量彈性大；RO 減少化學品但有廢水和微生物問題。多數現代系統採用 RO + IX polisher 組合。

綜合練習 Comprehensive Practice

你被要求設計一套製藥純化水系統，水源條件如下：

  • 市政自來水，使用氯胺消毒（0.8 ppm）
  • 硬度：180 ppm as CaCO3
  • 鐵：0.3 ppm（可溶態）
  • pH：7.8
  • TOC：2.5 ppm
  • 需求流量：40 gpm

請規劃完整的前處理 + 最終處理流程，說明每個單元的選型理由和關鍵設計參數。

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems

Appendix 11.4-11.5: Pretreatment Processes & Final Treatment Details | p186-p205

SterileGMP Knowledge Hub — Bilingual Educational Reference

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems | p206-p210

Learning Objectives / 學習目標

  1. Understand the thermal efficiency metrics (Performance Ratio and Thermal Economy) for distillation systems / 理解蒸餾系統的熱效率指標（效能比與熱經濟性）
  2. Compare energy consumption across Single Effect (SE), Multi-Effect (ME), and Vapor Compression (VC) distillers / 比較單效、多效及蒸氣壓縮蒸餾器的能耗
  3. Explain water recovery ratios and the factors that limit recovery / 說明水回收比及限制回收率的因素
  4. Describe the economics and thermodynamics of adding effects in ME design / 描述多效設計中增加效數的經濟性與熱力學
  5. Identify the problems caused by non-condensable gases and the role of deaeration / 辨識不可凝氣體的危害及脫氣的作用
  6. Interpret typical water analysis data and compare operating costs between ME and VC systems / 解讀典型水質分析資料並比較 ME 與 VC 系統運行成本

11.6 Distillation for High Purity Water Systems / 高純度水系統蒸餾

Original Text

11.6.1 Thermal Efficiency of Distillation Systems

Heat losses from a distillation system are due to:

  • Radiation
  • Venting
  • Heat exiting with the blowdown and distillate streams which are at higher temperature than the feed
  • Heat exiting with cooling water

Because of these heat losses, it takes more than one pound of plant steam to produce one pound of WFI in a single effect distiller. For this reason, Multi-Effect distillers are used in order to improve the performance of the system.

The Performance Ratio (R) of a distiller is defined as the amount of distillate produced in relation to the amount of steam consumed, and is given by: R = Md/Ms, where

  • R = Performance Ratio (dimensionless)
  • Md = distillate produced (lbs)
  • Ms = steam consumed (lbs)

Another way to measure the performance of a distiller is often stated in terms of Thermal Economy (E). This is defined as the amount of distillate produced in relation to the amount of energy input, and can be given by: E = Md/1000 BTU heat input.

A typical single effect distiller, without feedwater pre-heating, has an R of about 0.82 and an E of about 0.89. Pre-heating of the feedwater in the condenser raises the R to 0.93 and the E to 0.96 respectively.

Feedwater pre-heaters are sometimes used to elevate the temperature of the feedwater prior to entering each effect in a ME system, and thereby reduce the steam requirements of the distiller.

Typical performance values for a 600-gph VC and 5-effect ME:

Parameter VC Cold VC Hot 5 ME Cold 5 ME Hot
Economy (lbs/1000 BTUs) 19.52* — 6.8 3.84
Performance Ratio (lbs distillate/lb steam) 27.67 — 7.11 3.39

* Economy takes into consideration the electrical energy consumption for the VC.

Commentary / 教學解說

蒸餾系統熱效率

核心概念：為什麼單效蒸餾不夠用？

蒸餾的基本原理很簡單：加熱水使其蒸發，再冷凝得到純水。但問題在於能量損失。單效蒸餾器（SE）的 Performance Ratio 只有 0.82，表示每消耗 1 磅蒸汽只能產出 0.82 磅 WFI，能量轉換率不到 100%。

多效蒸餾器（ME）的關鍵設計：讓前一效產生的蒸汽成為下一效的加熱源，「一份蒸汽做多次工」。

公式解讀

Performance Ratio:  R = Md / Ms
  R < 1 (單效)  →  效率低，每磅蒸汽不到一磅產出
  R > 1 (多效)  →  蒸汽被重複利用

Thermal Economy:    E = Md / 1000 BTU
  考慮的是「總能量輸入」而非「蒸汽量」
  VC 的 E 值最高（19.52），但它用的是電力非蒸汽

生活比喻：連鎖火鍋店的熱能利用

想像你在煮火鍋。單效蒸餾就像用一個爐子煮一鍋水，蒸汽直接排掉。多效蒸餾就像把第一鍋的蒸汽引導到第二鍋來加熱，再把第二鍋的蒸汽引到第三鍋⋯⋯同樣的燃料費，煮出更多鍋熱水。

VC 蒸餾則像是裝了「熱泵」，把排出的蒸汽壓縮升溫後再送回來用，幾乎不浪費。所以 VC 的效能比（R=27.67）遠超 5 效 ME（R=7.11）。

重點提示：VC vs ME 的數據解讀

  • VC 的 Economy（19.52）包含電力成本 — 不能直接跟 ME 的蒸汽比較
  • 5 效 ME Cold（6.8）vs Hot（3.84）— 熱系統的 Economy 反而較低，因為出水溫度高，帶走更多熱能
  • 預熱給水可將單效 R 從 0.82 提升到 0.93 — 這是最簡單的節能改善

11.6.2 Water Recovery / 水回收

Original Text

11.6.2 Water Recovery

A portion of the feedwater is continuously discharged to waste in order to limit the total dissolved solids content of the feedwater within the evaporator. That portion of feedwater not evaporated is termed blowdown, and is discharged continuously to waste.

The total quantity of feedwater (Mf) required is given by the sum of the distillate produced (Md) and the blowdown (Mb) discharged. The Recovery Ratio (Rc) of a distilling unit is determined by dividing the product rate (Md) by the feedwater rate (Mf).

Hence the Equations: Mf = Md + Mb and Rc = Md/Mf.

In order to minimize energy consumption and pre-treatment cost, it is desirable to have a high Rc. The Rc is limited by the scaling potential of the water. At low flow rates, it may be limited by practical considerations.

The higher the Total Dissolved Solids (TDS) of the feed, the lower is the recovery. With deionized feedwater, the recovery is 90%-95%. With softened feed, the recovery is typically 80%-85%.

Commentary / 教學解說

水回收率

質量平衡公式

Mf = Md + Mb
  Mf = 給水量 (feedwater)
  Md = 蒸餾水產量 (distillate)
  Mb = 排污量 (blowdown)

Rc = Md / Mf = 回收比
  去離子水給水：Rc = 90-95%
  軟化水給水：  Rc = 80-85%

核心概念：為什麼不能 100% 回收？

蒸餾器中的給水在蒸發過程中，鹽類和礦物質不會跟著水蒸汽走，會不斷濃縮。如果不排掉一部分高濃度水（blowdown），礦物質就會沉積結垢（scaling），破壞傳熱面、降低效率、甚至腐蝕設備。

這就是為什麼前處理品質直接決定回收率：

  • 去離子水（幾乎無礦物質）→ 可容忍更高濃縮倍數 → Rc 高達 95%
  • 軟化水（仍含 TDS）→ 結垢風險較高 → Rc 只有 80-85%

比喻：煮鹽水的鍋子

想像你持續往鍋裡加鹽水、蒸發取純水。鍋底的鹽越來越濃，最後會結出鹽巴。你必須定期倒掉一些濃鹽水（blowdown），才能繼續正常運作。給水越乾淨，你能蒸更久才需要「排污」。

實務影響

回收率直接影響運營成本：

  • 低回收率 = 更多給水消耗 + 更多前處理耗材 + 更多排污（廢水處理成本）
  • 投資更好的前處理（如 RO + EDI）雖然資本支出增加，但可提高蒸餾回收率、降低長期營運費用
  • 特別在水費昂貴或廢水排放受限的地區，高回收率的經濟效益更明顯

11.6.3 Number of Effects or Columns in an ME Design / 多效設計的效數選擇

Original Text

11.6.3 Number of Effects or Columns in an ME Design

Increasing the number of effects in an ME system does not result in increased output, but it reduces the amount of steam and cooling water required to produce the same amount of distillate, compared to a system with fewer effects.

In order to maintain a temperature difference for heat transfer between the vapor from one effect and the boiling liquid of the next effect, the pressure within each succeeding effect must be lower than its predecessor. The temperature and pressure are highest in the first effect, and are lowest in the condenser and the last effect, which are nearly at the same pressure and temperature.

In order to minimize the heat rejection requirements of the condenser, it is desirable to operate the system over the lowest temperature range possible. Additionally, a lower temperature operation reduces the potential for scaling and corrosion.

If we call the temperature at which the first effect operates the top temperature and the temperature of the condenser downstream of the last effect the bottom temperature, that constitutes the temperature range for the multi-effect distiller.

In a non-pharmaceutical application, the bottom temperature can be below the boiling point at the prevailing atmosphere, i.e., operation is under vacuum. This is not an acceptable practice for the production of WFI quality water because of the potential for air leak into the system. In addition, a low temperature, below that considered sanitary, is unacceptable.

The top temperature is dependent on the pressure of the heating steam, normally 100-125 psig, while the bottom temperature is dependent on the condenser pressure, which is normally 7-10 psig.

The temperature range and equipment cost limit the number of effects that are justifiable. The fixed charges for additional effects ultimately dissipate the savings in energy. It is important to note that there is a certain amount of variety in the designs of multiple effect distillers, and that although their geometry may differ, they are thermodynamically all the same.

The larger the output of the system and the higher the cost of steam, the more economically justifiable it is to increase the number of effects.

Typical ME systems have 3-5 effects, and some have as many as 8 effects.

Commentary / 教學解說

多效設計效數選擇

核心概念：效數越多越好嗎？

很多人直覺認為「效數越多 = 效率越高 = 越好」，但 ISPE 明確指出：增加效數不會增加產量，只會減少蒸汽和冷卻水消耗。而且存在經濟平衡點：

  • 每增加一效 = 多一組蒸發器、管路、控制系統 = 更高的設備成本與維護費用
  • 當設備固定成本超過節省的能源費用時，再加效數就不划算了
  • 業界典型：3-5 效為主流，8 效為上限

比喻：公車接駁

把每一效想成公車站。蒸汽是乘客從第一站上車，每站都有部分乘客（能量）下車做功。站越多，每位乘客利用率越高。但每多一站就要多蓋一個站牌和候車亭（設備成本），到某個程度就不值得了。

製藥限制：不能用真空操作

非製藥用蒸餾器可在真空下操作（底溫低於大氣壓沸點），但製藥用 WFI 蒸餾器不允許，原因：

  • 負壓 = 空氣滲漏風險 — 外部空氣帶入微生物污染
  • 低溫 = 不衛生 — 溫度過低無法抑制微生物生長
  • 因此底溫受限於冷凝器壓力（7-10 psig），頂溫受限於進汽壓力（100-125 psig）

這個溫度範圍就是 ME 設計中分配各效溫差的「總預算」。效數越多，每效分到的溫差越小，傳熱驅動力越低。

設計決策指引

選擇效數時的關鍵考量：

  • 產量大 + 蒸汽貴 → 效數增加有經濟效益（如 6-8 效）
  • 產量小 + 蒸汽便宜 → 3-4 效已足夠
  • 不同廠家設計外觀可能不同，但熱力學原理完全相同

11.6.4 Non-Condensable Gases, Venting, and Deaeration / 不可凝氣體、排氣與脫氣

Original Text

11.6.4 Non-Condensable, Venting, and Deaeration

Non-condensable gases such as carbon dioxide and oxygen are dissolved within the feedwater and become liberated as the temperature of the water increases. These gases, if they are not removed, have two detrimental effects on distillation units:

  1. Since the gases are non-condensable, they can blanket the heat transfer surface and inhibit heat transfer in the condenser and evaporator. This translates into reduced output.
  2. These gases are corrosive and will contribute to the pitting, embrittlement, and cracking of stainless steel.

For these reasons, it is imperative for designers and operators to ensure proper and adequate venting of the distilling unit.

The steam carries non-condensables that are liberated from the raw water during evaporation. The gases do not travel alone and will not be vented without the associated steam.

There are two characteristics of non-condensable liberated by ordinary waters which allow designers to locate and vent these gases from an evaporator or condenser:

  • Oxygen and carbon dioxide are significantly heavier than the associated steam, and therefore collect mostly at the bottom.
  • Non-condensable gases tend to migrate to the coldest surface they can find.

Considering the points above, the gases liberated in each effect are processed through the bottom of each effect with the distillate and make their way to the final condenser which is vented along its length. Operators should ensure that a steady stream of steam is exiting the distiller vent at all times.

Improper venting and/or a malfunctioning distillate level control can result in CO2 being pulled into the distillate pump suction and processed across the conductivity cell, resulting in high conductivity reading.

Commentary / 教學解說

不可凝氣體與排氣

核心概念：不可凝氣體的雙重危害

CO2 和 O2 溶解在給水中，加熱時會釋放出來。這些氣體「不可凝」，意思是它們不會像水蒸汽一樣在冷凝器中變成液體，而是以氣態佔據空間：

  • 效率降低：氣體像毯子一樣覆蓋在傳熱面上（gas blanketing），阻隔蒸汽與冷凝面的接觸，降低傳熱效率
  • 腐蝕：CO2 溶於水形成碳酸，O2 直接促進氧化 → 不鏽鋼的點蝕（pitting）、脆化（embrittlement）、應力腐蝕裂紋（SCC）

比喻：浴室鏡子上的霧氣

想像冬天洗熱水澡時，鏡子上蒙了一層霧氣（水蒸汽凝結）。現在如果有人在浴室裡噴了一層保鮮膜在鏡子上（不可凝氣體），水蒸汽就無法接觸鏡面、無法凝結。對蒸餾器來說，這層「保鮮膜」讓冷凝器失效，產量下降。

操作關鍵：排氣的正確做法

  • 持續排氣：蒸餾器排氣口必須隨時有蒸汽穩定排出，代表不可凝氣體正在被帶走
  • 位置設計：CO2 和 O2 比蒸汽重，傾向沉降至底部並往冷面遷移 → 排氣點設在底部和冷凝器沿線
  • 故障排查：如果蒸餾水電導率突然升高，首先檢查排氣是否正常 — CO2 被吸入蒸餾水中會溶解為碳酸，直接拉高電導率讀數

11.6.4.1 Deaerator (Decarbonator) / 脫氣器（脫碳器）

Original Text

11.6.4.1 Deaerator (also called Decarbonator)

All feed waters have dissolved gases the amount of which depends on water temperature, composition, and pH. The latter is dependent on the type of pretreatment used. Other gases occur due to the breakdown of some of the constituents during heating, as is the case of alkalinity.

It is very desirable, whenever practical, to remove the gases from the feed waters prior to entry into the evaporator in order to minimize corrosion and to improve heat transfer. This is often done in VC distillers, where a deaerator is installed between the feed heater and the evaporator.

Because of the configuration and relatively high operating pressure of the ME, it is difficult to incorporate a deaerator within the system. A stand-alone deaerator will be costly, and therefore is not included.

A typical VC deaerator consists of a cylindrical tower in which stripping steam and feedwater flow counter current to one another. Prior to entering the deaerator, the feedwater has been pre-heated in the blowdown cooler, distillate cooler, and feedwater pre-heater.

As the temperature of the feedwater increases, the non-condensable contained within the feed have a greater tendency to become liberated. Entering the deaerator at a temperature greater than 93°C, the feedwater is sprayed through a nozzle, which disperses the water in the shape of a cone to maximize the contact area with the counter current stripping steam.

The majority of gases within the feedwater are liberated at this point, and are vented to atmosphere. The evaporator vent is the source of the stripping steam which provides additional heating to the feedwater, prior to entering the evaporator. Deaerators are usually constructed of stainless steel.

Commentary / 教學解說

脫氣器功能與設計

核心概念：脫氣器的工作原理

脫氣器本質上是一個氣液逆流接觸塔：

  1. 給水從頂部噴入（錐形噴嘴增加接觸面積）
  2. 汽提蒸汽從底部向上流動
  3. 兩者逆流接觸，蒸汽將溶解氣體「帶走」
  4. 脫氣後的給水從底部進入蒸發器
  5. 帶走的氣體從頂部排至大氣

關鍵條件：給水須先預熱至 >93°C，因為溫度越高，氣體溶解度越低、越容易脫出。

ME vs VC 的差異

這是一個重要的系統設計差異：

  • VC 蒸餾器：容易內建脫氣器（操作壓力較低，配置較靈活）
  • ME 蒸餾器：因高壓操作和多效串聯結構，很難內建脫氣器；外掛獨立脫氣器成本太高，通常省略

這意味著 ME 系統更依賴正確的排氣設計來處理蒸發過程中釋放的不可凝氣體。

比喻：打開汽水瓶

冷的汽水開瓶時只有些微氣泡。但如果你先把汽水加熱再開瓶，氣泡會劇烈噴出 — 這就是脫氣器利用的原理。給水預熱到 93°C 以上再噴入脫氣塔，溶解的 CO2 和 O2 就像搖過的汽水一樣快速釋出。

11.6.5 Typical Water Analysis Data / 典型水質分析資料

Original Text

11.6.5 Typical Water Analysis

The table below provides typical water analysis of a feed source for a high-purity water distillation system, and is used to compare pretreatment and operating cost for a 5-effect ME with a VC.

Feedwater Analysis — City of Ocala, FL. Plant Effluent

Constituent mg/l Constituent mg/l
Calcium38Nitrate1.1
Chlorine13Sodium8.1
Bicarbonate (HCO3)1.2Sulfate111
Fluoride0.7Carbon Dioxide0.2
Iron0.026Zinc0.026
Magnesium14.0pH8.2
TDS: 157 mg/l 

High Purity Water Production Costs — 600 GPH

Consumables 5ME (82°C) VC (82°C) 5ME (30°C) VC (30°C)
Steam (lbs/hr)1,4717001,471180
Electricity (kW)1.526.51.526.5
Regenerant (lb/yr)—17,520—17,520
Acid (lb/yr)32,143—32,143—
Caustic (lb/yr)30,917—30,917—
Cooling Water (gpm)18—32—

Associated Costs (US$/year, based on 7000 hr/yr operation)

Cost Item 5ME (82°C) VC (82°C) 5ME (30°C) VC (30°C)
Steam$79,802$37,975$79,802$9,765
Electricity$736$13,000$736$13,000
Regenerant—$876—$876
Acid$1,928—$1,928—
Caustic$4,019—$4,019—
Cooling Water$1,513—$2,688—
Running Cost ($/year)$87,998$51,851$89,173$23,641
Cost ($/1000 gal)$20.95$12.34$21.23$5.63

Utility costs basis: Steam $7.75/1000 lbs, Electricity $0.07/kWh, NaOH $0.13/lb, Brine $0.05/lb, HCl $0.06/lb, Cooling water $0.20/1000 gal.

Commentary / 教學解說

水質分析與成本比較

核心概念：給水水質決定系統選擇

這個範例使用美國佛羅里達州 Ocala 市的自來水，TDS 157 mg/l，屬於中等硬度水質。注意幾個關鍵成分：

  • Calcium 38 mg/l + Magnesium 14 mg/l = 高硬度 → 結垢風險高
  • Sulfate 111 mg/l = 主要陰離子，影響前處理選擇
  • Chlorine 13 mg/l = 較高氯含量，ME 系統需特別注意腐蝕
  • pH 8.2 = 微鹼性，碳酸鈣結垢傾向

重點：成本差異驚人

同樣 600 GPH 產量，運行成本差異極大：

  • 熱系統（82°C）：VC $12.34 vs ME $20.95 per 1000 gal — VC 便宜 41%
  • 冷系統（30°C）：VC $5.63 vs ME $21.23 per 1000 gal — VC 便宜 73%
  • VC 在冷系統的優勢最為明顯，因為 ME 無論出水溫度如何，蒸汽消耗不變（1,471 lbs/hr）

成本結構解析

ME 和 VC 的成本結構完全不同：

  • ME：蒸汽是最大成本（佔 ~91%），電力極低（$736/年）。需要酸鹼前處理。
  • VC：電力是最大成本（$13,000/年），蒸汽用量低得多。需要鹽水再生。無需冷卻水。

選擇時的關鍵因素：你的廠區蒸汽便宜還是電力便宜？有些工廠有多餘廢蒸汽可利用，此時 ME 更有優勢。反之，電力充沛的地區 VC 更經濟。

前處理差異

  • ME 需要：酸（HCl 32,143 lb/yr）+ 鹼（NaOH 30,917 lb/yr）→ 化學品處理量大，環保壓力大
  • VC 需要：鹽水再生劑（17,520 lb/yr）→ 化學品用量較少，較易管理
  • VC 不需冷卻水（自身蒸氣壓縮循環散熱），ME 則需要 18-32 gpm 冷卻水

11.6.5.1 Comparisons / ME 與 VC 綜合比較

Original Text

11.6.5.1 Comparisons

ME can be used as a standby clean steam generator; VC cannot be used because of the lower steam pressure.

Pretreatment: VC does not require as much pretreatment as ME. See Baseline pretreatment in the main chapter.

Size Selection: The cost of the VC does not scale down as well as the ME. VC is not offered in less than 100 gph, and equipment cost is most competitive with ME in the 300 gph and above.

For a hot (80°C) system, an 8-effect ME will approximately match the thermal economy of a VC. For an ambient system, it takes 24 effects to match the economy of VC. Obviously, such number of effects is not practical.

Chlorine Attack: Although the VC still is much more forgiving because it operates at lower temperature, it also is subject to stress corrosion cracking caused by the chlorine. However, at very low chlorine levels, the problems may not appear until after years of operation.

At the relatively high temperature of the ME, the attack is very rapid, and failure may occur in weeks or months.

Commentary / 教學解說

ME vs VC 綜合比較

系統選擇決策表

比較項目ME（多效）VC（蒸氣壓縮）
備用清潔蒸汽可以不可以（壓力不足）
前處理需求較多（酸鹼處理）較少
最小產量可做很小最小 100 gph
成本競爭力小產量有優勢≥300 gph 最具優勢
熱系統效率匹配需 8 效原生高效
冷系統效率匹配需 24 效（不實際）遙遙領先
氯腐蝕耐受高溫加速，數週至數月失效較耐受，低溫運行

氯腐蝕：ME 的致命弱點

這是選擇蒸餾系統時最常被忽略的風險之一：

  • ME 在高溫下運作，氯離子對不鏽鋼的應力腐蝕裂紋（SCC）攻擊極為迅速
  • 如果給水中殘餘氯沒有完全去除，ME 可能在數週到數月內就出現裂紋
  • VC 因為操作溫度較低，即使有少量氯殘留，問題可能數年後才出現
  • 關鍵啟示：ME 系統的前處理必須確保脫氯徹底（活性碳或還原劑）

選型建議總結

  • 選 ME：需要備用清潔蒸汽源、產量較小（<300 gph）、廠區蒸汽成本低、熱系統
  • 選 VC：產量 ≥300 gph、冷系統、電力便宜、希望簡化前處理、無需備用蒸汽
  • 都要注意：脫氯必須徹底，ME 尤其嚴格

Practice Questions / 練習思考

  1. Your facility needs 500 gph WFI at 80°C, with abundant low-cost steam but expensive electricity. Which distillation system would you recommend and why? / 你的工廠需要 500 gph 80°C WFI，蒸汽便宜但電費高。你推薦哪種蒸餾系統？為什麼？
  2. A 5-effect ME distiller suddenly shows elevated conductivity in the distillate. What is the most likely cause related to non-condensable gases? / 一台 5 效 ME 蒸餾器的蒸餾水電導率突然升高，與不可凝氣體相關的最可能原因是什麼？
  3. Your VC distiller feedwater has a TDS of 200 mg/l (softened water). Estimate the approximate recovery ratio and explain why it cannot be higher. / 你的 VC 蒸餾器給水 TDS 為 200 mg/l（軟化水），估算大約的回收比，並解釋為何不能更高。
  4. An engineer proposes adding a 9th effect to your 8-effect ME system. What economic argument would you use to evaluate this proposal? / 工程師提議在你的 8 效 ME 系統上加第 9 效。你會用什麼經濟論據來評估？
  5. Your ME system uses city water with 15 mg/l residual chlorine. The pretreatment carbon bed is aging. What is the risk and what monitoring would you implement? / 你的 ME 系統使用含 15 mg/l 殘餘氯的自來水，前處理活性碳床老化中。風險是什麼？你會實施哪些監控？

Section Summary / 本節摘要

  • Thermal Efficiency: Performance Ratio (R = Md/Ms) and Thermal Economy (E = Md/1000 BTU) quantify distiller efficiency; SE R~0.82, 5ME R~3.39-7.11, VC R~27.67 / 熱效率以效能比和熱經濟性量化，VC 遠超 ME
  • Water Recovery: Rc = Md/Mf; deionized feed achieves 90-95%, softened feed 80-85%; limited by scaling potential / 水回收率取決於給水品質，去離子水可達 90-95%
  • ME Effects: More effects reduce energy but not output; typical 3-5 effects; limited by temperature range (100-125 psig top, 7-10 psig bottom) and equipment cost / ME 效數受溫度範圍和設備成本限制，典型 3-5 效
  • Non-Condensable Gases: CO2 and O2 cause gas blanketing (reduced output) and corrosion; proper venting is imperative; steady steam at vent confirms proper operation / 不可凝氣體需持續排出，否則降低效率並腐蝕設備
  • Deaeration: VC can incorporate internal deaerators; ME typically cannot due to high pressure; feedwater preheated >93°C for effective gas stripping / VC 可內建脫氣器，ME 通常無法
  • Cost Comparison: VC is 41-73% cheaper in operating cost than 5ME; ME advantage: can serve as backup clean steam generator; VC advantage: lower pretreatment, no cooling water / VC 運行成本低 41-73%，但 ME 可備用產蒸汽
  • Chlorine Attack: Critical risk for ME (failure in weeks/months at high temp); VC more tolerant but still at risk; thorough dechlorination essential / 氯腐蝕是 ME 的致命風險，前處理脫氯必須徹底

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems

Section 11b: Appendix - Distillation for High Purity Water Systems | p206-p210

SterileGMP Knowledge Hub — Bilingual Educational Reference

A7-9

Chapter A7-9: Appendix: Steam & Fabrication

附錄：蒸汽與配管施工 | p211-p236

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems | p211-p221

本章學習目標

  • 掌握潔淨蒸汽產生器 (Clean Steam Generator) 的選型原理，包括壓力差與產量的關係計算
  • 理解進水壓力、泵選型、接觸面材質對潔淨蒸汽品質的影響
  • 學會公用設施需求規劃：廠蒸汽流量、進水速率、電力與儀表空氣
  • 認識定期清洗、除鏽 (Derouging) 與電導度監測的操作實務
  • 理解製藥用水系統中微生物控制的核心概念：革蘭氏陰性菌、生物膜 (Biofilm)、內毒素 (Endotoxin)
  • 掌握 PW 與 WFI 的微生物限量標準、警示/行動限及取樣策略
  • 比較熱系統、冷系統、臭氧系統與紫外線 (UV) 系統的消毒設計方案
  • 理解臭氧生成方法、安裝要點、與氯消毒的比較優勢
  • 掌握 UV 燈設計選型：劑量計算、低壓/中壓燈管差異、溫度與壓力限制

本章目錄 Chapter Contents

11.7 CS Generator Sizing 11.7.1 Feed Water & Surfaces 11.7.2 Utilities 11.7.3 Cleaning & Derouging 11.7.4 Conductivity 11.8.1 Bacteria Basics 11.8.2 Testing & Documentation 11.8.3 Sanitization Designs 11.8.4 Hot System 11.8.5 Cold System 11.8.6 Ozone 11.8.7 UV Light
11.7 Clean Steam Generator - System Selection & Sizing

原文內容 Original Text

A generator designed to deliver the maximum output at a relatively high clean steam pressure will deliver significantly more steam at the lowest pressure and vice versa.

This appears to be an advantage and often is; however, there can be problems if the performance is not well understood and is taken into consideration at the design stage and later during operation.

Example Calculation

A generator is sized to deliver 2000 lbs/hr (909 kgs/hr) clean steam at 60 psig (4.2 kgs/cm² gauge), utilizing plant steam at 120 psig (8.43 kgs/cm² gauge). Operating at a reduced level of 30 psig (2.1 kgs/cm² gauge) clean steam pressure and assuming 5 psi (0.35 kgs/cm²) pressure drop across the steam control valve:

  • Net steam pressure to evaporator = 120 - 5 = 115 psig (8.08 kgs/cm²), saturated temperature 347.3°F (175.17°C)
  • CS temperature @ 60 psig = 307.63°F (153.13°C)
  • CS temperature @ 30 psig = 274.46°F (134.7°C)
  • ΔT @ 60 psig = 347.3 - 307.63 = 39.67°F (22°C)
  • ΔT @ 30 psig = 347.3 - 274.6 = 72.7°F (40.5°C)

The amount of steam produced: W = U × A × ΔT

Where: U = heat transfer coefficient (Btu/hr/ft²/°F), A = CS evaporator surface area (ft²).

Since the heat transfer surface is fixed, and the change in the heat transfer coefficient is negligible, the amount of clean steam produced is directly proportional to the temperature difference.

CS @ 30 psig = (72.7 / 39.67) × 2000 = 3,665 lbs/hr (1666 kgs/hr), or 183% of that at 60 psig.

Total volume of steam @ 30 psig = 9.403 × 3665 = 34,462 ft³/hr, or 296% of that @ 60 psig. Since the steam passage areas including the separator have not changed, the velocity of steam increases approximately 300%.

If this increase is not anticipated and planned for at the design stage, there can be a potential for carryover of contaminants through the separator due to the higher steam velocity.

In addition to the high velocity and carryover considerations, operating at a temperature difference above 70°F (21°C) is not recommended without consulting the CS manufacturer. At high temperature difference, a heat transfer phenomenon called "dry wall condition" can occur — the steam is so much hotter than the water on the other side that the surface cannot be maintained wet, leaving behind a residue (scale). The problem is more of a concern when the CS feed water has relatively high TDS, such as with softened water.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：壓力差與產量的反比關係

潔淨蒸汽產生器的本質就是一個熱交換器：用廠蒸汽 (Plant Steam) 加熱進水，蒸發產生潔淨蒸汽。產量取決於兩者的溫差 (ΔT)。

當你降低潔淨蒸汽壓力時，CS 的飽和溫度降低，但廠蒸汽溫度不變，所以 ΔT 增大 → 產量上升。這聽起來很好，但隱含的風險是蒸汽體積暴增、流速飆升、分離器可能無法有效攔截雜質。

關鍵公式 Key Formula

W = U × A × ΔT

W = 蒸汽產量 (lbs/hr)
U = 傳熱係數 (Btu/hr/ft²/°F) -- 近似不變
A = 蒸發器面積 (ft²) -- 固定
ΔT = 廠蒸汽溫度 - CS 飽和溫度

結論：產量與 ΔT 成正比

比喻說明 Analogy

想像你用大火煮一鍋水，鍋子大小固定（A 不變）、火力不變（U 不變）。如果你把鍋蓋的壓力閥調鬆（降低 CS 壓力），水的沸點降低，火焰跟沸水的溫差變大，水蒸氣產生得更快。但鍋子的排氣孔沒有變大——蒸氣衝得太快，可能把鍋裡的湯汁（雜質）一起噴出來。這就是「carryover」的道理。

重點提示 Key Notes

  • ΔT > 70°F (21°C)：必須諮詢製造商，否則有 dry wall condition 風險——蒸發面過熱導致結垢 (scale)
  • 蒸汽速度增加 300%：分離器設計未考慮這種工況時，會導致內毒素和鹽類穿透 (carryover)
  • 高 TDS 進水更危險：軟化水的 TDS 較高，乾壁效應會加速結垢

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 如果你的廠蒸汽壓力是 100 psig，潔淨蒸汽需求壓力是 45 psig，ΔT 大約多少？是否超過 70°F 的建議上限？
  2. 為什麼 ISPE 不建議在高 ΔT 下操作，即使產量可以大幅提升？這對品質風險的影響是什麼？
11.7.1 Feed Water Pressure, Pump & Contact Surfaces

原文內容 Original Text

11.7.1.2 Feed Water Pressure and Pump

The feed pressure is typically 8-10 psi (0.5-0.7 kgs/cm²) above the clean steam pressure, which is typically 30-60 psig (2.1-4.2 kgs/cm² gauge), a feed pressure range of approximately 40-70 psig (2.8-4.9 kgs/cm² gauge). Most CS generators have outputs of less than 4,000 lbs/hr (1,816 kgs/hr). Many have outputs of less than 1,000 lbs/hr (450 kgs/hr). That is a feed rate of slightly more than 2 gpm (7.5 l/min).

The sanitary centrifugal feed pumps favored by the pharmaceutical industry will be operating near shutoff head at flow rates of less than 10 gpm (38 l/min), particularly with very small generators. Installing pump circulation loops complicates piping, and under certain scenarios may call for installing a heat exchanger to address temperature buildup. This adds undue complexity.

Consider the possibility of feeding the generator from an existing source with sufficient pressure. The dedicated pump, even at very low flow rate, is most likely the next best option.

11.7.1.3 Feed Water Contact Surfaces

It is common that users specify mechanical and electropolish and sanitary clamp connections for piping, heat exchangers, and vessels in contact with the feed water although such features are not necessary for achieving the desired clean steam quality.

Often, the reason given for such requirements is attributed to having the feed to the CS piped from the WFI or USP Purified Water loop. Such practices rule out the use of the less costly Simple CS Generator which otherwise may be acceptable.

Consider the economics of the proposed feed source at the selection stage. If WFI or USP Purified is the most logical source, consider the possibility of using an atmospheric break or sanitary backflow preventers so that the CS does not become an extension of the source loop.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

進水壓力設計邏輯

進水壓力 = CS 壓力 + 8~10 psi。這個「多出來的壓力」用來克服管路阻力並確保水能穩定進入蒸發器。如果壓力不足，進水會不穩定，蒸汽產量波動，嚴重時甚至導致乾燒。

大部分 CS 產生器的進水流量很小（2 gpm 左右），這對衛生型離心泵來說太接近關機揚程 (shutoff head)，操作在這個區域泵效率極低且容易過熱。

重點提示：別過度設計進水管路

ISPE 在這裡明確指出一個常見的過度設計陷阱：因為進水來自 WFI 或 PW 迴路，就要求所有進水管路都要 electropolish + sanitary clamp。

實際上，進水管路的表面處理規格不需要等同於分配系統的規格，因為水進入 CS 後會被蒸發——蒸汽品質取決於蒸發器和分離器的效能，而非進水管路的粗糙度。

建議：在進水管路與 WFI/PW 迴路之間裝設 atmospheric break 或 backflow preventer，避免 CS 成為分配迴路的「延伸」，這樣可以降低整個迴路的驗證負擔。

比喻說明 Analogy

就像你家的自來水管接到熱水器——熱水器入口管不需要跟淨水器出水管一樣的材質等級。水進入熱水器後會被加熱消毒，入口管的光潔度對最終熱水品質影響不大。但如果你不裝逆止閥，熱水器裡的水可能回流污染冷水系統。

11.7.2 Utilities Requirements

原文內容 Original Text

Plant Steam Flow Rate, lbs/hr: Make provisions for 110-120% of the maximum expected clean steam production. Generators with feed heaters and low TDS feed water will use closer to the 110% rate, and those without feed heaters and with high TDS (high blowdown rate) will use closer to the 120% rate.

Plant Steam Pressure should be nominally 50-60 psig (3.5-4.2 kgs/cm² gauge) above the clean steam pressure.

Feed Water Rate: With very low TDS, DI, or equal water, the typical feed rate is 105%-110% of the CS production rate depending on the size of the generator. With higher TDS feed water, the blowdown rate is increased to lower the concentration of salts. The feed varies and often is 115%-120% of CS rate.

Electric Power: Other than controls, the only power requirement is for the feed/booster pump when used. Since almost all CS generators require relatively small flow rates, the power requirement is mainly dependent on the boost pressure. Motors will vary from 2-5 horsepower (1.5-3.75 kW).

Instrument Air: 80-100 psig (5.6-7.0 kgs/cm² gauge) instrument air is required for systems with air operated controls.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

公用設施需求速查表

公用設施規格需求影響因子
廠蒸汽流量CS 產量的 110-120%有無預熱器、TDS 高低
廠蒸汽壓力CS 壓力 + 50-60 psig確保足夠 ΔT
進水流量CS 產量的 105-120%TDS 高 → 排污多 → 進水多
電力2-5 HP (1.5-3.75 kW)僅供泵使用
儀表空氣80-100 psig氣動控制閥需求

重點提示：TDS 與排污率的關係

TDS（總溶解固體）越高，蒸發器內鹽類濃縮越快，就需要更頻繁地排污 (blowdown) 來避免結垢。排污越多，進水補充就越多。這就是為什麼高 TDS 進水需要 115-120% 的進水率，而低 TDS 只需 105-110%。

實務建議：在 URS 階段就要確認進水水質，因為它直接影響公用設施的規模設計。如果後期從 DI 水改為軟化水，所有公用設施計算都要重來。

11.7.3 Periodic Cleaning and Derouging

原文內容 Original Text

It is common for CS generators and other stainless steel equipment used in high purity steam and water applications, to develop rouge or scale. Some of the cleaning chemicals can be very harsh and may etch the stainless surface. The extra cost on electropolishing becomes wasted after one harsh cleaning.

When contracting an outside service to perform the cleaning and any subsequent passivation, ensure chemicals used do not cause etching. It is common to avoid passivation with nitric acid if the surface is electropolished, using citric acid and ammonium citrate instead.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

Rouge（紅鏽）的本質

Rouge 是不鏽鋼在高溫純水/蒸汽環境中形成的氧化鐵沉積物，外觀呈紅棕色。在 WFI 和 CS 系統中非常常見，尤其是在 80°C 以上持續運作的設備。Rouge 不一定代表系統故障，但過度積累可能影響水質、堵塞過濾器。

重點提示：清洗化學品的選擇

  • 避免硝酸鈍化 (Nitric Acid Passivation)：如果表面已經電拋光 (EP)，硝酸可能侵蝕精細的表面結構，浪費先前的投資
  • 推薦替代方案：檸檬酸 (Citric Acid) + 檸檬酸銨 (Ammonium Citrate)，溫和但有效
  • 外包清洗時：必須要求供應商提供化學品清單，確認不會導致蝕刻 (etching)

比喻說明 Analogy

Rouge 就像不鏽鋼鍋具長期高溫使用後出現的彩虹色變色。你可以用溫和的清潔劑恢復，但如果用太強的酸性清潔劑（像是工業用鹽酸），反而會腐蝕鍋面。ISPE 在這裡提醒你：花大錢做的電拋光表面，一次粗暴的酸洗就前功盡棄。

11.7.4 Conductivity Monitoring

原文內容 Original Text

The conductivity of the CS condensate sample on a system with relatively high feed conductivity is an indication of carryover through the separator. Therefore, it serves as a good on-line warning that pyrogens may be present.

When the CS generator is operating on high purity DI feed water, the monitoring of CS sample conductivity or resistivity is meaningless; especially if the conductivity is lower than the limits set in the USP.

In order to verify that the separator system works as intended, it would have to be challenged. Sodium sulfite or other non-chloride-based salt can be injected in the feed to determine the corresponding product conductivity. Recommended salt concentration in the feed is 150-200 mg/l. Based on approximately 10% blowdown, the concentration inside the CS will be 1,500-2,000 mg/l.

The test is recommended after fieldwork or cleaning which may involve the disturbance of the separator system.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

電導度監測的邏輯

電導度（Conductivity）反映水中離子濃度。如果 CS 冷凝水的電導度升高，代表有溶解鹽類從蒸發器「穿過」分離器進入蒸汽——這也意味著內毒素 (pyrogen) 可能一起被帶過來。

但有個陷阱：如果你的進水本身就是高純度 DI 水（導電度極低），那 CS 冷凝水的導電度自然也很低，即使分離器壞了也測不出差異。這就是為什麼 ISPE 說「對 DI 進水的系統，導電度監測毫無意義」。

重點提示：分離器挑戰測試 (Challenge Test)

當導電度監測不可靠時，必須主動進行挑戰測試：

  • 注入亞硫酸鈉 (Sodium Sulfite)，不能用含氯鹽類（避免腐蝕不鏽鋼）
  • 進水中鹽濃度：150-200 mg/l
  • 以 10% 排污率計算，蒸發器內部濃度可達 1,500-2,000 mg/l
  • 測量 CS 冷凝水導電度，判斷分離器攔截效率
  • 何時做？每次維修、清洗或任何可能干擾分離器結構的操作之後

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 你的 CS 系統使用 RO 水進水（導電度 ~5 μS/cm），冷凝水導電度突然從 1.2 升到 3.5 μS/cm。這代表什麼？你會採取什麼行動？
  2. 為什麼挑戰測試要用亞硫酸鈉而不是氯化鈉 (NaCl)？
11.8.1 Bacteria in Pharmaceutical Water Systems

原文內容 Original Text

11.8.1.1 Background

Various types of bacteria can be found in the feedwater to purified water systems. Among the ways that these bacteria can be classified is Gram positive or Gram negative, which is based on their retention of a dye after a staining and washing procedure. The results of the Gram test are dependent on cell wall structure, and therefore indicative of many other characteristics.

Most aquatic bacteria are Gram negative, and bacteria commonly found in purified water systems are generally Gram negative because Gram positives cannot thrive on extremely low nutrient levels. Gram negative bacteria are more heat sensitive than Gram positives, and cannot proliferate at temperatures above 60°C. However, the possibility of Gram positive organisms in the system cannot be completely ruled out.

Bacteria generally range from approximately 0.5 μm to 5 μm. The rod-shaped Pseudomonas diminuta, which is used for challenging sterilizing filters, has a minimum dimension of approximately 0.3 μm.

When Gram negative organisms are killed they release endotoxins; lipopolysaccharide molecules which cause a fever when injected into the bloodstream. Because they cause fever, these substances are termed "pyrogens", meaning generating heat. These substances also have been linked to much more serious reactions when introduced into the blood stream, including lethal septic shock.

Bacteria have a tendency to attach to surfaces and form biofilms. Biofilms form an external polysaccharide layer. This external film protects the bacteria from antimicrobial agents and makes them much more resistant to sanitization procedures. In addition, disinfection of the biofilm does not necessarily remove it from the surfaces. Since the dead biofilm provides nutrients and attachment points for new biofilm, its removal must be considered when developing a sanitization strategy.

Biofilms are difficult to detect since water samples are used to measure free floating (planktonic) bacteria, and these bacterial counts do not directly correlate to biofilm concentration. Prevention or removal of biofilms can be affected by the various continuous and periodic microbial control methods described in this chapter.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念：水系統微生物學基礎

理解製藥用水微生物控制，需要掌握三個關鍵角色：

  • 革蘭氏陰性菌 (Gram-negative)：純水系統的主要「居民」，能在極低營養環境中存活。殺死它們會釋放內毒素——注射劑的頭號敵人
  • 內毒素 (Endotoxin/Pyrogen)：脂多醣分子，熱穩定，比細菌本身更難去除。即使細菌被殺死，內毒素仍然存在
  • 生物膜 (Biofilm)：細菌附著在管壁表面形成的「保護城堡」，消毒劑很難穿透

比喻說明：生物膜如同水管內的「青苔層」

你可以把 biofilm 想像成魚缸壁上的那層滑膩的綠色薄膜。用漂白水泡一下可以殺死表面的藻類，但那層黏膜還在。死掉的黏膜反而成為新一批藻類的「養分」和「腳架」。所以 ISPE 強調：消毒 (disinfection) 不等於清除 (removal)。有效的策略必須包含物理去除，而不僅僅是化學殺菌。

重點提示 Key Notes

  • 60°C 是分水嶺：革蘭氏陰性菌無法在 60°C 以上繁殖，這就是為什麼 hot loop 設計在 75-85°C 運行
  • 浮游菌 ≠ 生物膜菌：取水樣測到的是浮游菌 (planktonic)，生物膜中的菌量可能遠高於取樣結果
  • Pseudomonas diminuta（0.3 μm）：這就是為什麼除菌過濾器標準挑戰用 0.22 μm 濾膜——要攔截最小的已知病原菌
  • 殺菌釋放內毒素的悖論：在分配系統中殺菌反而可能增加內毒素負荷，所以 WFI 系統強調在純化階段就去除細菌，而非依賴分配系統中的熱殺菌

CDMO 實務應用

在無菌充填的 CDMO 環境中，WFI 系統的生物膜管理是日常營運的核心挑戰之一。如果你的系統在維護後生物膜沒有被完全清除，即使取樣結果短期合格，幾天後菌量就會反彈。這就是為什麼許多 FDA 檢查員會特別關注：你的消毒 SOP 是否包含「清除」步驟，而不僅僅是「殺菌」。

11.8.1.2-1.3 Microbial Levels in PW and WFI

原文內容 Original Text

11.8.1.2 Microbial Levels in USP Purified Water and Non-Compendial Water

Most techniques for measuring microbial populations in a water sample require a time delay of two to three days, and they do not yield an exact value. For this reason, the USP monograph for purified water does not contain a microbial limit. Instead, alert and action level guidelines must be established by the end user.

An action level of 100 CFU/ml is suggested in the USP, and the FDA Guide to Inspection of High Purity Water Systems states that any action level over 100 CFU/ml is unacceptable.

What may be more important than the total count is a continuous monitoring program that indicates trends before they become a problem. It also is important to identify the specific contaminants in addition to the total count. The water system should not add objectionable organisms to the final drug product. Objectionable organisms are defined in the FDA Inspection Guide as "any organisms that can cause infections when the drug product is used as directed, or any organisms capable of growth in the drug product."

Alert levels are set according to a statistical review of data to reveal those results that are above the normal operating range of the system. Action levels indicate that a problem exists and the problem must be investigated and an appropriate corrective action taken.

11.8.1.3 Microbial Limits in WFI

According to the USP, Water For Injection is "intended for use in the preparation of parenteral solutions." WFI is generally expected to be free of microorganisms. Since some microbial contamination may be encountered during sampling, an action limit of 10 CFU/100 ml is commonly specified.

The bacterial requirement which is explicitly stated on the monograph is for bacterial endotoxin. The USP endotoxin limit for WFI is 0.25 EU per ml.

Even bacteria which are destroyed quickly within the storage and distribution system will release endotoxin. Therefore, it is imperative that the treatment system removes bacteria before they get to the distribution system, rather than relying on protection measures within the distribution system (such as heat) to remove bacteria.

Although bacterial contamination in a WFI system will lead to the proliferation of endotoxin, it may be possible to pass an endotoxin limit, but not a bacterial limit so both tests should be performed.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

PW vs WFI 微生物標準比較

參數Purified WaterWFI
微生物限量Action: 100 CFU/mlAction: 10 CFU/100 ml
內毒素不要求≤ 0.25 EU/ml
嚴格度差異WFI 微生物限量比 PW 嚴格約 1,000 倍
測試方法HPC (2-3天)HPC + LAL

重點提示 Key Notes

  • Alert Level ≠ Action Level：Alert 是「注意，趨勢不對了」；Action 是「必須調查並採取糾正措施」。兩者都不是 pass/fail，而是管理工具
  • 趨勢比單次結果更重要：一個持續接近 alert level 的系統，比偶爾超標一次更危險
  • 鑑定特定微生物：不是只看總菌數，還要鑑定菌種。不同菌種指向不同污染源（Staph = 取樣問題，Bacillus = 環境污染，Gram-negative rods = 水系統本身）
  • 殺菌不等於除毒素：WFI 系統中殺死細菌會釋放內毒素，所以必須在純化階段就除菌，而非依賴分配迴路的高溫殺菌

FDA 稽查重點

FDA 明確表示：PW 的 action level 超過 100 CFU/ml 是「不可接受的」。這意味著如果你的 SOP 把 action level 設在 200 CFU/ml，FDA 稽查員會直接開 observation。

此外，objectionable organisms 的定義是「能在藥品中生長，或在正常使用條件下引起感染的微生物」。即使總菌數合格，如果鑑定出 objectionable organism，仍然是嚴重的品質事件。

11.8.2 Testing and Documentation

原文內容 Original Text

11.8.2.1 General Testing Considerations

All use points in the distribution loop should be represented in a monitoring regimen. Testing of the water being supplied to the loop, prior to dilution in the distribution tank, provides important information on the efficacy of the purification system.

For WFI or other water with endotoxin limitations, LAL testing is typically performed concurrently with the heterotrophic plate count. The water system is typically tested daily with individual sample ports being rotated through to include each point over a specified period.

Sampling each point every week has generally been found acceptable by the FDA. With smaller systems, this may result in only one sample from the system on any day.

The sampling performed should simulate the production use of that water. For example, water used through a hose should be sampled through the same hose. The flush performed prior to sampling (if any) should reflect the flush used prior to production use.

The quantity of water used for analysis is a minimum of 1 ml for purified and non-compendial, and 100 ml for WFI. Larger quantities such as 100 ml for purified and 250 ml for WFI are recommended.

11.8.2.2 Testing Documentation

Sampling procedures should be delineated in an approved protocol (SOP). Testing methods also should be specified in an approved SOP. This would include the equipment and materials to be used, the procedures, growth promotion testing of the media, and negative controls.

Organisms in pharmaceutical water will have adapted to a low nutrient environment, and a standard growth media may shock the organisms and result in erroneously low counts. Therefore, a low nutrient media may be more appropriate for the testing.

For new or modified systems, sampling and testing should be completed as part of a Performance Qualification (PQ). The sampling regimen should include samples taken immediately prior to sanitization in order to exhibit worst case conditions.

11.8.2.3 Analysis of Results

The primary purpose of reviewing test results is to reveal OOS findings. The identification of the organisms found is an important part of the investigation since this will provide strong evidence of the source of contamination:

  • Staphylococcus: typical of sample handling problems
  • Bacillus: typical of environmental contamination of the sample port
  • Gram negative rods: typical of water borne contamination

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

取樣策略設計

ISPE 的取樣建議可以歸納為以下原則：

  • 輪轉取樣 (Rotational Sampling)：每天取不同使用點，確保每個點至少每週被取樣一次
  • 模擬生產條件：取樣方式必須反映實際使用情境（用軟管的就從軟管取）
  • 多點取樣的價值：如果某天只取一個點且超標，你無法判斷是局部問題還是系統性問題
  • 最壞情況取樣：在消毒前取樣，代表系統最差狀態

重點提示：低營養培養基的必要性

水系統中的細菌已經「習慣」了極低營養環境。如果你用標準 TSA（高營養培養基）培養它們，就像把沙漠中的仙人掌突然丟進熱帶雨林——它們會因為「營養過度衝擊」而死亡，導致培養結果偏低。

常用低營養培養基：R2A agar（孵育 5-7 天，25-30°C）。這比 TSA 更能反映水系統的真實微生物負荷。

OOS 調查中的菌種鑑定指南

菌種類型可能污染源調查方向
Staphylococcus人員手部/皮膚檢查取樣技術、無菌操作
Bacillus環境落塵/孢子檢查取樣口環境、蓋板密封
Gram-negative rods水系統本身檢查消毒效能、biofilm 狀態

菌種鑑定是調查 OOS 的「指紋證據」——它能快速把調查方向從「到處找」聚焦到「精準打擊」。

11.8.3-11.8.4 Sanitization Designs & Hot System Distribution Loop

原文內容 Original Text

11.8.3 Sterilization/Sanitization Designs

Various designs may be incorporated to facilitate heat sanitization of process water distribution systems. In this section, two designs for sanitization are considered:

  • Hot Pharmaceutical Water (80°C) System
  • Ambient Pharmaceutical Water System

11.8.4 Hot System Distribution Loop

In this system, the boundaries begin with the storage vessel and include pumps, distribution piping (all drops) and the return loop that terminates at the storage vessel.

The storage vessel should be a fully jacketed vessel with the capability of heating and cooling. Heating of the storage vessel is usually achieved with steam. Cooling, when required, is achieved with chilled or cooling tower water.

It has been found that a hot distillation system has a tendency to build heat when the effluent from the still is discharging into the tank. The effluent may be as high as 96°C. If the water is too hot, the distribution pump may cavitate or boiling will occur in the pump. In addition, the system may be more susceptible to "Rouge" when water is kept at temperatures exceeding 87°C.

A hot system is generally considered to be self sanitizing as long as the temperature of the circulating water is maintained between 75°C and 85°C.

When the system is down for maintenance or repairs, it will be necessary to sanitize the system. The method used is to flush the system, all sampling points, and all points of use with hot (80°C) water. Flushing with two to three volumes of the water in the distribution system should achieve sanitization.

The heating medium may be hot liquid or steam. It should be designed to heat the ambient process water from 15 to 80°C within a specified period (generally two to four hours).

As a safety note, all exposed piping and storage tank surfaces should be insulated to prevent accidental burning of personnel.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

熱系統設計核心要點

熱水循環系統的最大優勢是「自消毒 (self-sanitizing)」——只要維持 75-85°C，革蘭氏陰性菌無法存活。但這個溫度窗口有兩個邊界：

  • 下限 75°C：低於此溫度，部分耐熱菌可能存活
  • 上限 85-87°C：超過此溫度，Rouge（紅鏽）加速形成，且泵可能因接近沸點而汽蝕 (cavitation)

重點提示：溫度管理的兩難

  • 蒸餾出水溫度可達 96°C：必須在儲罐設計中考慮冷卻能力，否則泵會汽蝕
  • Rouge 風險在 87°C 以上急升：需要在「殺菌效果」和「材料壽命」間取得平衡
  • 維護後重新消毒：使用等級不低於系統水質的 80°C 熱水，沖洗 2-3 倍系統容量
  • 升溫時間 2-4 小時：必須在 URS 中明確規定，影響夾套換熱器和蒸汽供應的設計

比喻說明 Analogy

熱水循環系統就像你家的中央暖氣——暖氣水在管路中持續循環保持高溫，細菌就像冬天試圖在暖氣管裡結冰的水滴，只要溫度夠高就不可能存在。但如果暖氣停了一段時間（維護停機），重新啟動時你需要先用最熱的水沖洗整個系統，確保每個角落都被燙過。

安全提醒

ISPE 特別強調：所有外露管路和儲罐表面必須保溫隔熱。80°C 的水接觸皮膚會造成嚴重燙傷。消毒週期中，所有使用點必須有人監控。這不僅是 GMP 要求，更是 EHS（環境健康安全）的基本責任。

11.8.5 Cold System Design

原文內容 Original Text

The boundaries are the same as a hot system. A by-pass line may be provided to recirculate process water through the pretreatment train to avoid stagnant flow conditions.

Sanitization of a cold system may be accomplished using hot water using two stainless steel double tube sheet heat exchangers, one for cooling and one for heating.

The heat exchanger used for cooling is typically installed after the distribution pump(s). The heat exchanger used for heat sanitization is usually installed on the return loop just prior to the return to the storage tank.

One heat exchanger to heat and cool the process water is a viable alternative, but should be designed for the more extreme temperature range.

The heat exchanger for cooling may be cooled with cooling tower water, chilled, or domestic cold water. The cool down cycle should be designed to cool 80°C process water to approximately 15°C over a specified period (based on the operational needs). The initial cooling should be very gradual to prevent thermal shock.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

冷系統消毒設計邏輯

冷系統在常溫運行，沒有熱系統的「自消毒」優勢，因此需要定期升溫消毒。設計的核心是兩個換熱器：

  • 冷卻換熱器：安裝在分配泵之後，日常運行時將水冷卻到使用溫度
  • 加熱換熱器：安裝在回水管路、儲罐之前，消毒時將水加熱到 80°C

使用 double tube sheet 設計是為了避免公用介質（冷卻水/蒸汽）與製藥用水之間的交叉污染——即使一側管板洩漏，中間的排放空間也能防止混合。

重點提示：熱衝擊 (Thermal Shock)

ISPE 強調冷卻必須「非常緩慢」，以防止熱衝擊。快速降溫可能導致：

  • 管路焊縫熱應力裂紋
  • 閥門密封件收縮洩漏
  • 儀表膜片損壞

在 SOP 中應規定降溫速率（例如每分鐘不超過 2-3°C），並在 PQ 中驗證。

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 如果你的冷系統只使用一個換熱器同時負責加熱和冷卻，設計上需要注意哪些額外事項？
  2. 為什麼要在回水管路（而非出水管路）安裝加熱換熱器？這對消毒效果有何影響？
11.8.6 Ozone System

原文內容 Original Text

Ozone (O&sub3;) is a naturally occurring triatomic form of oxygen. O&sub3; is unstable at atmospheric temperatures and pressures, and decomposes readily into molecular oxygen (O&sub2;). There are no objectionable by-products or residues when water is disinfected with ozone.

Very low concentrations of ozone of the order of 0.1 to 0.2 mg/l have been shown to control microbiological growth to below 1 CFU/100ml. Due to the limited half life, ozone must be produced on-site.

11.8.6.1 Materials of Construction

Few organic materials are unaffected by ozone contact. Gaskets, piping, vessels, filters, and ion exchange resins may be subject to attack. PVC will be attacked by ozone, but PVDF and PTFE are not so vulnerable. Stainless steels that may be pitted by Chlorine resist ozone.

11.8.6.2 Comparisons with Chlorine

Chlorine is relatively stable in water and is not described by any half-life characteristic. Ozone has a relatively short half-life depending on temperature and pH. At neutral pH and 20°C, this can be two hours in high purity water.

Removal of chlorine and many of its bi-products are comparatively difficult to remove. Chlorine may convert many organic substances into derivatives that have been identified with carcinogenicity.

Ozone reverts to oxygen and/or carbon dioxide.

Chlorine requires diffusion through the cell walls of the organism. Tests indicate that chlorine required more than 400 hours at 0.1 mg/l to destroy 99% of 60,000 CFU of E. Coli. Ozone, when added to water using an efficient mixer, kills bacteria in seconds. At an equivalent CFU level, ozone will destroy more than 99% in less than one minute.

11.8.6.3 Ozone Generation

There are two commercial methods to manufacture ozone:

  • Corona discharge: uses an air/oxygen feed. Feed stream must be sufficiently low in nitrogen and moisture to avoid production of harmful levels of nitric acid. Pharmaceutical design typically employs a dryer and a molecular sieve.
  • Electrolytic generation: low conductivity water is used as the feed stream to a catalytic generation cell. Can be operated directly immersed in a side stream or produce gas for a conventional contactor. Typically produces lower contamination levels but more capital cost intensive.

11.8.6.4 Ozone System Installation

The optimum location for ozone injection is in the loop return, just before it re-enters the storage tank. To ensure ozone does not contaminate the pharmaceutical product, it may be removed shortly before the first "point of use."

Ozone destruction can be accomplished by: Catalytic, Thermal, UV, Chemical, and Time (half life in solution is 20 to 100 min).

Ozone monitoring is required: in solution prior to and following ozone destruction, return line to the storage tank, return ozone levels from loop piping during sanitation sequences, and ambient air surrounding the system.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

臭氧系統核心優勢

臭氧在製藥用水消毒中有三大無可比擬的優勢：

  • 極快殺菌速度：0.1-0.2 mg/l 濃度即可將微生物控制到 <1 CFU/100ml，且秒級殺菌（vs 氯需 400+ 小時）
  • 無殘留副產物：分解後只剩 O&sub2; 和 CO&sub2;，不像氯會產生致癌性的含氯副產物
  • 自然分解：半衰期 20-100 分鐘，使用點前自然或強制去除即可

臭氧 vs 氯：關鍵比較

特性臭氧 (O&sub3;)氯 (Cl&sub2;)
殺菌速度< 1 分鐘（99%）> 400 小時（99%）
殘留物O&sub2; + CO&sub2;含氯副產物（致癌風險）
去除難度自然分解或 UV活性碳吸附/亞硫酸鹽
材料相容性不攻擊 SS，攻擊 PVC可能腐蝕 SS（點蝕）
半衰期~2 hr (20°C, pH 7)穩定，無半衰期

重點提示：臭氧系統設計注意事項

  • 材料選擇：PVC 會被臭氧侵蝕，必須使用 PVDF 或 PTFE 墊片和管件
  • Corona Discharge 的陷阱：進氣中氮氣和水分過高會產生硝酸，降低水的 pH 和導電度，並腐蝕不鏽鋼。必須配乾燥器和分子篩
  • 注入位置：在回水管路（迴路回到儲罐之前），而非出水端。這樣整個迴路都能被消毒
  • 去除位置：在第一個使用點之前，確保臭氧不會進入產品
  • 環境監測：臭氧對人體有害，必須監測周圍空氣中的臭氧濃度（OSHA PEL: 0.1 ppm）

比喻說明 Analogy

臭氧消毒就像用紫外線消毒水瓶——效果立竿見影，而且用完不會留下任何化學殘留。氯消毒則像在水裡加漂白水——確實能殺菌，但你事後要花很大力氣把漂白水的味道和殘留物去掉，而且漂白水可能在水中產生有害的副產物。

11.8.7 UV Light

原文內容 Original Text

11.8.7.1 Ultraviolet Lights

Flowing water may be exposed, at a controlled rate, to ultraviolet light waves. With proper maintenance, UV systems are simple and reliable, generating a high reduction in bacteria (99% plus) when operating at 254 nm wavelengths. However, the feedwater to a UV needs to be free of suspended solids which can "shadow" bacteria, preventing adequate UV contact.

Two different types of mercury vapor arc tubes generate UV light: low pressure and medium pressure. Low pressure is near a vacuum and generates a narrow wavelength band in the 254 nm range. Medium pressure arc tubes, near 1 atmosphere, generate wavelengths ranging from 180 to 365 nm. The peak germicidal efficiency for UV light is between 254 and 265 nm.

11.8.7.2 Design and Installation of UV Lights

Water from a storage tank can be recirculated through UV light systems so that the entire system volume is treated. The minimum recycle rate to maintain disinfection is between 4-6 times per hour.

Conventional UV units have a maximum temperature limitation of 120°F (48.9°C) and require special cooling arrangements to withstand temperatures up to 150°F (65.6°C). Medium pressure units can withstand much higher temperatures up to 212°F (100°C).

Pressure limitations also need to be recognized. Most UV units have an operating pressure limit of 100-120 psi.

Most UV units are installed in a horizontal position to eliminate air pockets.

The use of UV units does not negate the need for periodic sanitization of the system.

11.8.7.3 UV Light Dosage and Sizing Requirements

Proper UV dosage measured in milli-watt seconds per square centimeter (mW·s/cm²) at the chamber wall determines the performance. Each microorganism has been assigned a kill dose, known as D10 that produces a 1 log, or 90% kill rate.

E. Coli has a D10 of 3 mW·s/cm². To achieve a 3 log reduction, a dose of 6 mW·s/cm² is required. Most pharmaceutical water systems require at least a minimum of 30 mW·s/cm² dosage.

Factors involved in UV unit selection:

  • Flow-rate: units must be sized to handle the maximum flow possible
  • Water quality: UV absorbing compounds (iron, manganese, dissolved organics, turbidity) affect germicidal efficiency
  • Identification of microorganisms: high concentration or multiple organisms may dictate a larger UV unit
  • Temperature: low pressure units have specific temperature limitations; in very cold (5-10°C) or hot water (>45°C) the arc tube efficiency is greatly reduced
  • Recirculation rate: minimum 4 times per hour for the entire volume

11.8.7.4 Characteristics

Low-pressure units usually have multiple lamps in a chamber. Medium pressure units usually employ a single lamp approach due to the much higher output. The lamps are enclosed within quartz sleeves which contact the water. All other wetted parts should be manufactured from 316L SS. UV intensity and frequency should be monitored continuously and recorded.

The specified dosage should be obtained even at the end of lamp life (EOL), as all UV lamps degrade and lose germicidal efficiency over time. The units should be sized so that a safety margin is built in so that even at EOL, the minimum dose requirement is always exceeded.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

UV 消毒系統核心知識

UV 消毒的原理是利用 254 nm 波長的紫外光破壞微生物的 DNA，使其無法繁殖。關鍵在於「直接照射」——任何遮蔽物（懸浮固體、氣泡）都會產生「陰影區」，降低殺菌效果。

低壓 vs 中壓 UV 燈管比較

特性低壓 (Low Pressure)中壓 (Medium Pressure)
波長範圍窄帶，集中在 254 nm寬帶，180-365 nm
燈管數量多支通常單支
最高耐溫48.9°C (120°F)100°C (212°F)
效率特性低溫/高溫效率下降溫度範圍較寬
適用場景常溫分配系統熱系統或需高劑量場景

UV 劑量計算

D10 = 1 log 殺滅所需劑量 (mW·s/cm²)

E. Coli: D10 = 3 mW·s/cm²
  1 log (90% kill) = 3 mW·s/cm²
  2 log (99% kill) = 2 × D10 = 6 mW·s/cm²
  3 log (99.9% kill) = 3 × D10 = 9 mW·s/cm²

製藥水系統最低劑量：30 mW·s/cm²
（相當於 E. Coli 的 10 log 殺滅能力）

設計規則：在燈管壽命末期 (EOL) 仍能
達到最低劑量要求 → 需內建安全裕度

重點提示 Key Notes

  • UV 不取代定期消毒：UV 是「持續控制」手段，不是「一勞永逸」方案。系統仍需定期熱消毒或化學消毒
  • 水平安裝：避免氣袋 (air pocket) 形成，氣袋會遮擋 UV 光並產生消毒死角
  • 連續監測：UV 強度和頻率必須即時監測並記錄，作為系統正常運行的證據
  • 石英套管 (Quartz Sleeve)：需定期清潔，水垢和 biofilm 會在套管表面積累，降低透光率
  • 循環速率：整個儲罐/迴路容量每小時至少循環 4-6 次，以確保累積劑量足夠
  • EOL 設計：UV 燈會隨時間衰減，選型時必須確保即使在燈管壽命末期，輸出劑量仍 ≥ 30 mW·s/cm²

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 你的 WFI 系統是 80°C 熱循環設計，還需要安裝 UV 嗎？如果需要，應該選低壓還是中壓燈管？
  2. 如果你的 PW 系統流量最大為 50 GPM，水質很乾淨（UV 透過率 >98%），你會如何選型 UV 設備？需要考慮哪些參數？
  3. 為什麼 ISPE 說「UV 消毒不能取代定期消毒」？UV 系統有哪些 biofilm 管理上的局限性？

本節重點回顧 Section Summary

  • CS 產生器選型核心：產量與 ΔT 成正比 (W = U × A × ΔT)，但 ΔT > 70°F 有乾壁風險，低壓操作會導致蒸汽流速暴增 300%，引發 carryover
  • 進水設計務實原則：進水壓力 = CS 壓力 + 8-10 psi；進水管路不需要與分配系統同等級表面處理；使用 atmospheric break 或 backflow preventer 與源水迴路隔離
  • 公用設施計算：廠蒸汽流量 110-120% CS 產量，壓力高出 50-60 psig；進水率 105-120% 取決於 TDS
  • Rouge 與清洗：避免硝酸鈍化已電拋光表面，推薦檸檬酸 + 檸檬酸銨。外包清洗需審查化學品
  • 電導度監測局限：對 DI 進水系統無效，需進行分離器挑戰測試（亞硫酸鈉 150-200 mg/l）
  • 微生物控制三要素：Gram-negative 菌（60°C 以上無法繁殖）、Endotoxin（殺菌後仍殘留）、Biofilm（消毒不等於清除）
  • PW Action Level 100 CFU/ml、WFI 10 CFU/100ml：菌種鑑定是 OOS 調查的關鍵線索
  • 消毒系統選擇：熱系統 75-85°C 自消毒；冷系統需雙管板換熱器定期升溫；臭氧秒級殺菌無殘留；UV 254 nm 持續控制但不取代定期消毒
  • 臭氧優勢：0.1-0.2 mg/l 即可控菌 <1 CFU/100ml，殺菌速度比氯快數千倍，無致癌副產物
  • UV 設計要點：最低 30 mW·s/cm² 劑量，EOL 仍需達標；循環率 ≥ 4 次/小時；水平安裝避氣袋；連續監測強度
ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems | p222-p236

本章學習目標

  • 理解高純度水配水系統對製造精度與表面處理的嚴格要求，以及為何管路製造必須在潔淨環境中進行
  • 掌握 316L 不鏽鋼的化學組成、耐蝕性原理，以及硫含量 (Sulfur) 對焊接與拋光的關鍵影響
  • 認識五大不鏽鋼腐蝕類型：晶間腐蝕、電偶腐蝕、接觸腐蝕、點蝕、應力腐蝕開裂
  • 學會鈍化 (Passivation) 與紅鏽 (Rouging) 的成因、識別與處理方法
  • 比較固體拉製管 (Solid Drawn) 與焊縫管 (Welded Seam) 的差異，以及 PVDF 非金屬管路的適用情境
  • 掌握軌道焊接 (Orbital Welding) 的品質標準、焊工資格要求、內視鏡檢查 (Borescoping) 程序
  • 辨識 14 種常見焊接缺陷及其根本原因與矯正措施
  • 理解衛生夾具 (Sanitary Clamps) 的設計目的與應用場景

本章目錄 Chapter Contents

11.9.1 Introduction 11.9.2 Materials 11.9.3 SS Types 11.9.4 Weldability 11.9.5 Corrosion 11.9.6 Passivation 11.9.7 Surface Finish 11.9.8 SS Piping 11.9.9 PVDF 11.10 Design 11.11 Fabrication 11.11.4 Orbital Welding 11.11.6 Weld Criteria 11.11.7 Weld Defects 11.11.8 PVDF Welding 11.11.9 Remedial Action 11.11.10 Sanitary Clamps
11.9.1 Introduction

Original Text

Fabrication of the distribution system must be made with extreme care and precision to ensure a smooth internal finish that will not allow any crevices that will support or promote bacterial growth, metal corrosion, or particulate generation.

The chapter provides an understanding of the requirements of fabrication, materials of construction, and specialized equipment required to fabricate a piping distribution system.

Decisions concerning the material of construction, the orbital welding, the special handling, and the special environment required must be made and understood by the pharmaceutical manager responsible for the high purity water distribution piping fabrication and installation.

Unlike the equipment selection, the piping fabrication will require selections of material with specific compositions, welding using inert gas envelopes, and a cleanroom environment.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念 Key Concepts

配水系統製造 (Distribution System Fabrication)：這不是普通的配管工程。ISPE 在開頭就強調「extreme care and precision」——製藥用高純度水的管路，每一個內部表面、每一條焊縫都必須達到近乎完美的光滑度。任何微小的縫隙 (crevice) 都可能成為微生物的溫床、腐蝕的起點、或微粒的來源。

三大威脅：bacterial growth（微生物生長）、metal corrosion（金屬腐蝕）、particulate generation（微粒產生）。所有的材料選擇、焊接技術、環境控制，最終都是為了消滅這三個敵人。

比喻說明 Analogy

想像你在做心臟繞道手術——你植入的血管必須內壁完美光滑、不能有任何毛刺或接縫不良，否則血栓就會在那裡形成。高純度水管路就是製藥廠的「血管系統」，標準同樣嚴苛。而且，這個手術（安裝）還必須在無塵室裡進行，不能讓灰塵和油脂汙染「血管」內壁。

重點提示 Key Notes

注意 ISPE 特別指出「unlike the equipment selection」——管路製造比設備選型更講究。設備通常是整機採購，但管路是現場施工的，施工品質完全取決於：(1) 材料的化學組成是否一致 (2) 焊接是否在惰性氣體保護下進行 (3) 整個施工環境是否潔淨受控。這三個條件缺一不可。

11.9.2 Materials of Construction

Original Text

Material selection should be consistent throughout the distribution, storage, and processing systems. The material should be rigid, capable of withstanding steam sterilizing temperatures (as required), cleaning solutions, passivation solutions (as required), and capable of maintaining a durable and corrosion resistant surface finish.

The material in common use in pharmaceutical water systems is a stainless metal. Based on cost and ease of fabrication, this material is nickel chromium steel.

Inert non-metallic materials also are available that can withstand steam sterilization (as required). These materials are used extensively in the electronics industry for ultra-pure water systems where they have proved themselves capable of containing and preserving the high level of purity used in the semi-conductor industry.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

核心概念 Key Concepts

材料一致性原則：整個系統從配水管路、儲存槽到製程端，材料必須「consistent」。這不只是美觀問題——混用不同材質會產生電偶腐蝕 (Galvanic Corrosion)，就像把銅和鐵放在鹽水裡一樣會加速腐蝕。

材料需承受的條件：蒸汽滅菌溫度 (121°C+)、清洗液 (CIP chemicals)、鈍化液 (passivation solutions)。材料必須在這些嚴苛條件下仍能維持耐腐蝕的表面品質。

重點提示 Key Notes

ISPE 在這裡埋了一個重要伏筆：非金屬材料（即後文的 PVDF）在半導體業已經大量使用，且證明可以維持超高純度水的品質。這暗示製藥業可以向半導體業借鏡——事實上，半導體的水質要求比製藥還嚴格，所以半導體驗證過的材料在製藥業應該也適用。

11.9.3 Types of Stainless Steel & Corrosive Resistance

Original Text

Type 316L is the preferred steel for a high purity water generation and distribution system. The "L" designation indicates a low level of carbon compared to the non "L" grade.

Alternates to 316L grades are 317L with its higher chromium and molybdenum contents and 304L with its higher chromium content but lower nickel and molybdenum levels.

11.9.3.1 Corrosive Resistance

Chromium content is the most important alloying element in stainless steel followed by nickel and molybdenum.

Steels with chromium in excess of 11.5% will form a protective film of chrome oxide on the metal surface. The presence of nickel in amounts more than 7% enhances the corrosion resistance over the straight chromium grade and improves its ductility.

The performance of stainless steels is governed by the oxidizing characteristics of the environment, similarly to the oxidization of ordinary steels. Strong oxidizing conditions generate a superior protective coating for the stainless steel and a powdery rust on ordinary steels which eventually, if left unchecked, will consume all of the metal.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

不鏽鋼等級比較

鋼種特性應用場景
316L低碳、含 Mo，最佳整體耐蝕性首選，高純度水系統標準材料
317L更高 Cr + Mo，耐蝕性更強特別腐蝕性環境（成本較高）
304L高 Cr 但低 Ni 和 Mo耐蝕需求較低的場合

耐蝕性三大元素

鉻 (Cr) > 11.5%：形成鉻氧化物保護膜——這就是「不鏽鋼」之所以「不鏽」的根本原因。沒有足夠的鉻，就沒有這層保護膜。

鎳 (Ni) > 7%：增強耐蝕性並改善延展性 (ductility)，使鋼材更容易成型和焊接。

鉬 (Mo)：提高抗點蝕 (pitting) 能力，特別是在含氯環境中。316L 比 304L 多了 Mo，這就是為什麼 316L 是高純度水系統的首選。

比喻說明 Analogy

不鏽鋼的鉻氧化物保護膜就像人體皮膚——健康的皮膚能抵擋外來感染。鉻含量不夠（低於 11.5%），就像皮膚有破口，細菌和腐蝕因子就能入侵。而「L」代表 Low Carbon，低碳含量減少了「碳化鉻」析出的風險，就像避免皮膚產生疤痕組織，讓保護層更完整。

11.9.4 Weldability and Polishability

Original Text

Austenitic stainless steels such as AISI type 316L contain impurities in addition to the major elements described. These include: Sulfur (S), Aluminum (Al), Oxygen (O), Silicon (Si), Manganese (Mn), Phosphorus (P), Titanium (Ti), Calcium (Ca).

The effects of some of these elements are cumulative inasmuch as the oxygen can offset some of the welding characteristics of low sulfur steels and the weld penetrations experienced with sulfur may be offset by high levels of aluminum. In addition, the ratio of the trace elements of aluminum to silicon has been shown to effect slag formation during welding which in turn produces inclusions.

Manganese has been shown to combine with the sulfur and form manganese sulfide (MnS) inclusions on or in the surface of the metal.

11.9.4.1 The Impact of Sulfur on Welding and Internal Finishing

Small amounts of sulfur improves machinability as well as weldability; however, with the advent of modern techniques in the steel refining process, the mills are able to produce steels at a cost with very specific chemical compositions.

Low sulfur AISI 316L steels when based on the specification limit of 0.03% have some advantages to obtaining an unpitted polish, but other impurities such as manganese, silicon, oxygen, aluminum, calcium, titanium, and chromium can contribute to the oxide inclusions.
