A mid-range sulfur content would be ideal for welding but any mismatch in the sulfur content of the mating parts will easily outweigh the advantages of low or lower sulfur levels.

An ideal compromise would be a level between 0.005% and 0.02% or a modified maximum limit of 0.02% since the lower limit will probably not be attained.

11.9.4.2 Heat Number and its Impact on Weldability

Weld parameters will remain consistent and orbital welding processors will reproduce similar welds if the material remains the same. Since the melting point of steel varies over a range depending upon the concentration of each element present in the steel, the amount of heat required to melt and thus attain the liquefaction of the steel will vary from concentration to concentration.

Each "melt" of steel is assigned a "Heat Number" to identify the mix or exact composition of the steel.

316L stainless steel has a wide tolerance of "active" elements such as chromium, molybdenum, nickel, and carbon which vary as much as 100% and as little as 12%. These variations will change the melting point and the electrical current input of the welding machine considerably.

Where possible, all fittings, valves, tubing, and weldable pieces of the same nominal size (diameter) should be purchased and manufactured from AISI 316L steel with the same Heat Number in order to standardize the weld quality for each tubing size.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

硫含量的兩難困境

硫 (Sulfur) 在不鏽鋼焊接中扮演矛盾角色：

  • 有利面：適量硫可改善加工性和焊接滲透性
  • 不利面：硫會與錳結合形成 MnS 夾雜物，留在金屬表面成為腐蝕起點
  • 最大風險：兩個配合件的硫含量不匹配 (mismatch) 時，焊接品質會嚴重劣化

理想範圍：0.005% ~ 0.02%——這是 ISPE 給出的「黃金區間」，兼顧焊接品質與表面光潔度。

Heat Number 管理的實務重要性

這是許多新進工程師容易忽略的關鍵點。316L 的規格範圍其實很寬——Cr 可以從 16% 到 18%，Mo 從 2% 到 3%——這些差異會顯著改變熔點。如果同一條管路上，管子是 Heat #A、彎頭是 Heat #B、閥門是 Heat #C，每換一個接頭就要重新調整焊接參數，品質一致性就很難保證。

實務建議：採購時要求同一管徑的所有零件（管材、管件、閥門）來自同一爐號 (Heat Number)。雖然閥門和管件的爐號較難控制，但至少管材應該統一。

比喻說明 Analogy

Heat Number 就像烘焙時的麵粉批號。同一品牌的麵粉，不同批次的蛋白質含量可能略有不同。如果你做蛋糕時中途換了一批麵粉，烤出來的口感就會不一樣。焊接也是如此——同樣標稱 316L，不同爐號的鋼材在同樣的焊接參數下，熔融行為可能完全不同。所以要用「同一批麵粉」做完整個蛋糕。

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 如果供應商無法提供同一 Heat Number 的管件和管材，你應該採取什麼補救措施？
  2. 為什麼 ISPE 建議硫含量上限改為 0.02% 而非原規格的 0.03%？對管路內壁品質有何影響？
11.9.5 Corrosion Hazards of Stainless Steels

Original Text

While being protected by the chrome oxide film, which will guard against most corrosive attacks, there remains five corrosive hazards associated with the successful use of stainless steels.

a) Intergranular Corrosion — Austenitic 300 series stainless steels which do not contain any of the stabilizing elements, titanium, or columbium are susceptible to intergranular corrosion which can cause early failure or reduced life.

b) Galvanic Corrosion — Occurs when an assembly of dissimilar metals is immersed in any solution which acts as an electrolyte. Therefore, any transition of drain or condensate piping to a dissimilar metal should use a dielectric union to prevent electrolysis.

c) Contact Corrosion — Occurs when small pieces of carbon steel, scale, copper or other foreign material is lodged on the surface of stainless steel.

d) Pitting or Pinhole Corrosion — Solutions containing chlorides may attack stainless steel in a pitting action. This is usually due to high concentrations of the chloride ion due to evaporation.

e) Stress Corrosion Cracking — Chloride solutions are the worst offenders in promoting stress cracking. Cracking is most likely to occur in hot rather than cold solutions. High and low stresses in the same member produce a condition likely to result in stress corrosion if chlorides are present.

Corrective action is to keep the internal strain in stainless steels as low as possible by fully annealing or utilizing stress relieved versions of stainless steels at 1200°F.

Select tubing with good concentricity and close wall thickness tolerance to avoid high and uneven stresses when tubes are rolled into tube bundle headers etc. Avoid joining dissimilar metals and avoid cyclic bending.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

五大腐蝕類型速查表

腐蝕類型成因預防措施
晶間腐蝕
Intergranular		碳化鉻沿晶界析出使用 L 級低碳鋼
電偶腐蝕
Galvanic		異種金屬在電解液中接觸使用絕緣接頭 (dielectric union)
接觸腐蝕
Contact		碳鋼碎片等異物附著施工中嚴格隔離碳鋼工具
點蝕
Pitting		氯離子在高濃度下攻擊避免含氯溶液蒸發濃縮
應力腐蝕開裂
Stress Corrosion		氯化物 + 應力 + 高溫退火消除應力、避免異種金屬

CDMO 實務警示

接觸腐蝕是最容易在施工現場犯的錯誤。如果施工團隊之前在碳鋼管路上工作過，然後直接用同一套工具來處理不鏽鋼——磨輪上殘留的碳鋼微粒會嵌入不鏽鋼表面，形成腐蝕核。這就是為什麼 ISPE 後文要求「clean area devoid of any equipment previously used on carbon steels」。

氯化物是不鏽鋼的天敵。在 CDMO 環境中，清洗液配方中如果含有次氯酸鈉 (NaClO)，使用後必須徹底沖洗，否則殘留的氯離子在管壁蒸發濃縮後會造成點蝕。高溫系統（WFI 循環）中的風險更高。

比喻說明 Analogy

想像不鏽鋼的鉻氧化物保護膜是盔甲。五種腐蝕就像五種不同的攻擊方式：晶間腐蝕是從盔甲接縫滲入（沿晶界）、電偶腐蝕是兩種金屬配對產生的「化學電池」自我攻擊、接觸腐蝕是敵方間諜（碳鋼碎片）混入我方陣營、點蝕是精準狙擊（氯離子找弱點）、應力開裂是在高壓下盔甲本身裂開。每種攻擊需要不同的防禦策略。

11.9.6 Corrosion Protection, Passivation & Rouging

Original Text

11.9.6 Corrosion Protection of Stainless Steel

Surface protection of chromium nickel stainless steel is inherent when chromium levels are in excess of 11.5%.

A passive or inert surface is established naturally with these steels due to exposure to air, aerated water, and other oxidizing atmospheres.

Airborne impurities, heating, and other direct contact materials can damage this protective film causing the metal to be compromised in its ability to ward off the corrosive process.

11.9.6.1 Passivation of Stainless Steels to Restore Protective Film

Passivation is the process that establishes a surface or film on nickel-chrome steels and maximizes the corrosion resistance.

The passivation process cleans the exposed surfaces of the contaminates, soils, and surface impurities that cause film damage. The process forms a new strong protective film in areas that have become "active" or sensitized due to welding.

11.9.6.2 Rouging or Ferric Oxide Discoloration of SS Systems

Rouging is seen in many water systems, but is more prominent in hot, distilled, and clean steam systems.

Rouge can be in the form of dust or a light film that can be wiped off. Rouge also can be in the form of a bonded multi-layer that requires scraping with a sharp tool to remove.

Rouge is found in many forms:

  • Orange — found in high purity/high temperature systems
  • Light Red — found in high purity/high temperature systems
  • Red — found in high purity/high temperature systems
  • Reddish Brown — found in high purity/high temperature systems
  • Purple — found in clean steam and high temperature water systems
  • Blue — found in clean steam systems
  • Gray — found in clean steam systems
  • Black — found in clean steam systems

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

鈍化 (Passivation) 原理

鈍化不是「鍍」一層東西上去，而是利用化學方式（通常是硝酸或檸檬酸）清除表面的鐵、污染物和夾雜物，讓鉻原子暴露出來，在空氣中自然形成一層緻密的鉻氧化物 (Cr2O3) 保護膜。

何時需要鈍化：

  • 新系統安裝完成後（管路焊接會破壞原有保護膜）
  • 系統維修或改造後
  • 發現紅鏽 (Rouge) 後
  • 定期預防性維護

紅鏽 (Rouge) 的分級與對策

紅鏽的顏色是系統健康的「體溫計」：

  • 橙色/淺紅：早期 rouge，通常可以用酸洗擦拭去除，再做鈍化即可
  • 紅褐色：中期 rouge，需要化學清洗（CIP derouging）+ 重新鈍化
  • 紫/藍/灰/黑：出現在蒸汽系統中的高溫 rouge，這些是 Fe3O4 (磁鐵礦) 形態，非常難以去除，可能需要刮除並重新電拋光

實務經驗：在 CDMO 工廠中，WFI 高溫循環系統（80°C+）幾乎都會出現某種程度的 rouge。關鍵是建立定期監測和 derouging 計劃，而不是等到嚴重時才處理。

比喻說明 Analogy

鈍化就像給鋼琴定期調音——鋼琴弦（不鏽鋼表面）在使用後會偏離最佳狀態，調音師（鈍化程序）把它恢復到最佳音準（最大耐蝕狀態）。而紅鏽就像鋼琴弦上的鏽斑，顏色從淺到深代表問題從輕到重。淺色的擦擦就好，深色的可能要換弦（重新處理表面）。

11.9.7 Castings/Forgings & 11.9.8 Surface Finish of Stainless Steels

Original Text

11.9.7 Castings and Forgings

Most castings and forgings are used for components attached to vessels, such as agitator impeller hubs and instrument housings. Castings typically contain higher levels of ferrite that can cause potential problems with components in contact with high purity water (rouging). In addition, castings are usually more porous or grainier, and will not typically take a polish higher than a 4 at best. Forgings are less susceptible to rouging and can be polished up to a 8 mirror finish.

11.9.8.1 Cold Rolled Stainless Steel Finishes

300 series stainless steel "sheet" may be produced with a very fine grain, slightly milky appearance through to a bright highly reflective finish produced on mirror polished rolls.

Mills also relate to the ASTM or AISI finishes which range from 1 to 8, where 8 is a "mirror finish." This method also is subjective and relates to the method used to obtain the finish.

11.9.8.2 Stainless Steel Polishes and Improved Finishes

A third identification method commonly used to define surface finishes is the "Grit Finish" which is the number of scratch lines per inch of surface produced by an abrasive wheel or belt.

Grit finishes come in grades related to the standard abrasive tools or surfaces:

  • 20 grit = 100+ RMS and 90+ RA
  • 180 = same as a 2B finish = 80 RMS and 70 RA approximately
  • 240 = between a 2B and a 3A finish = 15 to 63 RMS and 14 to 57 RA
  • 320 = same as an 8 finish = 10 to 32 RMS and 9 to 29 RA
  • 500 = same as a 9 finish = 4 to 16 RMS and 4 to 14 RA

11.9.8.3 Electro-Polishing of Stainless Steel

Mechanical finishing has certain inherent deficiencies, one of which is the tendency to enlarge the exposed surface area.

Electro-polishing is able to improve the mechanical finish by rounding off the sharp peaks of the "scratch lines."

The advantages of electro-polishing are:

  • reduces the surface areas
  • provides a sanitary acceptable surface finish
  • cleans the surface
  • passivates the surface of stainless steel with a chromium layer
  • removes impurities trapped below folded layers of mechanically formed ridges
  • reveals defects that have been hidden by mechanical polishing through smearing effect

Electro-polishing requires a mechanical polish preparation developed with a uniform progressive grit polishing application.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

表面粗糙度換算表

GritASTM FinishRa (micro-inch)典型用途
1802B~70一般工業用
2402B~3A14-57製藥基本要求
32089-29高純度水標準
50094-14WFI 系統 / EP 後

Ra (Roughness Average)：表面粗糙度平均值。製藥業常見規格為 Ra ≤ 25 micro-inch (0.6 μm) 機械拋光 + 電拋光 (EP)。許多 WFI 系統要求 Ra ≤ 15 micro-inch (0.4 μm)。

電拋光 (Electro-Polishing) 的六大優勢

電拋光不只是「讓表面更光亮」——它有六個關鍵功能：

  1. 縮小表面積：平滑的山峰→減少微生物可附著的面積
  2. 達到衛生級表面：滿足 cGMP 清洗要求
  3. 清潔表面：移除機械拋光殘留物
  4. 同時鈍化：形成富鉻保護層——一舉兩得
  5. 揭露隱藏缺陷：機械拋光有「塗抹效應」(smearing effect)，會把缺陷蓋住，EP 反而能揭露
  6. 移除深層雜質：機械拋光形成的褶層下方可能藏有雜質

鑄件 vs 鍛件的關鍵差異

在選擇容器零件時，鍛件 (Forgings) 優於鑄件 (Castings)：

  • 鑄件含較多鐵素體 (ferrite)→更容易產生紅鏽
  • 鑄件多孔、組織粗糙→最多只能拋光到 #4
  • 鍛件組織緻密→可拋光到 #8 鏡面

結論：高純度水系統中，與水接觸的零件應優先使用鍛件。

11.9.9 Stainless Steel Distribution Piping & Bends

Original Text

11.9.9.1 Solid Drawn Thin Wall Tubing

The selected materials are available in solid drawn tube suitable for the type of service expected from a high purity water distribution system. This is an acceptable material for a high purity water loop and should conform to ASTM A632.

Tubing should be 16 gauge (.065 in./0.165 cm) for tubing diameters of between 1 and 3 inches inclusive and 14 gauge for 4 in. diameter.

11.9.9.2 Welded Seam Thin Wall Tubing

Acceptable thin wall tubing is available at a reduced cost with a welded seam produced in an oxygen free environment (TIG).

The tubing is available with a uniform smooth surface in accordance with ASTM A269 and may be polished mechanically and electrically to a suitable surface finish.

The metal is cut and cold rolled to form a round tube. The tube is clamped so that the two edges make contact. The inside and outside of the tube is blanketed with Argon gas to expel all oxygen and the seam is welded without filler, producing a consistent smooth and oxidation free surface inside and out.

11.9.10 Elbows/Bends In Tubing

Current practice is to use tight welded elbows for each directional change in the distribution piping. Considering the extent of high purity water distribution piping, the total number of elbows can range from 130 to 500 and from 60 to 1000 welds to install them.

The purchase of longer lengths than the standard 20 ft (6 m) lengths (say 40 ft (12 m) lengths) and the utilization of long sweeping bends, instead of the traditional tight welded elbows can reduce the total number of welds by up to 60% and the total pipe used by 10%.

Large sweeping bends are preferred in order to reduce the potential of wrinkling and/or damage to the internal pipe finish.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

管材類型比較

特性固體拉製管 (Solid Drawn)焊縫管 (Welded Seam)
標準ASTM A632ASTM A269
成本較高較低
焊縫無（無縫管）有，但在氬氣保護下 TIG 焊接
表面品質優，均勻一致良好，可拋光到相同水準
適用高端 WFI 系統大多數製藥水系統

彎頭策略：60% 焊接減量

這是一個非常有價值的成本與品質優化建議：

  • 傳統做法：每個轉彎用焊接彎頭 → 一個彎頭 = 2 個焊縫
  • 優化做法：使用 40 ft 長管 + 大弧度彎管 (sweeping bends) → 減少焊接數量達 60%
  • 每少一條焊縫 = 少一個潛在缺陷點 + 少一個微生物可能的駐足處

一個大型 WFI 系統可能有 500+ 個焊縫。減少 60% 意味著少了 300 個需要檢查、記錄、驗證的焊點。這對施工品質和驗證效率的提升是巨大的。

管壁厚度規格

16 gauge (0.065 in / 1.65 mm)：適用於 1"-3" 管徑

14 gauge (0.083 in / 2.11 mm)：適用於 4" 管徑

更大管徑依應用和位置選擇適當壁厚。選擇的原則是：壁厚要足以承受壓力和焊接熱量，但不能太厚導致焊接困難。

11.9.11 Types of Non-Metallic Materials (PVDF)

Original Text

Few compatible non-metallic piping materials are available that will withstand the rigors of a pharmaceutical high purity water system, such as: 80 to 90°C operation or periodic sanitization, 121°C steam sterilizing temperatures, ozone and/or chlorine contact.

One such material that will support the above requirements and limit extractable to a minimum level compatible with stainless steel is polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF).

This material is available in a compatible range of pipe diameters, surface finishes, and automated orbital welding capability.

11.9.11.1 Corrosive Resistance of PVDF

PVDF is inert and will not exhibit any surface corrosion when in contact with 90°C high purity water or commonly used oxidizers.

11.9.11.2 Weldability and Polishability of PVDF

The surface finish of PVDF is equivalent to electro-polished stainless steel and the fusion welding equipment and capabilities are similar to stainless steel orbital welders.

11.9.11.3 PVDF Distribution Piping and Fittings

Weldable fittings, elbows, tees, reducers, adapters, diaphragm valves, zero static valves, flow meters, regulators, etc. are available for PVDF pipe.

11.9.11.4 Pressure Rating of PVDF Piping Systems

Rated pressures for PVDF piping ranges from 230 psi at 68°C to 50 psi at 149°C.

Due to softening at elevated temperatures, continuous support is recommended for systems that are operated at 65°C or above.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

PVDF vs 不鏽鋼比較

特性316L SSPVDF
耐溫極高最高 149°C（但壓力大幅降低）
耐蝕優良（但有氯離子風險）完全惰性，無腐蝕問題
Rouge會發生不會發生
表面需拋光+鈍化出廠即等同 EP 表面
焊接需氬氣保護熱熔融焊接
支撐標準間距即可高溫下需連續支撐
成本材料較低、施工較高材料較高、免鈍化

PVDF 的壓力-溫度限制

這是選用 PVDF 時最關鍵的工程考量。塑膠材料的強度會隨溫度升高而急劇下降：

  • 68°C → 230 psi（正常操作，強度充足）
  • 149°C → 50 psi（蒸汽滅菌時，強度大幅下降）

設計要點：65°C 以上操作時必須使用連續支撐（角鐵或等效結構），防止管路因軟化而下垂改變坡度。熱脹冷縮也比不鏽鋼顯著得多，需要在設計中納入膨脹迴圈或補償措施。

比喻說明 Analogy

PVDF 就像高級矽膠——化學上幾乎什麼都不怕，但物理上「軟」。不鏽鋼像盔甲——硬度夠但有化學弱點（氯離子、rouge）。選材就像選裝備：如果你的水系統溫度不太高、不需要蒸汽滅菌，PVDF 可能是更省心的選擇（不用鈍化、不會 rouge）；但如果系統需要承受高溫高壓，不鏽鋼的「硬度」優勢就無可取代。

11.10 Design of a WFI/Purified Water Distribution System

Original Text

The layout and general design of a high purity water system (WFI or purified water) should be consistent and follow good manufacturing guidelines in respect to installation, support, natural drainage, flow rates, dead or stagnation areas (dead legs), and minimization of areas that may promote micro-organism growth.

11.10.1 Fittings and Equipment

All equipment that, when installed, comes in direct contact with the high purity water should use a suitable stainless steel or non-metallic material for all contact areas, except for valve diaphragms and tri-clamp gaskets.

Valve design should be sanitary diaphragm type, installed at approximately 60° to the vertical to optimize drainability. Hash marks or drain dots are provided on many designs to allow precise orientation of the valves in horizontal installations.

PTFE Teflon faced diaphragms are preferred for hot water applications, covering a temperature range from -30 to 350°F (0 to 177°C).

Connecting flanges for all valves and fittings should be tri-clamp design.

11.10.2 Natural Drainage

Well designed distribution loops should be installed overhead and point of use valves should be located at a convenient location within the process or user area, below the distribution loop.

Slopes should be verified externally after hanging and before insulation is installed.

Piping distribution from an unavoidable low point should be designed with a clear low point and a sanitary drain valve installed with a maximum of 6 diameter dead leg (no less than 6 diameters from the centerline of the main line to the valve center line based on the main line diameter).

Slope of distribution system process pipe or tubing should be a minimum of 1/16 in./ft (0.52 cm/m).

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

配水系統設計關鍵參數

  • 管路坡度：最小 1/16 in./ft (0.52 cm/m)——確保自然排空
  • 閥門安裝角度：與垂直方向成 60°——優化排水性
  • Dead Leg 限制：最大 6 倍主管管徑——超過此值水會停滯
  • 法蘭型式：Tri-clamp 衛生連接——易拆卸清洗
  • 隔膜材質：PTFE Teflon——適用高溫至 177°C

Dead Leg 的 6D 法則

「6 diameter dead leg」是高純度水系統中最常被稽核員檢查的設計準則之一。舉例：如果主管管徑是 2 英寸，則從主管中心到支管閥門中心的距離不得超過 12 英寸 (6 x 2")。

為什麼重要：Dead leg 中的水是靜止的，無法被主管路的湍流帶走微生物和生物膜。FDA 查廠時會拿捲尺量——這不是理論問題，是實際執行問題。

坡度驗證時機：ISPE 特別提醒要在「after hanging and before insulation」時驗證坡度。一旦包了保溫層就看不到了，而且保溫層的重量可能改變管路的坡度。

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 為什麼閥門要以 60° 安裝而非垂直或水平？如果安裝角度錯誤會造成什麼問題？
  2. 如果系統設計中有一個 dead leg 超過 6D 限制但無法避免，你會建議什麼工程補償措施？
11.11 Fabrication of a WFI/PW Distribution System

Original Text

11.11.1 Assurance of Quality Distribution Piping

The distribution piping and storage systems should be installed in accordance with cGMPs and should be fabricated, manufactured, procured, and installed in strict accordance with explicit operating procedures.

11.11.2 Operating Procedures Should Include:

Purchase of components from a list of selected/preferred vendors. Procurement based on preferred part numbers. Procurement of other components using approved specifications.

Inspection of all components on receipt for compliance and/or damage. Verification of the bill of lading.

Fabrication requirements:

  • Receiving, fabrication, cutting, end facing, and welding to be performed in a clean area devoid of any equipment previously used on "carbon" steels
  • Tubing specification, heat lot, diameter to be used for the specific application
  • Check tubing for crushing and confirm the nominal diameter
  • Examine interior and exterior for physical damage, scratches (interior) dirt or grease
  • Clean tubing using approved cleaning solvent isopropyl alcohol (IPA) and lint free cloth
  • Cut tubing to length and finish with a square deburred butt end

11.11.2.1 Cleaning

  • Place a lint free cloth in tubing prior to facing and/or deburring
  • Use only Isopropyl alcohol for SS and other appropriate solvent for PVDF
  • Use only lint free cloths such as "Texwipe"
  • Clean both inside and outside of tube ends and do not touch the end area with bare hands or soiled material

11.11.2.2 Protection

  • Bag the prepared tubing with clear plastic bags if not to be welded within two hours
  • Weld fittings should be received sealed in a plastic or other lint free, non-metallic sealed bag
  • The fitting should remain in the bag until just prior to welding or for inspection

Welding should be performed inside the fabrication cleanroom, using TIG orbital welding for SS and PVDF fusion machine for PVDF.

Purging with Argon gas 99.999% pure containing less than 1 ppm of moisture or 2 ppm of oxygen. The complete removal of all air should be accomplished prior to commencing welding.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

施工品質保證程序總覽

ISPE 在這裡建立了一個從採購到安裝的完整品質鏈：

  1. 採購控制：AVL (Approved Vendor List) + 指定料號
  2. 進料檢驗：核對提貨單、檢查損傷
  3. 準備程序：切割、端面加工、清潔
  4. 保護程序：2 小時規則——未焊接的管端必須封袋
  5. 焊接程序：在潔淨室中、氬氣保護下進行

「2 小時規則」與碳鋼隔離

兩個容易被忽略但極其重要的規定：

1. 兩小時封袋規則：準備好的管端如果不在 2 小時內焊接，必須用透明塑膠袋封住。這是因為暴露在空氣中的潔淨管端會累積灰塵、油氣和水氣，汙染焊接區域。

2. 碳鋼零容忍：施工區域不得有任何曾用於碳鋼的設備。碳鋼微粒即使是微量的，嵌入不鏽鋼表面後就成為腐蝕起點。很多承包商不理解這一點，會用同一台砂輪機「先磨碳鋼再磨不鏽鋼」——這是絕對不可以的。

氬氣純度要求

99.999% 純度（5N），水分 <1 ppm，氧氣 <2 ppm。

這個要求比一般工業焊接的氬氣純度（99.95%~99.99%）高一個等級。原因是：即使微量的氧氣或水分，在焊接高溫下都會與不鏽鋼表面反應，造成氧化變色——這正是後文所列多種焊接缺陷的根本原因之一。

液態氬氣 (Dewar) 優先：因為液態氬氣的純度天生就高（雜質在液化過程中已被分離）。再加上 Nanochem 等純化器，可以把汙染物降到 ppb 等級。

Original Text

11.11.3 Clean Preparation Area

A cleanroom/trailer should be used to ensure that welding, bending, and fabrication of high purity water piping are not contaminated with metal or non-metallic particulates.

The area should be filtered to control particulates with limited controlled access. The following procedures should be followed:

  • All cutting and welding equipment should be cleaned of any impurities or particulates
  • The room should be maintained clean at all times and access should be across sticky floor mats
  • All piping and fittings should be cleaned prior to and following welding
  • Assemblies should be bagged following welding and the bags removed just prior to making field welds
  • Welding and fitting technicians should use overshoes and cleanroom gloves. The gloves are worn to prevent finger print oils from getting onto the pipe

The above procedures are currently typical for a high purity piping system for the semi-conductor industry and is considered advisable for pharmaceutical installations with similar requirements.

Inspection of completed welds is sometimes not possible or practical. Common practice is to provide a validated process for all welds, a precise instrument to make the welds, an inert environment around the weld and a clean contact surface.

Spot checks of the outside and inside surfaces on a percentage or time basis will provide assurance of the system efficiency.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

潔淨施工區域管控要點

ISPE 推薦的潔淨施工規格，其實借鏡自半導體業的做法：

  • 過濾通風：控制空氣中的微粒
  • 黏性地墊 (Sticky Mats)：入口處除塵
  • 受限進入：只有經過培訓的人員可進入
  • 個人防護：鞋套 + 潔淨室手套（防指紋油脂）
  • 焊後封袋：組裝件焊完立刻封袋，到現場才拆

「Validated Process」的重要概念

由於管路內部焊縫的檢查往往不可能或不實際（管子太長、位置難以到達），ISPE 的策略是：與其逐條檢查結果，不如驗證整個製程。

這是典型的「Process Validation」思維：

  1. 精確的焊接設備（validated instrument）
  2. 惰性氣體環境（inert environment）
  3. 潔淨的接觸面（clean contact surface）
  4. 經資格認證的焊工（qualified welder）

當這四個條件都被驗證和控制時，就可以合理地相信每一條焊縫都符合品質要求——無需百分之百檢查。

11.11.4-11.11.5 Orbital Welding & Borescoping

Original Text

11.11.4 Joints Using Fusion Butt Welding

Orbital welding is the recommended industry standard for high purity water systems in biotech, pharmaceutical and semi-conductor industries. This is due to the smooth inner weld bead that is characteristic of this joining process.

11.11.4.1 Orbital Welding

Orbital welding is a welding method used for joining stainless steel piping and tubing with electric arc in a welding machine not using any filler (welding rod) under inert atmosphere argon (Ar). Electric power characteristics are displayed on the control panel instruments and, if required, a printout of the welding parameters can be obtained.

11.11.4.2 Borescoping

A borescope is a fiber optic instrument with a monitor (TV screen and optional video tape recorder) used for inspecting the weld inside the pipe or tubing. The fiber-glass cable is a maximum 20 ft. long with a light and lens at the end.

With the control of the welding process and the processing area, borescope inspection of the inside of the weld is only considered necessary as a means of control and is recommended as part of the qualifying process for the weld size and daily restart checks.

Video recording each weld is considered un-necessary and difficult to justify.

11.11.5 High Tech. Orbital Tube and Pipe Welding for SS

Semi-automatic, programmable, orbital, inert gas purged welding equipment for both tube and pipe is available from many manufacturers. The system is an automatic "Heliarc" or "TIG" (Tungsten Inert Gas) process where Inert Argon gas from a cryogenic or low temperature source is used to protect the molten steel from oxidation during the metal fusion.

Liquid argon in Dewars is preferred due to its high purity at 99.999%. A gas purifier such as the Nanochem should be used during purging to bring the contaminants down to the ppb levels which is preferred.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

軌道焊接 (Orbital Welding) 原理

為什麼是「軌道」：焊頭沿著管外圓周自動旋轉（orbits around the tube），不需要人工操控焊槍方向。

關鍵特徵：

  • 無填料 (Autogenous)：不加焊條，靠母材本身熔融結合
  • TIG/GTAW 製程：鎢極惰性氣體保護焊
  • 可程式化：電流、速度、脈衝等參數可精確設定並記錄
  • 可重現：同樣參數 + 同樣材料 = 同樣品質的焊縫

內視鏡 (Borescope) 檢查策略

ISPE 對內視鏡檢查的態度很務實：

  • 不是每條焊縫都要做——因為製程已經被驗證
  • 建議用於：焊接資格認證 (qualification) 和每日開工檢查 (daily restart)
  • 錄影每條焊縫不必要——ISPE 明確說「difficult to justify」

實務建議：制定一個抽檢計劃，例如每個焊工每天前 3 條焊縫做 borescope，加上隨機抽檢 5-10%。這比「全檢」更有成本效益，同時提供足夠的品質保證。

比喻說明 Analogy

軌道焊接就像精密的 3D 列印機在管子接口上「印」出一圈完美的金屬融合線。人工焊接像手寫書法——高手可以寫得很美，但品質不穩定；軌道焊接像印表機——每次輸出幾乎一模一樣。這也是為什麼可以用「製程驗證」取代「逐一檢查」：既然機器每次做的都一樣，你只要驗證設定是對的，就可以信任產出。

11.11.6 Weld Criteria & Welder Qualification

Original Text

11.11.6 Weld Criteria

  • Weld quality must meet the strictest standards
  • All welds must be fully penetrated around the entire weld perimeter with no crevices or entrapment sites. These areas are particularly vulnerable to crevice corrosion
  • All welds should be smooth, uniform, complete and flat, not concave, on the outside
  • The weld should have a uniform and complete weld bead width on the inside with little or no convexity
  • The inner weld bead should contain no concavity
  • There should be no visible signs of oxidation/discoloration of the inner weld
  • The joints should be square facing and properly aligned. Tubing surfaces should not be offset in any plane or direction by more than +/-0.003 in.
  • The weld width should be nominal 1/8 in. wide

11.11.6.1 Welder Qualification

Each welder performing welding on certain metals must be qualified for this type of metal and welding. The American Society of Mechanical Engineers (ASME) and the American Welding Society (AWS) have welding procedures for welder qualifications.

As a general rule, welders and welding procedures are qualified to ASME B 31.3 (chemical plant and petroleum refinery piping), that incorporates ASME Section IX by reference.

11.11.6.2 Common Test Methods

Test methods on installed piping are: pressure testing, verification of slope, and the last step of passivation requiring the testing of the final rinse water.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

焊縫品質八大準則

  1. 完全熔透 (Full Penetration)：焊縫必須貫穿整個管壁厚度，360°無死角
  2. 無縫隙 (No Crevices)：任何縫隙都會成為縫隙腐蝕和微生物棲息地
  3. 外部平坦：不可凹陷 (concave)
  4. 內部焊道均勻：盡量無凸起
  5. 內部不可凹陷：凹陷處會積水成為死角
  6. 無氧化變色：內部焊縫必須銀白色
  7. 對齊精度：管壁偏移 ≤ 0.003 in. (0.076 mm)——比一根頭髮還細
  8. 焊道寬度：標稱 1/8 in. (3.2 mm)

焊工資格認證

ASME B31.3 + Section IX 是製藥管路焊接資格的標準依據。每位焊工必須：

  • 通過特定金屬類型和焊接方法的認證
  • 持有正式的焊工資格證書
  • 每個工作日開始前重新資格驗證
  • 更換管徑時重新資格驗證

實務提醒：「每日開工檢查」(daily restart check) 不是走形式——它確保焊接設備經過一夜停機後仍在最佳狀態，同時也驗證焊工的手感沒有因為休息而偏差。第一條焊縫用 borescope 檢查確認品質後，才能繼續正式焊接。

0.003 in. 偏移容差的意義

0.003 英寸 = 0.076 mm，大約是一張影印紙的厚度。這個容差之所以如此嚴格，是因為管壁錯位會在焊縫內部形成一個「階梯」(step)，而這個階梯就是一個潛在的微生物附著點和縫隙腐蝕起始點。要達到這種精度，除了高品質的軌道焊接設備外，管材本身的同心度 (concentricity) 和壁厚均勻度也必須非常好。

11.11.7 Weld Defects Examples

Original Text

The following are common weld defects with their causes and corrective actions:

11.11.7.1 Joint Misalignment — Poor alignment of joint caused by equipment or procedure failure. Follow GMP welding procedures/use tube alignment gauge.

11.11.7.2 Lack of Penetration — Weld bead does not completely penetrate the ID of tube. Caused by poor setting of weld program parameters, material thickness and/or composition issues, or improper welding amperage from power fluctuations.

11.11.7.3 Excessive Penetration — Weld bead over penetrates causing excessive concavity or spikes. Caused by incorrect weld program (too hot), excessive amperage, or material variations.

11.11.7.4 Lack of I.D. Purge — Discoloration/oxidization in the heat affected zone caused by lack of ID purge or impure purge gas. Sugaring of the weld bead caused by a lack of ID purge.

11.11.7.5 Interrupted Purge — Short segment of discoloration/oxidation and excessive penetration caused by momentary purge gas pressure drop, commonly from a pinched gas line.

11.11.7.6 Purge Gas Purity Problems — Coloration/oxidation along weld area caused by impurities in weld purge gas or in/on the metal surface.

11.11.7.7 Heat Tint/Haze — Light coloration/haze along weld area caused by minor impurities in weld purge gas or metal surface.

11.11.7.8 Oxidation/Discoloration — Discoloration ranging from blue/brown haze to dark blue with black edges. Caused by oxygen contaminated purge gas, incomplete sealing, or insufficient pre-purge.

11.11.7.9 Insufficient Tie-In — Weld on OD is good, but ID is incomplete and does not overlap weld start. Caused by incorrect speed or time in weld program (uncalibrated weld head).

11.11.7.10 Electrical Current Fluctuations — Significant narrowing of ID weld bead and/or lack of penetration caused by power fluctuations (not using a dedicated circuit).

11.11.7.11 Inclusions/Dross — Non-metallic formation on ID weld caused by tungsten inclusion.

11.11.7.12 Pinholing — Small holes in weld bead caused by weld puddle being cooled too rapidly. Ramp (feather) the welding amperage properly and provide post purge.

11.11.7.13 Porosity — Metallic or non-metallic impurities trapped in the weld bead (tungsten or slag). Caused by introduction of impurities from outside or from the weld material.

11.11.7.14 Cracking — Cracks in the surface of the weld caused by brittle metal or very hot weld program with rapid cooling. Use only good quality materials and acceptable welding programs. Do not quench or cool the weld.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

14 種焊接缺陷分類速查表

類別缺陷主因
機械/對位接頭錯位設備/程序故障
熔透不足參數設定不當
過度熔透電流過高
氣體保護缺乏 ID 保護未通保護氣
保護氣中斷氣管被壓扁
氣體純度問題保護氣含雜質
熱色/霧化微量雜質
氧化變色氧氣汙染/密封不良
程式/電力銜接不足焊頭未校準
電流波動未用專線迴路
材料/冶金夾雜物/渣鎢極夾帶
針孔 (Pinholing)冷卻過快
氣孔 (Porosity)外來雜質
裂紋 (Cracking)脆性金屬/急冷

氣體保護問題佔 5/14 = 36%

統計 14 種缺陷，會發現有 5 種（超過三分之一）都與氬氣保護有關。這告訴我們：管好保護氣體就能預防三分之一以上的焊接問題。

氣體管理三要件：

  1. 純度：99.999%，使用液態氬氣 + 純化器
  2. 流量：監控焊接現場的實際流量，而非只看調壓器設定
  3. 密封：確保氣管無洩漏、無被壓扁，管路兩端完全密封

「Sugaring」——最嚴重的氣體保護失敗

「Sugaring」是焊縫內部因完全缺乏保護氣而產生的粗糙、顆粒狀氧化物，外觀像結晶砂糖。這是最嚴重的焊接缺陷之一，因為：

  • 粗糙的表面是微生物生物膜的理想棲息地
  • 無法透過清洗或鈍化修復
  • 唯一的解決方案是切除焊縫重新焊接

練習思考 Practice Questions

  1. 如果你在一天的焊接工作中，第 50 條焊縫突然出現藍色變色，最可能的根本原因是什麼？你會檢查哪些項目？
  2. 為什麼 ISPE 建議使用「dedicated circuit」（專用迴路）？在施工現場如何確保這一點？
  3. 如果一條焊縫的外部看起來完美，但 borescope 顯示內部有針孔，可能的原因是什麼？
11.11.8 PVDF Welding

Original Text

Semi automatic fusion welding machines are available for orbital welding of PVDF piping.

An elastic pressure element backs up the inside of the fusion zone, totally avoiding an inner bead.

A controlled pressure thermoplastic melt optimizes the homogeneous joint between the plastic parts, producing a consistent joint quality.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

PVDF 焊接 vs SS 焊接

PVDF 焊接與不鏽鋼焊接有本質區別：

  • 原理不同：SS 是電弧熔融→PVDF 是熱板/紅外線熱熔融
  • 無需保護氣：塑膠不會氧化，省去氬氣系統
  • 無內焊道：彈性壓力元件支撐內壁，避免形成突出的焊道
  • 均質結合：熱塑性材料在分子層級融合，接合品質非常一致

PVDF 焊接的最大優勢是「完全沒有內焊道」(no inner bead)——不鏽鋼焊接即使做到最好，內部仍會有一個微凸的焊道，而 PVDF 的內壁可以做到幾乎完全平滑。

11.11.9 Remedial Action for Defective Welds

Original Text

Rewelding or weld repairs are not acceptable.

Weld Replacements — The following is a procedure for replacing defective welds:

  1. Cut out rejected weld using a band or cut-off saw
  2. Where possible, retain section for further inspection
  3. Prepare faces of tubing and check for signs of discoloration
  4. Ensure that all traces of any heat affected areas are removed
  5. Cut and shape pipe ends using proprietary facing equipment
  6. Debur and reweld
  7. Assign a "R" suffix to weld number

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

「零修補」原則 — 最嚴格的焊接品管

「Rewelding or weld repairs are not acceptable」——這句話的意思是：如果一條焊縫不合格，你不能在原位重新焊接或補焊。必須把整個焊縫切除，重新準備管端，然後重新焊接。

原因：

  • 重焊或補焊會在同一位置造成多次熱影響，改變金屬微觀結構
  • 多次加熱可能導致碳化鉻析出（敏化），增加晶間腐蝕風險
  • 補焊無法保證與原焊道的完美融合，可能形成隱藏的縫隙

焊縫替換 7 步驟

注意第 (g) 步——替換焊縫必須在焊縫編號後加「R」字尾。例如原始焊縫 W-047 被替換後，新焊縫編號為 W-047R。這確保了完整的追溯性 (traceability)：任何人看到「R」就知道這是替換焊縫，可以追查原始缺陷報告。

第 (b) 步「retain section for further inspection」也很重要——保留被切除的焊縫段可以做根本原因分析 (RCA)，避免同類缺陷再次發生。

11.11.10 Joints Using Sanitary Clamps

Original Text

The sanitary clamp system of quick disconnect fittings are designed to provide a smooth non-contacting or non-corrosive environment.

The sanitary joints may be cleaned in place, provide leak tight connections and may be adapted to other forms of piping.

These joints should be used for all distribution pipe connections to valves, sensor housings, and fittings not adaptable to orbital fusion welding.

導師解析 Tutorial Commentary

衛生夾具 (Tri-Clamp) 的角色

衛生夾具是高純度水系統中唯一可接受的「非焊接」連接方式。它的設計特點：

  • 快速拆裝：不需要特殊工具，方便維護和檢查
  • 平滑內壁：兩個對接面 + EPDM/PTFE 墊片，形成連續平滑的內表面
  • 可 CIP 清洗：不必拆開就能用線上清洗系統處理
  • 防洩漏：適當的夾具力矩可確保密封

使用場景

Tri-clamp 連接用於所有「需要可拆卸」的位置：

  • 閥門連接：閥門可能需要定期更換隔膜
  • 感測器安裝：溫度、壓力、電導度感測器需要校準和更換
  • 無法軌道焊接的位置：空間受限或最終連接點

注意：墊片是最弱的環節——必須定期檢查和更換，特別是在高溫 WFI 系統中，墊片老化速度較快。

本章重點摘要 Chapter Summary

  • 材料選擇：316L 是首選，因為低碳含量降低晶間腐蝕風險，Mo 增強抗點蝕能力。所有零件盡量使用同一 Heat Number 以確保焊接一致性
  • 硫含量控制：理想範圍 0.005%-0.02%。配合件硫含量不匹配是焊接品質的最大威脅之一
  • 五大腐蝕類型：晶間、電偶、接觸、點蝕、應力開裂——每種都有特定的預防策略
  • 鈍化與紅鏽：鈍化是恢復保護膜的關鍵程序；Rouge 顏色從淺到深代表問題嚴重程度遞增
  • 表面處理：電拋光 (EP) 優於純機械拋光，能同時清潔、平滑化、鈍化，並揭露隱藏缺陷
  • PVDF 替代方案：化學惰性、無 rouge 風險、表面等同 EP，但高溫下強度下降需連續支撐
  • 施工環境：必須在潔淨室中進行，碳鋼工具零容忍，2 小時封袋規則，人員穿戴鞋套和手套
  • 軌道焊接：業界標準，無填料 TIG 製程。Borescope 用於資格認證和每日抽檢，非全檢
  • 焊縫品質：八大準則，偏移容差 0.003 in.。14 種常見缺陷中 36% 與氣體保護有關
  • 缺陷處理：零修補原則——不合格焊縫必須切除重做，不可在原位修補。替換焊縫編號加「R」字尾
  • 衛生夾具：用於所有需要可拆卸的連接位置（閥門、感測器、最終接口）

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems

Appendix 11.9-11.11: Fabrication/Procedures for Distribution Systems | p222-p236

SterileGMP Knowledge Hub — Bilingual Educational Edition

A10-12

Chapter A10-12: Appendix: Design & Glossary

附錄：設計細則與術語 | p229-p250

ISPE Baseline® Guide Volume 4: Water and Steam Systems | p229–p250

本章學習目標

  • 了解 WFI/PW 配送系統的設計原則：管件選用、自然排水坡度、死角控制
  • 掌握高純水配管系統的完整施工程序：從來料檢驗、清潔保護到焊接環境控制
  • 理解軌道焊接（Orbital Welding）技術原理、焊接標準與焊工資格認證要求
  • 辨識 14 種常見焊接缺陷的成因與矯正措施，建立品質判斷能力
  • 了解 PVDF 管件焊接的特殊要求與缺陷焊縫的處理程序
  • 熟悉製藥用水系統的完整專業術語與縮寫，作為日常工作參考工具

Section Navigation

11.10 Distribution Design 11.11 Fabrication 11.11.3 Clean Area 11.11.4 Orbital Welding 11.11.6 Weld Criteria 11.11.7 Weld Defects 11.11.8 PVDF Welding 11.11.9 Remedial Action 11.11.10 Sanitary Clamps 11.12.1 Definitions 11.12.2 Abbreviations
11.10 Design of a WFI/Purified Water Distribution System

Original Text

11.10 Design of a WFI/Purified Water Distribution System

The layout and general design of a high purity water system (WFI or purified water) should be consistent and follow good manufacturing guidelines in respect to installation, support, natural drainage, flow rates, dead or stagnation areas (dead legs), and minimization of areas that may promote micro-organism growth.

11.10.1 Fittings and Equipment

All equipment that, when installed, comes in direct contact with the high purity water should use a suitable stainless steel or non-metallic material for all contact areas, except for valve diaphragms and tri-clamp gaskets.

This includes all valves and monitoring sensors.

Valve design should be sanitary diaphragm type, installed at approximately 60° to the vertical to optimize drainability. Hash marks or drain dots are provided on many designs to allow precise orientation of the valves in horizontal installations.

PTFE Teflon faced diaphragms are preferred for hot water applications, covering a temperature range from -30 to 350°F (0 to 177°C).

Connecting flanges for all valves and fittings should be tri-clamp design.

11.10.2 Natural Drainage

Well designed distribution loops should be installed overhead and point of use valves should be located at a convenient location within the process or user area, below the distribution loop.

Slopes should be verified externally after hanging and before insulation is installed.

Hangers should use steel clamps/fittings with Viton or similar inserts designed for use with the particular tubing, installed for SS at least on 10 ft (3 m) centers. Support for PVDF piping should be appropriate for the operating temperatures. Continuous support of plastic pipe should be considered using angle iron or equivalent to prevent slope changes due to expansion and contraction and point stresses from hangers.

Piping distribution from an unavoidable low point in the system, such as the storage tank discharge elbow, should be designed with a clear low point and a sanitary drain valve installed with a maximum of 6 diameter dead leg (no less than 6 diameters from the centerline of the main line to the valve center line based on the main line diameter).

Slope of distribution system process pipe or tubing should be a minimum of 1/16 in./ft (0.52 cm/m).

Location of all drain valves should be totally and easily accessible.

Tutorial Commentary

配送系統設計的核心原則

高純水配送系統設計必須同時滿足三大要求：

  • 可排水性（Drainability）：所有管線必須能完全排空，避免死水區域
  • 防微生物增長：消除死角（dead legs）、確保持續流動
  • 材質相容性：所有接觸面使用不鏽鋼或合格非金屬材料

關鍵數值記憶

  • 閥門安裝角度：60° to vertical（非水平安裝），優化排水
  • Dead leg 最大值：6 倍管徑（從主管中心線到閥門中心線）
  • 最小坡度：1/16 in./ft = 0.52 cm/m
  • SS 支撐間距：每 10 ft (3 m) 一個支架
  • PVDF 管件：需要連續支撐（因高溫軟化）

比喻說明

想像一條山間溪流：設計師希望水流在每一段管路中都能像溪水一樣「自然流動、自然排空」。如果管路有凹陷或水平段，就像溪流中的水潭 -- 水會停滯、微生物就會開始滋生。所以每段管路都必須有明確的坡度，讓水在停機時能靠重力自然排出。

實務重點：Tri-clamp 設計

Tri-clamp（三片式卡箍）是製藥級管件連接的標準。所有閥門、感測器都應使用 tri-clamp 連接，因為它：

  • 提供平整的內壁接觸面（無螺紋死角）
  • 可快速拆裝進行清潔和維護
  • 使用 EPDM 或 PTFE 墊片確保密封
11.11 Fabrication of a WFI/PW Distribution System

Original Text

11.11 Fabrication of a WFI/Purified Water Distribution System

High purity water distribution systems using the material and finishes specified above must be joined using acceptable welding or other sanitary techniques.

11.11.1 Assurance of Quality Distribution Piping

The distribution piping and storage systems should be installed in accordance with cGMPs and should be fabricated, manufactured, procured, and installed in strict accordance with explicit operating procedures.

11.11.2 Operating Procedures Should Include the Following:

Purchase of components for the distribution and storage system from a list of selected/preferred vendors. Procurement of specific components based on preferred part numbers, listed for each vendor where applicable. Procurement of other components, such as valves, pumps, filters, instruments, and tanks etc. using approved specifications.

Inspection of all components of the system on receipt for compliance and/or damage. Verification of the bill of lading using a detailed list of purchased parts.

The qualification of welding procedures in accordance with a detailed list of set-up parameters for:

  1. Receiving, fabrication, cutting, end facing, and welding to be performed in a clean area devoid of any equipment previously used on “carbon” steels.
  2. Tubing specification, heat lot, diameter to be used for the specific application:
    • Check tubing for crushing and confirm the nominal diameter.
    • Examine interior and exterior of tubing for physical damage, scratches (interior) dirt or grease.
    • Clean tubing of grease and dirt using an approved cleaning solvent isopropyl alcohol (IPA) and lint free cloth. Repeat cleaning until lint free cloth is visually free of grease or dirt.
  3. Length of tubing and facing specifications. Cut tubing to length and finish with a square deburred butt end or as recommended by the fusion welding equipment supplier.

11.11.2.1 Cleaning

  • Place a lint free cloth in tubing prior to facing and/or deburring.
  • Use only Isopropyl alcohol as a cleaner solvent for SS and other appropriate solvent for PVDF. Use sparingly and ensure that all traces have evaporated prior to bagging.
  • Use only lint free cloths such as “Texwipe.”
  • Clean both inside and outside of tube ends and do not touch the end area with bare hands or soiled material.

11.11.2.2 Protection

  1. Bag the prepared tubing or the ends of the tubing with clear plastic bags and tape the bag to the tubing if the tubing is not to be welded within two hours or if the tube is to be welded outside the clean fabrication area.
  2. Weld fittings, elbows, tees, etc. should be examined similar to the tubing and cleaned of all dirt or grease prior to welding. All weld fittings should be received, sealed in a plastic or other lint free, non-metallic sealed bag.
  3. The fitting should remain in the bag until just prior to welding or for inspection following receipt.

Valves and instruments, etc. should be procured with tri-clamp or suitable sanitary type fittings and mating fittings should be welded onto the tubing in accordance with the system design.

Welding of tubing, weld fittings, tri-clamp, or suitable sanitary type fittings should be performed inside the fabrication cleanroom, using TIG orbital welding for SS throughout and PVDF fusion machine for PVDF.

Purging of each assembly with Argon Purge gas should be completed for all SS prior to welding. The gas should be 99.999% pure and contain less than 1 ppm of moisture or 2 ppm of oxygen.

The complete removal of all air should be accomplished prior to commencing welding.

Welder qualifications should be performed for all welders and re-qualification at the commencement of each work-day and/or the change to a different diameter.

Tutorial Commentary

施工品質控管的完整鏈條

ISPE 把配管施工視為一個完整的品質鏈條，每一環都不能斷裂：

  1. 採購控管：使用核准供應商清單（AVL）與指定料號
  2. 到貨檢驗：逐件比對 Bill of Lading
  3. 清潔準備：IPA 清洗 + 無塵布擦拭
  4. 保護措施：2 小時內未焊接必須封袋
  5. 焊接環境：潔淨室內操作，禁止碳鋼設備
  6. 保護氣體：99.999% 純度氬氣
  7. 人員資格：每日開工前須重新認證

為什麼不能混用碳鋼設備？

碳鋼微粒如果殘留在不鏽鋼管內壁，會形成電偶腐蝕（Galvanic Corrosion）的起始點。即使是肉眼不可見的微量碳鋼碎屑，也能在高純水環境中引發 rouge（紅鏽）形成，進而污染整個水系統。

這就是為什麼 ISPE 要求施工區域完全隔離碳鋼作業。

比喻：就像手術室的無菌操作

高純水配管施工就像外科手術：管件是「器官」，焊接區是「手術室」，氬氣是「無菌環境」，IPA 清潔是「消毒擦拭」。外科醫師不會用碰過地面的手術刀，同理，施工人員也不能用接觸過碳鋼的工具。

2 小時的封袋時限就像手術器械的有效無菌期 -- 超過時間就必須重新準備。

氬氣純度要求 -- 99.999%

這個「五個 9」的純度要求代表：

  • 水分 < 1 ppm
  • 氧氣 < 2 ppm

使用液態氬氣（Dewar 瓶）比高壓鋼瓶更佳，因為液態氬氣在蒸發過程中自然達到極高純度。搭配 Nanochem 等氣體純化器可將雜質降至 ppb 等級。

11.11.3 Clean Preparation Area

Original Text

11.11.3 Clean Preparation Area

A cleanroom/trailer should be used to ensure that welding, bending, and fabrication of high purity water piping are not contaminated with metal or non-metallic particulates.

The area should be filtered to control particulates with limited controlled access. The following procedures should be followed:

  • All cutting and welding equipment should be cleaned of any impurities or particulates.
  • The room should be maintained clean at all times and access should be across sticky floor mats.
  • All piping and fittings should be cleaned prior to and following welding.
  • Assemblies should be bagged following welding and the bags removed just prior to making field welds.
  • Welding and fitting technicians should use overshoes and cleanroom gloves. The gloves are worn to prevent finger print oils from getting onto the pipe.

The above procedures are currently typical for a high purity piping system for the semi-conductor industry and is considered advisable for pharmaceutical installations with similar requirements.

"Inspection of completed welds is sometimes not possible or practical. Remote borescope inspection is limiting and often not precise. Common practice and the practice recommended is to provide a validated process for all welds, a precise instrument to make the welds, an inert environment around the weld and a clean contact surface."

Skin oils and metal particulates will contaminate the surfaces of the mating tubing. The mating surfaces must be cleaned and maintained clean through the welding process to ensure a contamination free weld and therefore a validated weld.

The use of a clean area and clean area procedures will protect the welds and reduce the defect incidents associated with contaminates in the welding areas. (This approach has been shown to be cost effective by the cost sensitive semi-conductor industry.)

Spot checks of the outside and inside surfaces on a percentage or time basis will provide assurance of the system efficiency.

Tutorial Commentary

「驗證焊接」的概念（Validated Weld）

ISPE 的核心理念是：與其事後逐一檢查每條焊縫，不如驗證整個焊接製程。如果以下條件都受到控制：

  • 焊接機台參數已驗證
  • 焊接環境潔淨受控
  • 材料表面清潔
  • 保護氣體純度達標
  • 焊工通過每日資格認證

則可合理推定產出的焊縫品質一致且合格。這與製藥業的 Process Validation 思維完全一致。

半導體業的啟示

ISPE 特別引用半導體業的做法並非偶然。半導體製程對潔淨度的要求甚至比製藥更嚴格，而他們已經證明潔淨施工區是降低成本的有效方法 -- 因為減少了返工、報廢和品質問題。

製藥業可以直接借鏡這套成熟做法，不需要自己摸索。

為什麼手指油脂是大敵？

人體皮膚油脂（主要是脂肪酸和角鯊烯）在焊接高溫下會分解產生碳化物。這些碳化物會：

  • 嵌入焊縫金屬中形成夾渣
  • 破壞鈍化膜的形成
  • 成為微生物附著的起點

戴手套不只是「習慣」，而是焊縫品質的基本保障。

11.11.4–11.11.5 Orbital Welding & Borescoping

Original Text

11.11.4 Joints Using Fusion Butt Welding

Orbital welding is the recommended industry standard for high purity water systems in biotech, pharmaceutical and semi-conductor industries. This is due to the smooth inner weld bead that is characteristic of this joining process.

11.11.4.1 Orbital Welding

Orbital welding is a welding method used for joining stainless steel piping and tubing with electric arc in a welding machine not using any filler (welding rod) under inert atmosphere argon (Ar). Electric power characteristics are displayed on the control panel instruments and, if required, a printout of the welding parameters can be obtained.

11.11.4.2 Borescoping

A borescope is a fiber optic instrument with a monitor (TV screen and optional video tape recorder) used for inspecting the weld inside the pipe or tubing. The fiber-glass cable is a maximum 20 ft. long with a light and lens at the end. Borescoping is done for verification of the weld quality.

With the control of the welding process and the processing area, borescope inspection of the inside of the weld is only considered necessary as a means of control and is recommended as part of the qualifying process for the weld size and daily restart checks.

"Video recording each weld is considered un-necessary and difficult to justify."

11.11.5 High Tech. Orbital Tube and Pipe Welding for Stainless Steel

Semi-automatic, programmable, orbital, inert gas purged welding equipment for both tube and pipe is available from many manufacturers. The basic principals and techniques are the same for all commercial machines.

The system is an automatic “Heliarc” or “TIG” (Tungsten Inert Gas) process where Inert Argon gas from a cryogenic or low temperature source is used to protect the molten steel from oxidation during the metal fusion.

Liquid argon in Dewers is preferred due to its high purity at 99.999%. A gas purifier such as the Nanochem should be used during purging to bring the contaminants down to the ppb levels which is preferred.

The above equipment will weld stainless steels, nickel based alloys, titanium, and aluminum.

11.11.5.1 Accessories

Welding accessories are available to assist in set-up, alignment of pipe butts, purging, fitting alignment, pre-tacking fixtures, and finishing of the pipe ends in preparation for welding.

Tutorial Commentary

為什麼軌道焊接是業界標準？

軌道焊接（Orbital Welding）之所以成為高純水系統的首選，有三個關鍵原因：

  • 無填料焊接（Autogenous）：不使用焊條，避免引入外來材料
  • 機器控制：焊接參數（電流、速度、脈衝）由程式精確控制，排除人為變異
  • 內壁品質：特徵性的平滑焊道（smooth inner weld bead），不會形成微生物聚集的凹凸面

TIG 焊接原理簡述

TIG = Tungsten Inert Gas，也叫 GTAW（Gas Tungsten Arc Welding）：

  • 鎢電極產生電弧，熔化管壁母材
  • 氬氣覆蓋焊接區域，隔絕空氣中的氧氣和水分
  • 管內同步通入背面保護氣（Purge Gas）
  • 焊接頭圍繞管件360° 旋轉（這就是 “Orbital” 的含義）

Borescope 檢查的定位

注意 ISPE 的立場：在製程驗證完備的前提下，borescope 檢查不是每條焊縫必須做的，而是用於：

  • 每日開工前的首件確認
  • 更換管徑時的資格認證
  • 製程問題的抽檢追蹤

錄影記錄每條焊縫被認為「不必要且難以正當化」-- 這是一個風險導向的務實立場。

思考題

你的工廠要求每條焊縫都錄影存檔。根據 ISPE 的觀點，這個做法是否合理？如果你是品質主管，你會如何平衡「過度檢驗」與「品質保證」之間的關係？

11.11.6 Weld Criteria & Welder Qualification

Original Text

11.11.6 Weld Criteria

  • Weld quality must meet the strictest standards.
  • All welds must be fully penetrated around the entire weld perimeter with no crevices or entrapment sites. These areas are particularly vulnerable to crevice corrosion.
  • All welds should be smooth, uniform, complete and flat, not concave, on the outside.
  • The weld should have a uniform and complete weld bead width on the inside with little or no convexity.
  • The inner weld bead should contain no concavity.
  • There should be no visible signs of oxidation/discoloration of the inner weld.
  • The joints should be square facing and properly aligned. Tubing surfaces should not be offset in any plane or direction by more than +/-0.003 in.
  • The weld width should be nominal 1/8 in. wide.

11.11.6.1 Welder Qualification

Each welder performing welding on certain metals must be qualified for this type of metal and welding. The American Society of Mechanical Engineers (ASME) and the American Welding Society (AWS) have welding procedures for welder qualifications. Each qualified welder should be formally qualified with a certificate.

As a general rule, welders and welding procedures are qualified to ASME B 31.3 (chemical plant and petroleum refinery piping), that incorporates ASME Section IX by reference.

11.11.6.2 Common Test Methods for Installed Piping

Test methods on installed piping are: pressure testing, verification of slope and the last step of passivation requiring the testing of the final rinse water.

Tutorial Commentary

焊接品質八大標準 -- 背記重點

項目要求
穿透度全周 100% 穿透，無縫隙
外表面平整、均勻、完整，不凹陷
內壁焊道均勻寬度，極低或無凸起
內壁凹陷不允許凹陷（concavity）
氧化變色內壁不得有可見氧化
對齊偏差≤ ±0.003 in.（約 0.076 mm）
焊道寬度標稱 1/8 in.（約 3.2 mm）
整體品質符合最嚴格標準

為什麼內壁凹陷不可接受？

焊道內壁凹陷（suck-back / concavity）會造成：

  • 管壁厚度在焊縫處減薄，降低結構強度
  • 凹陷處形成死水區域，微生物容易附著
  • CIP 清洗液無法有效接觸凹陷底部

理想的焊縫內壁應該是微微凸起或完全平齊。

焊工認證體系

ASME B31.3 是化工和石油精煉廠配管標準，引用 ASME Section IX（焊接和釬焊資格標準）。焊工認證的重點：

  • 每位焊工需持有特定金屬種類和焊接方式的證書
  • 每日開工前需進行試焊和 borescope 確認
  • 更換管徑需重新資格認證
  • 這套體系確保的是人員 + 程序 + 設備三位一體的品質保證
11.11.7 Weld Defect Catalog

Original Text

11.11.7 Weld Defects Examples

11.11.7.1 Joint Misalignment

Poor alignment of joint caused by equipment or procedure failure.

Remedy: Follow GMP welding procedures / use tube alignment gauge.

11.11.7.2 Lack of Penetration

Weld bead does not completely penetrate the ID of tube caused by poor setting of weld program parameters, material thickness and/or composition did not allow for complete penetration or improper welding amperage caused by power fluctuations.

Remedy: Develop proper welding parameters / adjust program to compensate for thickness or material / adjust for amperage fluctuation.

11.11.7.3 Excessive Penetration

Weld bead over penetrates causing excessive concavity or spikes caused by incorrect weld program (too hot), excessive welding amperage caused by power fluctuations or material thickness and/or composition which caused excessive penetration.

Remedy: Develop proper welding parameters / adjust program / use dedicated circuit.

11.11.7.4 Lack of I.D. Purge

Discoloration/oxidization in the heat effected zone caused by a lack of ID purge or the use of an impure purge gas. Sugaring of the weld bead caused by a lack of ID purge.

Remedy: Monitor the purge-flow at the weld site and ensure the hose is not pinched.

11.11.7.5 Interrupted Purge

A short segment of discoloration/oxidation and excessive penetration caused by a momentary purge gas pressure drop commonly caused by a pinched gas line.

Remedy: Monitor purge-flow and ensure the gas hose is not pinched.

11.11.7.6 Purge Gas Purity Problems

Coloration/oxidation along the weld area caused by impurities in the weld purge gas or in or on the metal surface.

Remedy: Eliminate purge and surface impurities and check for excessive concentrations of oxygen and moisture.

11.11.7.7 Heat Tint/Haze

Light coloration/haze along weld area caused by minor impurities in weld purge gas or metal surface.

Remedy: Eliminate impurities in weld zone.

11.11.7.8 Oxidation/Discoloration

Discoloration ranging from blue/brown haze to dark blue with black edges caused by oxygen contaminated purge gas, incomplete sealing, or insufficient pre-purge.

Remedy: Ensure the complete sealing of the purged line and monitor the purge flow and purity.

11.11.7.9 Insufficient Tie-In

Weld on OD is good, but the ID is incomplete and does not overlap weld start caused by incorrect speed or time in the weld program. (Uncalibrated weld head.)

Remedy: Use high quality welding equipment and check for appropriate procedures.

11.11.7.10 Electrical Current Fluctuations

Significant narrowing of ID weld bead width and/or lack of penetration of tube ID in affected areas caused by electrical power fluctuations (not using a dedicated circuit).

Remedy: Ensure that a dedicated circuit is used.

11.11.7.11 Inclusions/Dross (non-metallic substance)

Non-metallic formation on ID weld caused by tungsten inclusion.

Remedy: Use high quality base material for welding rod.

11.11.7.12 Pinholing

Small holes in the weld bead caused by the weld puddle being cooled too rapidly.

Remedy: Ramp (feather) the welding amperage properly and provide post purge.

11.11.7.13 Porosity

Metallic or non-metallic impurities trapped in the weld bead (tungsten or slag) caused by the introduction of impurities from outside or from the weld material.

Remedy: Eliminate impurities from outside or from the metal.

11.11.7.14 Cracking

Cracks in either the surface of the weld caused by brittle metal or use of a very hot weld program with rapid cooling.

Remedy: Use only good quality materials and acceptable welding programs. Do not quench or cool the weld.

Tutorial Commentary

14 種焊接缺陷分類整理

這些缺陷可以按根本原因分為四大類：

類別缺陷根因
參數問題穿透不足電流/程式設定
過度穿透電流過大
收弧不足速度/時間設定
保護氣問題缺乏 ID Purge未通保護氣
Purge 中斷氣管折彎
氣體純度雜質過多
熱染色/霧化微量雜質
氧化變色密封不完全
電力/設備電流波動未用專用迴路
接頭偏移設備/程序失誤
夾渣鎢極品質
材料/冷卻針孔冷卻過快
氣孔雜質混入
裂縫脆性材料/快冷

最常見的問題：保護氣體

14 種缺陷中有 5 種（36%）直接與保護氣體相關。這告訴我們：

  • 氬氣的供應、純度、流量監控是焊接品質的第一道防線
  • 氣管折彎是現場最常見的低級錯誤 -- 簡單但致命
  • 投資氣體純化器（如 Nanochem）的投資報酬率很高

「Sugaring」-- 最嚴重的缺陷之一

Sugaring（糖化）是指焊縫內壁出現粗糙、多孔的氧化物堆積，外觀像砂糖。它代表焊接時完全沒有有效的內部保護氣體。Sugaring 焊縫是完全不可接受的，因為：

  • 粗糙表面提供大量微生物附著點
  • 氧化物會持續剝落污染水質
  • CIP 無法清洗乾淨

變色判斷法則

焊縫變色是保護氣問題的「溫度計」：

  • 無色/金色：保護良好（合格）
  • 淡藍色/霧化：微量雜質，邊界情況
  • 深藍色 + 黑邊：嚴重氧化，不合格
  • 白色/灰色砂糖狀：完全無保護，報廢

現場排查練習

情境：你發現連續三條焊縫的內壁都出現不規則的變色帶。根據缺陷目錄，請列出你的排查順序和每一步要檢查什麼？（提示：從 11.11.7.4 到 11.11.7.8 依序分析）

11.11.8 PVDF Piping Welding

Original Text

11.11.8 High Tech. Orbital Tube and Pipe Welding for PVDF Piping

Semi automatic fusion welding machines are available for orbital welding of PVDF piping.

An elastic pressure element backs up the inside of the fusion zone, totally avoiding an inner bead.

A controlled pressure thermoplastic melt optimizes the homogeneous joint between the plastic parts, producing a consistent joint quality.

Tutorial Commentary

PVDF 焊接 vs. SS 焊接的關鍵差異

特性不鏽鋼 (SS)PVDF
焊接方式TIG 電弧熔融熱熔融合（Fusion）
保護氣體氬氣必須不需要
內壁焊道有焊道（需控制）無焊道（elastic element 壓平）
接合原理母材熔融重結晶熱塑性材料加壓熔合
溫度控制電流控制溫度 + 壓力雙控制

PVDF 的優勢場景

PVDF 管件不會有 rouge（紅鏽）問題，且耐化學腐蝕。特別適合：

  • 常溫或中溫（≤90°C）PW 系統
  • 使用臭氧消毒的系統
  • 需要避免金屬離子溶出的應用

但高溫系統（>90°C）和 WFI 蒸餾系統仍以不鏽鋼為主。

11.11.9 Remedial Action for Defective Welds

Original Text

11.11.9 Remedial Action for Defective Welds – SS or PVDF Piping

Rewelding or weld repairs are not acceptable.

Weld Replacements

The following is a procedure for replacing defective welds:

  1. Cut out rejected weld using a band or cut-off saw.
  2. Where possible, retain section for further inspection.
  3. Prepare faces of tubing and check for signs of discoloration.
  4. Ensure that all traces of any heat effected areas are removed.
  5. Cut and shape pipe ends using proprietary facing equipment.
  6. Debur and reweld.
  7. Assign a “R” suffix to weld number.

Tutorial Commentary

絕對原則：不修補，只替換

這是高純水焊接的鐵律：不合格的焊縫必須整段切除重焊，不允許在原焊縫上修補。原因：

  • 修補焊接會在同一區域形成多重熱影響區（HAZ）
  • 重複加熱改變金屬微觀結構，降低耐蝕性
  • 修補焊縫的內壁品質幾乎不可能達到標準

替換焊縫的 7 步驟流程

ISPE 規定的標準流程是一個完整的品質循環：

  • 步驟 a-b：切除 + 保留樣品（用於根因分析）
  • 步驟 c-d：確認 HAZ 完全移除（變色區域必須全部切掉）
  • 步驟 e-f：重新準備管端 + 按標準程序重焊
  • 步驟 g：追蹤標記 -- 替換焊縫加「R」後綴，確保完整的焊縫履歷

為什麼要保留被切除的焊縫？

就像醫院保留切除的組織做病理分析一樣，保留不合格焊縫可以：

  • 進行根因分析（是參數問題？氣體問題？材料問題？）
  • 作為焊工再培訓的教學樣品
  • 累積缺陷數據，優化焊接程式
11.11.10 Joints Using Sanitary Clamps

Original Text

11.11.10 Joints Using Sanitary Clamps

The sanitary clamp system of quick disconnect fittings are designed to provide a smooth non-contacting or non-corrosive environment.

The sanitary joints may be cleaned in place, provide leak tight connections and may be adapted to other forms of piping.

These joints should be used for all distribution pipe connections to valves, sensor housings, and fittings not adaptable to orbital fusion welding.

Tutorial Commentary

Sanitary Clamp 的適用場景

Sanitary clamp（衛生卡箍）用於需要定期拆卸維護的連接點：

  • 閥門連接（需定期更換膜片）
  • 感測器外殼（需定期校準/更換）
  • 取樣點（需定期消毒）
  • 無法進行軌道焊接的管件連接

設計原則：能焊接的地方用焊接（永久、無死角），不能焊接的地方才用 clamp。

Clamp 接頭的維護要點

  • 墊片（gasket）是唯一消耗件，需定期檢查和更換
  • EPDM 墊片適合熱水，PTFE 適合臭氧環境
  • 安裝時確保墊片居中，避免突入管內形成死角
  • clamp 扭矩要適當 -- 過鬆漏水，過緊壓壞墊片
11.12 Abbreviations and Definitions

11.12.1 Definitions (Glossary)

Original Definitions (A–E)

TermDefinition
ABSA plastic material used to make pipe; based on combinations of acrylonitrile, butadiene and styrene; relatively inert and contributes little contamination to pharmaceutical water.
AbsorptionAssimilation of molecules or other substances into the physical structure of a liquid or solid without chemical reaction.
Aerobic BacteriaBacteria capable of growing in the presence of oxygen.
Anaerobic BacteriaBacteria capable of growing in the absence of oxygen.
As-Built DrawingsConstruction drawings and specifications that represent the physical condition of the plant or system at turnover from the designer or installer at satisfactory operation.
BackwashThe process of flowing water in the opposite direction from normal service flow through a filter bed or ion exchange bed to clean and eliminate flow channels.
BacteriaSingle-celled microorganisms measured in high purity water by culturing, microscope, or SEM. Reported as Colony Forming Units (CFU) per milliliter or per liter.
BlowdownThe withdrawal of water from an evaporating water system to maintain a solids balance within specified limits.
BODBiological oxygen demand of water — the oxygen required by bacteria for oxidation of soluble organic matter.
BreakthroughPassage of a substance through a bed, filter, or process designed to eliminate it. First signs: silica leakage and increased conductivity.
CalibrationA comparison of a measurement standard or instrument of unknown accuracy to detect, correlate, report, or eliminate variation in accuracy.
Cation Exchange ResinAn ion exchange resin which removes positively charged ions.
CommissioningA prescribed number of activities designed to take equipment and systems from a static, substantially complete state to an operable state.
ConductivityA measure of flow of electrical current through water. High with high TDS water, very low with ultrapure water. Measured in μmho/cm or μS/cm. Reciprocal of resistivity (C=1/R).
ContaminantAny foreign component present in another substance. In water, anything that is not H2O.
Critical InstrumentInstruments used to measure critical parameters.
Critical ParameterMeasured values that determine process compliance and cause a system to revert to fail-safe mode.
Drinking WaterEPA primary drinking water or comparable regulations of the EU or Japan.
EndotoxinsPyrogens from certain Gram negative bacteria. Lipopolysaccharide-protein complexes from cell walls. Known for persistent contamination and surface adherence.
Enhanced DocumentationCollection of Engineering, QC and Regulatory Affairs documents for operation, validation, maintenance, and regulatory compliance.
EPAEnvironmental Protection Agency.
ExtractableTrace material from piping and/or equipment extracted by the processed fluid.

中文對照與重點解說

核心術語中文翻譯（A–E）

English繁體中文
ABSABS 塑膠（丙烯腈-丁二烯-苯乙烯共聚物）
Absorption吸收作用
Aerobic Bacteria好氧菌
Anaerobic Bacteria厭氧菌
As-Built Drawings竣工圖（現況圖）
Backwash反洗
Bacteria細菌
Blowdown排污
BOD生化需氧量
Breakthrough穿透（樹脂失效）
Calibration校正/校準
Cation Exchange Resin陽離子交換樹脂
Commissioning試車/調試
Conductivity導電度/電導率
Contaminant污染物
Critical Instrument關鍵儀器
Critical Parameter關鍵參數
Drinking Water飲用水
Endotoxins內毒素
Enhanced Documentation強化文件
EPA環境保護署
Extractable可萃取物

易混淆術語提醒

  • Conductivity vs. Resistivity：互為倒數。高純水用 Resistivity（MΩ-cm），一般水用 Conductivity（μS/cm）
  • Calibration vs. Qualification：Calibration 是儀器精度校準；Qualification 是設備功能確認
  • Commissioning vs. Qualification：Commissioning 是工程試車；Qualification 是 GMP 驗證

Original Definitions (F–O)

TermDefinition
FDAUS Food and Drug Administration.
General ArrangementA more specific version of a general layout including system interface points, space requirements, ergonomics, construction issues, and maintenance requirements.
GEPGood Engineering Practices — standards, specifications, codes, and accepted methods to design, erect, operate, and maintain pharmaceutical facilities.
Gram Negative BacteriaA basic classification of bacterial type. These organisms resist staining by the Gram technique.
HardnessThe concentration of calcium and magnesium salts in water. “Permanent hardness” is excess over alkalinity; “Temporary hardness” is equal to or less than alkalinity.
High Purity WaterWater conforming to USP Monographs or equivalent.
Humic AcidOrganic matter that precipitates from the sodium hydroxide extract upon acidification.
Ion Exchange (IX)Process using anion and cation exchange resin to chemically react with and remove remaining ions or TDS in the water.
MembraneA barrier, usually thin, that permits the passage only of particles up to a certain size or of special nature.
MicronSame as micrometer or 1/1000th of a millimeter. Typical particle size of importance: less than 0.2 μm.
Mixed Bed IXUse of both cation and anion exchange resin mixed together in one tank.
OrganicsOrganic chemicals; compounds containing carbon-to-hydrogen bonds, not carbonate related.
OsmosisPassage of water through a permeable membrane from dilute to more concentrated solution.
OzoneA very strong gaseous oxidizing agent (O3). Used to kill bacteria and reduce TOC. Short but effective oxidizing potential.

中文對照與重點解說

核心術語中文翻譯（F–O）

English繁體中文
FDA美國食品藥物管理局
General Arrangement總配置圖
GEP良好工程實務
Gram Negative Bacteria革蘭氏陰性菌
Hardness硬度（鈣鎂離子濃度）
High Purity Water高純水
Humic Acid腐植酸
Ion Exchange離子交換
Membrane膜/薄膜
Micron微米
Mixed Bed IX混床離子交換
Organics有機物
Osmosis滲透
Ozone臭氧

實務上最常遇到的術語

在日常水系統操作中，以下術語出現頻率最高：

  • Conductivity / Resistivity：水質監控的核心指標
  • Endotoxin：WFI 的關鍵品質屬性
  • TOC：有機物監控指標
  • Passivation：不鏽鋼表面處理
  • Reverse Osmosis：主要純化單元

Original Definitions (P–Z)

TermDefinition
ParticlesPhysically measurable contaminant in deionized water. Reported as number per liter of a particular size in micrometers.
PassivationThe means of obtaining loss of chemical reactivity. Generates an oxide film that covers and protects the metal surface.
PasteurizationA process for killing pathogenic organisms by heat applied for a critical period of time.
pHThe negative log of the hydrogen ion concentration. A measure of acidity/alkalinity of a solution.
PVDFPolyvinylidene Fluoride — a plastic material used to make pipe for pharmaceutical water distribution. Relatively inert.
Purified WaterUSP Purified Water prepared from drinking water. Conductivity per USP stages 1-3. TOC at 0.5 mg/l. Less than 100 CFU/ml for FDA acceptability.
PyrogenTrace organics as markers of bacterial growth. Primarily polysaccharide in nature. Fever producing when administered parenterally.
ResistivityResistance to flow of electrical current through high purity water. Measured in Megohm-cm. Reciprocal of conductivity (R=1/C).
Reverse OsmosisProcess applying pressure to reverse natural osmosis, passing water from concentrated to dilute solution through a semipermeable membrane.
RougeA form of surface corrosion occurring in some stainless steel water systems.
Sanitary DesignA system of design meeting standards, codes, and guidelines to reach a degree of sanitation required by food, pharmaceutical, and cosmetics processing.
SofteningRemoval of hardness (calcium and magnesium) from water using cation exchange resin regenerated with sodium chloride.
SterilizationKilling of microorganisms in the distribution system, typically by flushing with hydrogen peroxide, ozone, or continuous low-level ozone injection.
TDSTotal Dissolved Solids — inorganic ions in water, usually measured by electrical conductance corrected to 25°C.
TOCTotal Organic Carbon — measure of organics by carbon content. Feed water in ppm, UPW in ppb.
UltrafiltrationFilter technology similar to RO, capable of filtering colloids and large MW organics down to 0.005 μm.
UV SterilizerUltraviolet lamps (254 nm) used to kill microorganisms in water.
WFIUSP Water for Injection. Prepared by distillation or double pass RO. TOC at 0.5 mg/l. Less than 0.1 CFU/ml. Less than 0.25 EU/ml.

中文對照與重點解說

核心術語中文翻譯（P–Z）

English繁體中文
Particles微粒
Passivation鈍化
Pasteurization巴氏殺菌
pH酸鹼值
PVDF聚偏二氟乙烯
Purified Water純化水（USP 純水）
Pyrogen熱原/致熱原
Resistivity電阻率
Reverse Osmosis逆滲透
Rouge紅鏽（表面腐蝕）
Sanitary Design衛生設計
Softening軟化
Sterilization滅菌
TDS總溶解固體
TOC總有機碳
Ultrafiltration超過濾/超濾
UV Sterilizer紫外線殺菌器
WFI注射用水

PW vs. WFI -- 規格比較

參數Purified WaterWFI
製備方式多種可接受蒸餾或雙道 RO
TOC≤ 0.5 mg/L≤ 0.5 mg/L
微生物< 100 CFU/mL< 0.1 CFU/mL
內毒素未規定< 0.25 EU/mL

WFI 的微生物限度比 PW 嚴格 1000 倍，且多了內毒素要求。

Rouge -- 不鏽鋼的隱形殺手

Rouge 在 ISPE 定義中很簡潔，但它是水系統長期運營中最常遇到的問題之一。Rouge 的形成與系統溫度、水質、不鏽鋼等級直接相關。高溫 WFI 系統（>80°C）特別容易發生。

處理方式：定期鈍化（Passivation）和必要時的除鏽處理（Derouging）。

Abbrev.繁體中文

MF微過濾

MSDS物質安全資料表

VC蒸汽壓縮蒸餾器
WFI注射用水

蒸餾器類型速查

  • ME (Multi-Effect)：多效蒸餾器 -- 最常用於 WFI 製備
  • VC (Vapor Compression)：蒸汽壓縮蒸餾器 -- 節能型

兩者都能產出符合 USP WFI 規格的水，ME 較傳統可靠，VC 能耗較低。

Section Summary

Key Takeaways

  • Distribution Design: Natural drainage (min 1/16 in./ft slope), dead leg control (≤6 diameters), sanitary diaphragm valves at 60° to vertical, tri-clamp connections throughout.
  • Fabrication Quality Chain: Approved vendors → incoming inspection → clean area fabrication → IPA cleaning → 2-hour bagging rule → orbital welding in cleanroom → 99.999% Ar purge.
  • Orbital Welding: TIG/autogenous process, no filler metal, programmable parameters, the industry standard for high purity water systems.
  • Weld Criteria: Full penetration, no concavity, no oxidation, ≤±0.003 in. misalignment, 1/8 in. bead width. Qualified per ASME B31.3 / Section IX.
  • 14 Weld Defects: 36% are purge-gas related. No repair allowed — cut out and replace with “R” suffix tracking.
  • PVDF Welding: Thermal fusion with elastic backup element, no inner bead, controlled pressure melt.
  • Glossary: 60+ definitions and 70+ abbreviations covering water treatment, microbiology, instrumentation, and regulatory terminology.

本章總結

三大核心收穫

  1. 施工即驗證：ISPE 的理念是透過控制整個施工製程（環境、材料、人員、設備、參數）來確保品質，而非依賴事後逐一檢查每條焊縫。
  2. 零容忍修補：不合格焊縫只能切除重焊，不允許修補。這個看似嚴苛的要求，實際上是最經濟的做法 -- 因為修補焊縫永遠無法達到原始品質。
  3. 術語是溝通基石：掌握這些標準術語和縮寫，才能與設備供應商、工程顧問、法規審查員順暢溝通。中英對照的掌握尤其重要。

學習自我檢測

  • 你能列出配管施工品質鏈條的 7 個環節嗎？
  • 焊接品質的 8 大標準，你記住了幾個？
  • 14 種焊接缺陷中，哪些與保護氣體相關？
  • PW 和 WFI 在微生物限度上的差異是多少倍？
  • 為什麼不合格焊縫不能修補只能替換？
